source: Click here to exit the spell book, taking no action.
zh: 點擊此處關閉法術書，不執行任何動作。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: 5 x 5 area
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Turns a 5 x 5 area into thick, sticky mud for the duration of a battle, with the exception of any rivers and hills in the target area. Mud tiles cost both friend and foe 6 movement points to enter. Flying and non-corporeal units are unaffected. This spell has no effect in battles taking place over water.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：5 x 5 範圍
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
在戰鬥持續期間，將 5 x 5 範圍化為濃稠黏滑的泥地（目標區域內的河流與丘陵除外）。泥地格對友方與敵方均需消耗 6 點移動力才能進入。飛行及非實體單位不受影響。此法術對發生在水域上的戰鬥無效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 5/25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Gives a target unit increased resistance (+3) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+3) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：5/25 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
賦予目標單位對混沌與自然元素魔法的抗性提升（+3），以及對這兩個領域的傷害法術和遠程魔法攻擊的防禦提升（+3）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊，但賢者與幻術師英雄所發動的攻擊除外；亦可抵禦吐息攻擊與烈焰焚身。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Surrounds a target city with a sturdy stone wall, identical to the City Walls building in every respect, including its maintenance cost of 2 gold per turn.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：友方城市
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
在目標城市周圍建起堅固的石牆，與城牆建築完全相同，包含每回合 2 金幣的維護費用。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 8/40 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Makes a target unit's creatures stronger by adding +1 to each figure's melee attack strength. If the unit has thrown attacks, the strength of those is also improved by +1, again affecting each figure.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：8/40 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
強化目標單位的生物，為每個模型的近戰攻擊力各加 +1。若該單位具有投擲攻擊，其投擲攻擊力同樣每個模型各提升 +1。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
Casts a sticky, 12 hit point web over a target unit. Creatures cannot move until they destroy the web with melee, breath, or magic ranged attacks, which they automatically execute against it at the beginning of every combat turn. Web remnants prevent flying units from flying for the rest of the battle.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：10 法力
維護：無
對目標單位施加一張黏稠的蜘蛛網（生命值 12）。生物在摧毀蜘蛛網之前無法移動——牠們會在每個戰鬥回合開始時自動以近戰、吐息或魔法遠程攻擊來攻擊蜘蛛網。蜘蛛網殘留物會阻止飛行單位在本場戰鬥剩餘時間內飛行。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 70 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Summons a pair of ferocious bears with 7 melee, 3 defense, 6 resistance, and 8 hit points each. The bears have a speed of 2, and possess the Forester trait, allowing their army to traverse forests on the overland map for only one movement point per tile.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：70 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
召喚一對兇猛的戰熊，每頭各有近戰 7、防禦 3、抗性 6、生命 8。戰熊移動速度為 2，並具備「林地行者」特性，使其所在的軍隊在戰略地圖上穿越森林每格僅需 1 點移動力。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10/50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Causes a target unit's skin to harden, increasing the unit's defense (shields) by one.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：10/50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
使目標單位的皮膚硬化，將該單位的防禦（盾牌）提升 1 點。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Endows a unit with the ability to walk on water. The unit's movement speed remains unchanged.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
賦予目標單位在水面行走的能力，移動速度維持不變。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons a unit of four small, flying forest creatures that can hurl tiny magic attacks over long distances four times per battle. Sprites have 2 melee strength, 3 ranged strength, +1 to hit, 2 defense, and 8 resistance, but only 1 hit point each. They fly with a speed of 2, and possess the Forester trait, allowing their army to traverse forests on the overland map for only one movement point per tile.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：100 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
召喚一隊共四隻小型飛行森林精靈，每場戰鬥可遠距發動四次微型魔法攻擊。精靈各有近戰 2、遠程 3、命中 +1、防禦 2、抗性 8，但每個僅有 1 點生命。飛行速度為 2，並具備「林地行者」特性，使其所在的軍隊在戰略地圖上穿越森林每格僅需 1 點移動力。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map window
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Fully reveals terrain, terrain specials, and cities on all squares in a targeted 'map window'.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖視窗
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
完整揭露目標「地圖視窗」內所有格的地形、地形特產與城市。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Rends the earth. Any non-flying, corporeal creature standing over the newly created fissure has a 25% chance (regardless of defense) of dying. Stone walls that cross the fissure are destroyed.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：地圖格
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
撕裂大地。任何站在新生裂縫上的非飛行、有形生物有 25% 的機率死亡（無視防禦）。橫跨裂縫的石牆將被摧毀。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Extends the scouting range of a friendly target city to 5 squares in any direction, revealing all lands and all non-invisible enemy troops within that radius.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：友方城市
施法花費：75 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
將友方目標城市的偵察範圍延伸至各方向 5 格，揭露該半徑內所有地形及所有非隱形的敵方部隊。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Showers a target unit with shards of ice (strength 5 magic cold attack, with every extra point of magic power spent adding a strength of 1 to the attack).
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
以冰晶碎片猛擊目標單位（強度 5 魔法冰冷攻擊，每多投入 1 點魔力，攻擊強度增加 1）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
Summons two giant, poisonous, web-casting spiders, that have 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 7 resistance, and 10 hit points each. Their poison also has a strength of 4, and they can use their web ability once per battle (per unit). Giant spiders have a movement speed of 2.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：200 法力
維護：4 法力/回合
召喚兩隻巨型毒蜘蛛，牠們能吐出蜘蛛網。每隻各有近戰 4、命中 +1、防禦 3、抗性 7、生命 10。毒素強度為 4，且每場戰鬥（每單位）可使用蜘蛛網能力一次。巨型蜘蛛移動速度為 2。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Alters a target map square, changing deserts, forests, hills, and swamps into grasslands; grasslands into forests; volcanoes into mountains; and mountains into hills. Terrain not listed is not a valid target, and neither are the tiles of magical nodes. If there are any objects on the map square, those will remain intact, including minerals, wild game, nightshades, roads, cities, units, and even encounter zones such as monster lairs or towers of wizardry.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
改變目標地圖格的地形：沙漠、森林、丘陵與沼澤化為草原；草原化為森林；火山化為山脈；山脈化為丘陵。未列出的地形不是有效目標，魔法節點的格子亦不可作為目標。若地圖格上有任何物件，包括礦物、野生獵物、夜影草、道路、城市、單位，乃至怪物巢穴或巫師之塔等遭遇區，皆將完整保留。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Enables a target unit, and any others stacked with it, to travel over any terrain they could normally enter as if it was a road (i.e., the cost is only 1/2 movement point per square). Sailing ships gain no benefit from this spell, and will usually prevent it from being utilized in any stack they are part of - as will Wind Walking units. Flying units gain no direct benefit either, and may only utilize this effect if grouped together with non-flying ones.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
使目標單位及與其同堆疊的其他單位，能以如同道路的代價（即每格僅需 1/2 移動力）穿越任何可正常進入的地形。帆船不受此法術加成，且通常會阻止堆疊中的其他單位使用此效果；御風行走單位亦同。飛行單位亦無直接加成，且僅在與非飛行單位同組時才能使用此效果。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 275 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
Summons a unit of four cockatrices, whose deceptively soft, feathered touch is capable of turning even the hardiest creatures to stone. Cockatrices have 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 7 resistance, and 3 hit points each. They can fly with a speed of 2, and their Stoning Touch carries a resistance penalty of -3.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：275 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
召喚一隊共四隻雞蛇怪，其看似溫柔的羽翼觸碰能將最強壯的生物石化。雞蛇怪各有近戰 4、命中 +1、防禦 3、抗性 7、生命 3。飛行速度為 2，其「石化觸碰」帶有 -3 的抗性懲罰。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map special
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Transforms a mineral on a map square into another: coal to gems, iron to gold, and silver to mithril. Transmute will also reverse these transformations: gems to coal, gold to iron, and mithril to silver. Minerals not listed are not valid targets for the spell.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖特產
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
將地圖格上的礦物轉化為另一種：煤炭變寶石、鐵礦變金幣、銀礦變秘銀。煉金術亦可逆向轉化：寶石變煤炭、金幣變鐵礦、秘銀變銀礦。未列出的礦物不是此法術的有效目標。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: none
Completely heals all units (except for creatures of death) that are stacked in a target land square.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：75 法力
維護：無
完整治癒目標陸地格上堆疊的所有單位（死亡系生物除外）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 325 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Summons a giant basilisk - a creature so frightening to behold, that it can turn its enemies to stone simply by gazing in their direction. The basilisk has 15 melee strength, +1 to hit, 4 defense, 7 resistance, and 30 hit points. It has a movement speed of 2, and its Stoning Gaze carries a resistance penalty of -1.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：325 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
召喚一頭巨型蛇怪——其面目之恐怖，僅憑目光凝視便能將敵人石化。蛇怪有近戰 15、命中 +1、防禦 4、抗性 7、生命 30，移動速度為 2，其「石化凝視」帶有 -1 的抗性懲罰。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 35/175 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Gives a target unit increased resistance (+10) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+10) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation. These bonuses do not exert cumulative effects with the spell Resist Elements however, but will override them instead.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：35/175 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
賦予目標單位對混沌與自然元素魔法的抗性大幅提升（+10），以及對這兩個領域的傷害法術和遠程魔法攻擊的防禦大幅提升（+10）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊，但賢者與幻術師英雄所發動的攻擊除外；亦可抵禦吐息攻擊與烈焰焚身。但此加成不與「抵禦元素」法術疊加，而是將其覆蓋。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to turn an entire enemy unit into stone. Each figure must individually resist the effect, or be slain irrevocably - no magic may bring petrified creatures back to life during the current battle (although they may be able to regenerate afterwards if any figures survive).
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
嘗試將整支敵方單位化為石像。每個模型必須個別進行抗性判定，否則將永久死亡——本場戰鬥中無任何魔法能使石化生物復生（但若有模型倖存，戰後或許能再生）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 450 mana
Upkeep: 9 mana/turn
Summons an enormous, wall-crushing stone giant. This creature is impervious to Poison and Stoning, may destroy city wall sections with its attacks, and can hurl huge boulders at its enemies twice per battle. It has an attack strength of 15, +2 to hit, 8 defense, 9 resistance, and 20 hit points. It can move with a speed of 2, and has the Mountaineer trait, allowing it, and any units stacked with it, to move over hills and mountains for only 1 movement point per tile.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：450 法力
維護：9 法力/回合
召喚一頭巨大的碎牆石巨人。此生物對毒素與石化免疫，攻擊時可摧毀城牆段，並可在每場戰鬥中向敵人投擲巨石兩次。攻擊強度 15、命中 +2、防禦 8、抗性 9、生命 20，移動速度為 2。具備「山地行者」特性，使其本身及與其同堆疊的單位穿越丘陵與山脈每格僅需 1 點移動力。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Fuses iron with a target unit's skin, making it able to withstand most attacks (adds 5 to defense).
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：40/200 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
將鐵融入目標單位的皮膚，使其能承受大多數攻擊（防禦加 5）。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes the skies above a target map square to rain down a torrent of icy hail. All figures occupying that area are struck with a strength 6 magic cold attack.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
使目標地圖格上空降下冰雹暴雨，佔據該區域的所有模型受到強度 6 的魔法冰冷攻擊。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes a violent earthquake to shake a target city. All buildings have a 15% chance of being destroyed. All non-flying, corporeal units have a 25% chance of dying. Replaced buildings, and buildings required by another, still standing one may not be collapsed by this spell however.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
引發猛烈地震撼動目標城市。所有建築有 15% 的機率被摧毀，所有非飛行有形單位有 25% 的機率死亡。但可替換的建築，以及被另一棟仍屹立的建築所依賴的建築，不會被此法術摧毀。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 600 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a unit of four gorgons. These monstrosities, just as their mythological namesakes, are so ugly and frightening to behold that enemies who mistakenly peek in their direction are turned to stone. Gorgons have 8 melee strength, +2 to hit, 7 defense, 9 resistance, and 9 hit points each. They fly with a speed of 2, and their Stoning Gaze carries a resistance penalty of -2.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：600 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一隊共四隻戈爾貢。這些怪物如同神話中的同名生物，其外貌之醜陋恐怖，令不慎對視的敵人化為石像。戈爾貢各有近戰 8、命中 +2、防禦 7、抗性 9、生命 9。飛行速度為 2，其「石化凝視」帶有 -2 的抗性懲罰。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Moves a wizard's enchanted fortress (with summoning circle, if the circle has not previously been moved) to the target friendly city. If the new city is inhabited by a different race, then they will become the new capital race of the empire, affecting the base level of unrest in every settlement accordingly.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：友方城市
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
將巫師的魔法要塞（若召喚圈尚未移動過，則連同召喚圈一起）遷移至目標友方城市。若新城市居住著不同種族，則該種族將成為帝國的新首都種族，並相應影響每座聚落的基礎動亂等級。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
A target city's maximum food harvest (and thereby base maximum population) increases by 50%. Every turn there is a 10% chance for each of the city's deserts to convert to grasslands and volcanoes to verdant hills, and a 20% chance each that its corrupted lands return to their pristine state. In addition, unrest in the city is reduced by 2, and any production bonus it gains from forest tiles is doubled.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：友方城市
施法花費：300 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
目標城市的最高食物收穫量（以及基礎最高人口）提升 50%。每個回合，城市的每片沙漠有 10% 的機率轉化為草原，每座火山有 10% 的機率化為翠綠丘陵，每片受污染土地有 20% 的機率恢復原始狀態。此外，城市的動亂降低 2 點，且來自森林格的生產加成翻倍。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: unoccupied map square
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an earth elemental. The creature cannot be summoned if there are already nine friendly units on the battlefield, and disappears when the battle is over. The elemental has a melee strength of 25, +1 to hit, 4 defense, 8 resistance, and 30 hit points. It has a movement speed of 1, and is impervious to Poison and Stoning attacks. The earth elemental also has the Wall Crusher ability, allowing it to destroy sections of city walls in close combat with a 50% chance per attack.
zh:
效果：戰鬥召喚
目標：空置地圖格
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
召喚一個土元素。若戰場上已有九個友方單位，則無法召喚，戰鬥結束後消失。元素有近戰 25、命中 +1、防禦 4、抗性 8、生命 30，移動速度為 1，對毒素與石化免疫。土元素亦具備「碎牆者」能力，每次近戰攻擊有 50% 的機率摧毀城牆段。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 60/300 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Target unit can regenerate during combat (1 hit point/ turn) and afterwards (immediate return to full health). If the unit dies in combat, it returns in full health if its side won, unless it was slain by mostly irreversible- or create undead damage (banishment/unsummoning, petrification, disintegration, life stealing). The unit is also impervious to conventional damage spells and effects on the overland map, and will never suffer any harm from them.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：60/300 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
目標單位在戰鬥中可再生（每回合 1 點生命），戰後亦可立即恢復滿血。若該單位在戰鬥中陣亡，且己方獲勝，則以滿血狀態復活——但若死於大多不可逆的傷害或製造不死者效果（驅逐/解除召喚、石化、瓦解、竊取生命）則不在此列。此單位在戰略地圖上亦對普通傷害法術與效果免疫，永不受其傷害。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 700 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a fierce behemoth - one of the strongest creatures that can be summoned to Arcanus and Myrror. The behemoth has 25 melee strength, +2 to hit, 9 defense, 10 resistance, 45 hit points, and a movement speed of 2.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：700 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一頭兇猛的巨獸——阿坎努斯與米羅中可召喚的最強生物之一。巨獸有近戰 25、命中 +2、防禦 9、抗性 10、生命 45，移動速度為 2。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes all enemy creatures to lose one point from their movement speed. If a creature's movement speed is zero, it cannot attack or move the rest of combat; but it can still strike back if attacked.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
使所有敵方生物的移動速度各減少 1 點。若生物的移動速度降至零，則在本場戰鬥剩餘時間內無法攻擊或移動，但若遭受攻擊仍可反擊。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Reveals all lands, cities and non- invisible creatures on both Arcanus and Myrror!
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：800 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
揭露阿坎努斯與米羅上所有的地形、城市及非隱形生物！

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Calls a powerful electrical storm from which deadly lightning bolts issue. Three to five armor piercing lightning bolts of strength 8 strike random enemy units at the beginning of every turn until the end of combat.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
呼喚強力電磁風暴，釋放致命閃電。每個回合開始時，三到五道強度 8 的穿甲閃電擊中隨機敵方單位，直至戰鬥結束。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 17 mana/turn
Summons an awe-inspiring colossus - a rock-wielding fighting machine immune to all forms of Poison and Stoning. It has an attack strength of 20, +3 to hit, 10 defense, 15 resistance, 30 hit points, and a speed of 2. It can make 2 ranged boulder attacks per battle, and has the First Strike ability, allowing it to inflict damage before the opponent when attacking. The colossus is also a Wall Crusher, granting it a chance to destroy sections of city walls with its attacks.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：800 法力
維護：17 法力/回合
召喚一尊令人嘆為觀止的巨像——一台揮舞巨石、對所有毒素與石化效果完全免疫的戰鬥機器。攻擊強度 20、命中 +3、防禦 10、抗性 15、生命 30，速度為 2。每場戰鬥可發動 2 次遠程巨石攻擊，並具備「先手攻擊」能力，使其攻擊時可在對手之前造成傷害。巨像亦是「碎牆者」，攻擊時有機會摧毀城牆段。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Creates a teleporting device within a target city. Friendly units can teleport between any two of the casting wizard's cities equipped with earth gates, for the cost of one movement point.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：友方城市
施法花費：250 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在目標城市內建造一個傳送裝置。友方單位可在施法巫師旗下任意兩座裝有地界之門的城市之間傳送，費用為 1 點移動力。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Completely heals all of a wizard's damaged units every game turn.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
每個遊戲回合，完整治癒巫師旗下所有受損單位。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Summons a gigantic, poisonous, tunneling land wyrm. For all its bulk a great wyrm, with its ability to tunnel underground, is frighteningly fast on the battlefield. It has 25 melee strength, +3 to hit, 12 defense, 12 resistance, and 45 hit points, as well as a strength 15 Poison Touch attack. The great wyrm has a speed of 3, and can instantly move up to 10 tiles away for the cost of only a single movement point.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：20 法力/回合
召喚一頭巨型毒性穿地陸上蠕龍。儘管體型龐大，大蠕龍憑藉地下穿行能力，在戰場上快得令人生畏。有近戰 25、命中 +3、防禦 12、抗性 12、生命 45，以及強度 15 的「毒素觸碰」攻擊。大蠕龍移動速度為 3，且可僅消耗 1 點移動力瞬間移動至最遠 10 格之外。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1250 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
For every non-combat death or chaos spell cast by a rival wizard, all of their cities suffer tremors similar to the Earthquake spell. Each non-flying, corporeal unit has a 15% chance of dying and each building a 5% chance of collapsing. However, buildings that are replaced- or required by a still standing structure are exempt from this effect.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：1250 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
每當敵對巫師施放一個非戰鬥死亡或混沌法術，其所有城市都會遭受類似地震法術的震顫。每個非飛行有形單位有 15% 的機率死亡，每棟建築有 5% 的機率倒塌。但可替換的建築，以及被另一棟仍屹立的建築所依賴的建築，均不受此效果影響。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 5/25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Adds 5 to all resistance rolls versus magic. This includes effectively every resistance roll in the game, with the sole exception of those made against Poison.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：5/25 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
對所有魔法的抗性判定各加 5。幾乎涵蓋遊戲中所有抗性判定，唯一例外是對毒素的抗性判定。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
A stronger version of the arcane Dispel Magic. On friendly units, it will target all curses, while on enemies it will attempt to remove enchantments instead. Each target effect is rolled for individually. Assuming no other modifiers, the percent chance of a successful dispel is 100 x (dispel strength) / (dispel strength + target cost), where the dispel strength is three times the total mana spent on Dispel Magic True, including the initial 10.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：地圖格
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
奧術「驅散魔法」的強化版本。對友方單位，它將針對所有詛咒；對敵方單位，則嘗試移除結界。每個目標效果分別進行判定。假設無其他加成，成功驅散的機率為 100 × (驅散強度) / (驅散強度 + 目標花費)，其中驅散強度為投入「真驅散魔法」的總法力三倍（含初始 10 點）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: ocean or shore map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Summons an apparently solid cloud to any visible ocean map square of a wizard's choice. This thick body of vapors can carry up to eight units across water and moves at a speed of two map squares/turn. The floating island has no combat capabilities, instead allowing any units carried by it to participate in water battles regardless of their movement types, albeit ground units are incapable of actually moving off the island during combat.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：海洋或海岸地圖格
施法花費：50 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在巫師選擇的任意可見海洋地圖格上召喚一片看似堅實的雲島。這團厚重雲氣可承載最多八個單位渡海，移動速度為每回合兩個地圖格。浮島無戰鬥能力，但可讓其上攜帶的任何單位參與海上戰鬥，無論其移動類型——不過陸地單位在戰鬥中無法實際離開浮島。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10/50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Surrounds the unit with a magically protective wall of air, making it almost totally immune to arrow and sling attacks.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：10/50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
以魔法氣牆環繞該單位，使其幾乎對弓箭和投石攻擊完全免疫。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: unoccupied map square
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a group of six illusory phantom warriors and binds them to the will of the wizard. The phantoms are Non-Corporeal, and attack with Illusory weapons that completely ignore the effects of armor. They have 3 melee strength, 0 defense, 6 resistance, and 1 hit point each, are impervious to Poison, Stoning, and most Death magic, and move with a speed of 1. When combat ends, the phantom warriors disappear.
zh:
效果：戰鬥召喚
目標：空置地圖格
施法花費：10 法力
維護：無
召喚六名幻影戰士，並使其服從巫師意志。幻影為非實體存在，使用幻象武器攻擊，完全無視護甲效果。每名各有近戰 3、防禦 0、抗性 6、生命 1，對毒素、石化及大多數死亡魔法免疫，移動速度為 1。戰鬥結束後，幻影戰士消失。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to disorient a target unit. A confused unit does not recover (unless disenchanted) until after combat ends. Every turn the confused unit randomly does one of the following: stand around and do nothing, move randomly, attack allies, or attack enemies.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
嘗試使目標單位陷入混亂。混亂的單位在戰鬥結束前無法恢復（除非被解除結界）。每個回合，混亂單位會隨機執行下列其中一種行為：原地不動、隨機移動、攻擊友方或攻擊敵方。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one friendly unit
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Transports a target friendly unit back to a wizard's summoning circle. If there is no space in the city for the recalled unit, one of the units already occupying the city square is displaced to a neighboring land square.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：一個友方單位
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
將目標友方單位傳送回巫師的召喚圈所在地。若城市中無空間容納被召回的單位，原本佔據該城市格的一個單位將被移至相鄰陸地格。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Creates a reserve of counter magic power which resists all spells cast by the opponent as if you had cast an equally-strong dispel magic. The counter percent chance equals 100 x remaining strength / (remaining strength + target spell cost). Each spell casting attempt by the opposing wizard or their forces reduces the strength of the counter magic reserve by five mana.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
建立一道反制魔法儲備，以等效驅散魔法的方式抵抗對手施放的所有法術。反制成功的機率為 100 × 剩餘強度 / (剩餘強度 + 目標法術花費)。對方巫師或其部隊每次嘗試施法，反制魔法儲備的強度就會減少 5 點法力。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Summons a pair of trident-wielding nagas. These swimming creatures spit poison at their foes during combat. Nagas have 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 7 resistance, and 6 hit points each. They move with a speed of 1, and their Poison Touch has a strength of 4. Nagas also possess the First Strike ability, allowing them to deal melee (and poison) damage before the opponent, but only if they initiate the attack, not when counter attacking.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：100 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
召喚一對持三叉戟的娜迦。這些水中生物在戰鬥中會向敵人噴吐毒液。娜迦各有近戰 4、命中 +1、防禦 3、抗性 7、生命 6，移動速度為 1，「毒素觸碰」強度為 4。娜迦亦具備「先手攻擊」能力，主動發起攻擊時可先於對手造成近戰（及毒素）傷害，但反擊時不具此效果。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Targets a unit with an intensely damaging stream of mental energy. This strength 5 illusionary attack can be increased in strength by one per every two extra mana points spent on the spell, and ignores the target's armor unless it is immune to Illusions - in which case it can defend against the blast as normal.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
以強烈的精神能量衝擊目標單位。此強度 5 的幻象攻擊每額外投入 2 點法力可提升 1 點強度，並無視目標護甲——但若目標對幻術免疫，則可正常抵禦此衝擊。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana 
Upkeep: none
Blurs the outline of all friendly units making them more difficult to hit. There is a 10% chance that each point of attack damage done to these units will miss instead. This effect applies only against attacks made by other units however, and is ignored by spell effects entirely.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
模糊所有友方單位的輪廓，使其更難被命中。對這些單位造成的每 1 點攻擊傷害各有 10% 的機率落空。但此效果僅對其他單位的攻擊有效，法術效果完全無視此加成。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50+ mana
Upkeep: none
A much stronger version of Disenchant Area, this spell targets every opposing enchantment on a map square or battlefield, although casting it in combat can only suppress city enchantments for the duration of the battle, and will not remove them entirely. Assuming no other modifiers, the percent chance of a successful dispel is 100 x (dispel strength) / (dispel strength + target cost), where the dispel strength is three times the total mana spent on Disenchant True, including the initial 50.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50+ 法力
維護：無
「解除結界範圍」的大幅強化版本，針對地圖格或戰場上所有敵方結界——但在戰鬥中施放時，僅能壓制城市結界的效果直至戰鬥結束，而非將其完全移除。假設無其他加成，成功驅散的機率為 100 × (驅散強度) / (驅散強度 + 目標花費)，其中驅散強度為投入「真解除結界」的總法力三倍（含初始 50 點）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: none
If a targeted unit fails to resist, it suffers a penalty to hit of 2 (i.e., it has a -20% chance to hit) and has more trouble defending than usual (lose 1 shield).
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 25 法力
維護: 無
若目標單位抗性檢定失敗，其命中值降低 2（即命中率 -20%），且防禦能力亦下降（失去 1 點護盾）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 20/100 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Prevents a target unit's positive enchantments from being dispelled. If the target unit is a summoned creature, spell lock also protects the bonds that tie it to the controlling wizard. Spell lock must be dispelled (resistance of 150) before any further enchantments can be removed from the creature or unit.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 20/100 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
防止目標單位身上的正面結界遭到解除。若目標為召喚生物，法術封鎖同時保護其與施控巫師之間的羈絆。在移除該生物或單位的其他結界之前，必須先解除法術封鎖（抗性 150）。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: 5 x 5 map area
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: none
Makes all roads within two map squares of the targeted area cost no movement points to travel over for non-flying, corporeal units. Note that all roads on Myrror are automatically enchanted.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 5 x 5 地圖區域
施法花費: 100 法力
維護: 無
使目標區域兩格範圍內的所有道路對非飛行實體單位不耗費移動力。注意米洛爾位面上的所有道路皆自動附有此結界。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 25/ 125 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Bestows the power of flight upon a target unit.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 25/125 法力
維護: 3 法力/回合
賦予目標單位飛行能力。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Doubles the speed of all ships and floating islands controlled by a wizard, and halves the speed of all others.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 400 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
使施法巫師控制的所有船艦及浮空島嶼速度加倍，並使其他所有船艦及浮空島嶼速度減半。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: opponent wizard
Casting Cost: 50+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to counter an enemy wizard's spell as it is being cast. When spell blast takes effect, a wizard must expend as much of his or her own magic power (from mana reserves) as the enemy wizard has spent on the opposing spell to blast that spell out of existence. If a wizard does not have enough mana to match his target, spell blast fails.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 對手巫師
施法花費: 50+ 法力
維護: 無
嘗試在敵方巫師施法當下將其法術反制。法術爆破生效時，施法者必須消耗與敵方巫師施於該法術同等數量的魔力（從法力儲備中扣除），方能將敵方法術摧毀。若施法者法力不足以匹配目標，法術爆破失敗。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Hoodwinks all enemy wizards into liking the casting wizard. Each turn the spell is in effect, relations are shifted by +1 diplomatic point on a scale of -100 to +100; in addition to a one-time boost of +10 upon successfully casting the spell.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 400 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
迷惑所有敵方巫師，使其對施法巫師產生好感。法術生效期間，每回合在 -100 至 +100 的外交分數尺度上提升 +1 點；另外成功施法時一次性額外獲得 +10 點。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: unoccupied map square
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an illusory phantom beast. A beast only appears if there are fewer than nine units already fighting for the wizard. The phantom beast is immune to Poison, Stoning, and most forms of Death magic, but disappears when combat ends. It has 18 melee strength, +1 to hit, 0 defense, 8 resistance, 20 hit points, and a movement speed of 2. It is also Non-Corporeal, and its attacks ignore armor entirely unless the target possesses Illusions Immunity.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥召喚
目標: 空置地圖格
施法花費: 35 法力
維護: 無
召喚一隻幻象野獸。僅當巫師已在場單位少於九支時方可召喚。幻象野獸免疫毒素、石化以及大多數死亡魔法，戰鬥結束後消散。其近戰強度 18、命中 +1、防禦 0、抗性 8、生命 20、移動 2。幻象野獸亦為非實體，其攻擊完全無視護甲，除非目標具有幻象免疫。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: one global enchantment
Casting Cost: 200+ mana
Upkeep: none
Equivalent to a very strong version of the arcane magic Disjunction, with triple the dispel strength. Assuming no other modifiers, the percent chance of a successful dispel is 100 x (dispel strength) / (dispel strength + target cost), where the dispel strength is three times the total mana spent on Disjunction True, including the initial 200. Reducing the casting cost of this spell will not reduce its effectiveness, and instead allows for a higher strength for the same amount of mana.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 一個全域結界
施法花費: 200+ 法力
維護: 無
等同於奧術魔法「解除」的強化版，解除強度為三倍。在無其他修正的前提下，成功解除的百分比機率為 100 x（解除強度）/（解除強度 + 目標花費），其中解除強度為「真・解除」所投入法力總量（含初始 200）的三倍。降低此法術的施法花費不會削弱其效果，反而能以相同法力獲得更高的解除強度。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 35/175 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Renders the unit invisible to all units, except those Immune to Illusion and those that have True Sight. In combat, the unit becomes visible when adjacent to an enemy unit, but still penalizes the to hit roll of enemy units by -1.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 35/175 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
使該單位對所有單位隱形，幻象免疫及具有真視能力者除外。戰鬥中，當隱形單位與敵方單位相鄰時顯形，但仍對敵方單位的命中骰施加 -1 的懲罰。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Allows the enchanted unit and all units in its stack to fly (with a speed of 3) on the overland map. Does not work in combat.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 250 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
使受結界單位及其堆疊內所有單位在戰略地圖上以飛行方式移動（速度 3）。戰鬥中無效。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy fantastic unit
Casting Cost: 20+ mana
Upkeep: none
Destroys the magical bond that keeps a fantastic unit with its controlling magician. Each figure within the unit must resist at -3 or be returned whence they were summoned. Every additional 15 mana lowers the targets' resistance by one.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個敵方奇異單位
施法花費: 20+ 法力
維護: 無
摧毀維繫奇異單位與其控制魔法師之間的魔法羈絆。單位內每個個體必須以 -3 抗性進行抵抗，否則被遣返至其召喚之處。每額外投入 15 法力，目標抗性再降低 1 點。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Summons a lightning bolt-wielding storm giant that not only hurls vicious, Armor Piercing lightning bolts over long distances, but also uses them when fighting hand-to-hand - allowing enemies to only use half their defense. Storm giants have 12 melee strength, 10 ranged strength, +2 to hit, 7 defense, 9 resistance, 20 hit points, and a speed of 2. They can perform 4 magical ranged attacks per battle, and may destroy sections of city walls with their attacks.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 500 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
召喚一位手持閃電的風暴巨人。風暴巨人不僅能在遠距投擲兇猛的穿甲閃電，近身肉搏時同樣使用閃電攻擊——令敵方防禦減半。風暴巨人近戰強度 12、遠程強度 10、命中 +2、防禦 7、抗性 9、生命 20、速度 2。每場戰鬥可執行 4 次魔法遠程攻擊，且其攻擊可破壞城市城牆。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: unoccupied map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an invisible, flying air elemental during battle, so long as the wizard has fewer than nine units. The creature disappears when combat ends. Air elementals have 15 melee strength, +1 to hit, 8 defense, 9 resistance, 10 hit points, and a movement speed of 5. They are immune to Poison and Stoning, and have improved protection against mundane weapons.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥召喚
目標: 空置地圖格
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無
在戰鬥中召喚一個隱形的飛行風元素，前提是巫師在場單位少於九支。戰鬥結束後消散。風元素近戰強度 15、命中 +1、防禦 8、抗性 9、生命 10、移動 5。免疫毒素與石化，對凡俗武器具有額外防護。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes intense mental anguish to the creature(s) in a target enemy unit. Unable to concentrate, the creatures automatically (with no chance to resist) lose 5 to all of their melee, thrown and ranged attack strengths, defense and resistance. This spell does not affect units that have Immunity to Illusions.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 35 法力
維護: 無
對目標敵方單位內的生物造成劇烈精神痛苦。生物無法集中注意力，自動（無抗性機會）失去 5 點近戰、投擲及遠程攻擊強度、防禦與抗性。此法術對具有幻象免疫的單位無效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one map square
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: none
Paralyzes all enemy units in a target map square for a minimum of one turn. After the first turn a unit passes in stasis, it has one opportunity per turn to free itself by successfully resisting (at a penalty of 5 to resistance) the stasis field.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個地圖格
施法花費: 250 法力
維護: 無
使目標地圖格內所有敵方單位陷入麻痺，至少持續一回合。在靜止場中度過第一回合後，每回合可獲得一次機會，以 -5 抗性懲罰進行抵抗來解除靜止場。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50/250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Makes a target unit completely immune to all magic spells and effects that target a unit or inflict spell damage. It also gives the unit a defense score of 50 against breath- and magical ranged attacks.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 50/250 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
使目標單位對所有以單位為目標或造成法術傷害的魔法法術與效果完全免疫。同時賦予該單位對吐息及魔法遠程攻擊 50 點防禦值。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Doubles the movement (speed) and number of attacks (both melee and ranged) of a target unit. The target unit becomes so fast that it even counterattacks (when defending during melee combat) twice.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無
使目標單位的移動（速度）及攻擊次數（近戰與遠程均計）加倍。目標單位速度極快，在近戰防禦時甚至可以反擊兩次。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 650 mana
Upkeep: 17 mana/turn
Summons a djinn. This powerful, flying being can hurl ranged magic attacks at its opponents and is capable of casting up to 20 spell points of sorcery magic during every combat. It has 15 melee strength, 8 ranged strength, +3 to hit, 8 defense, 10 resistance, 20 hit points, and a movement speed of 3. It can also Teleport up to 10 tiles per movement point spent in battle, and possesses the Wind Walking ability, allowing it to carry up to 8 other units in the air overland.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 650 法力
維護: 17 法力/回合
召喚一個靈怪。這個強大的飛行存在能向對手投擲魔法遠程攻擊，並可在每場戰鬥中施放多達 20 點的巫術魔法。其近戰強度 15、遠程強度 8、命中 +3、防禦 8、抗性 10、生命 20、移動 3。靈怪還能在戰鬥中每消耗 1 移動力時傳送最多 10 格，並具有御風行走能力，可在戰略地圖上攜帶多達 8 支其他單位飛行。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Provides total immunity for the city from one specific realm of spells (including combat spells) and prohibits any fantastic creatures of that realm from entering the protected city. Caster must select which realm to ward against: chaos, death, life, nature, or sorcery.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 350 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
使城市對某一特定領域的法術（含戰鬥法術）完全免疫，並禁止該領域的奇異生物進入受保護的城市。施法者須選擇防護領域：混沌、死亡、生命、自然或巫術。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy fantastic unit
Casting Cost: 70 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to alter the allegiance of a fantastic (i.e., summoned) creature. If a target creature fails to resist the spell (at a penalty of 2 to its resistance), it is bound to fight for the casting wizard until the end of combat (or until disenchanted). The bound creature disappears after combat ends.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方奇異單位
施法花費: 70 法力
維護: 無
嘗試改變一個奇異（即召喚）生物的陣營。若目標生物以 -2 抗性懲罰抵抗失敗，則被束縛為施法巫師作戰直至戰鬥結束（或被解除）。被束縛的生物在戰鬥結束後消散。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 80 mana
Upkeep: none
Makes all friendly units invisible to their opponents. While invisible, the units cannot be targeted by ranged weapons and all melee attacks against them suffer a penalty to hit of one (i.e., -10% chance to hit).
zh:
效果: 戰鬥結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 80 法力
維護: 無
使所有友方單位對敵方隱形。隱形期間，這些單位無法被遠程武器鎖定，且所有針對它們的近戰攻擊命中懲罰 -1（即命中率 -10%）。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: none
Tries to banish all fantastic creatures (including those bound to the casting wizard) from both Arcanus and Myrror! Creatures suffer a penalty of 2 to their resistance when attempting to oppose this spell.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 無
嘗試將阿卡努斯與米洛爾兩個位面上的所有奇異生物（包括受施法巫師束縛者）全部放逐！生物在嘗試抵抗此法術時承受 -2 抗性懲罰。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one global enchantment
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: as for target enchantment
Steals a global enchantment from another wizard. The stolen global spell becomes the property of the casting wizard in terms of maintenance and control.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 一個全域結界
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 與目標結界相同
從另一名巫師處竊取一個全域結界。被竊取的全域法術在維護與控制方面均歸施法巫師所有。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 25 mana/turn
Suspends a city far above the earth. Only flying units may enter (or attack) and leave this 'city in the clouds.' The wizard's own foot troops may enter and exit the city overland; during combat, once a foot troop (non-flying unit) leaves the floating city it cannot re-enter until the battle is over.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 500 法力
維護: 25 法力/回合
將一座城市懸浮至高空之上。只有飛行單位才能進入（或攻擊）和離開這座「雲端之城」。巫師自己的步兵部隊可在戰略地圖上進出該城市；在戰鬥中，一旦步兵（非飛行單位）離開浮空城市，戰鬥結束前便無法重新進入。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 25 mana/turn
Summons a fierce, lightning-breathing wind dragon. The powerful sky drake is immune to Magic and Illusions. Its lightning breath can easily vaporize most opponents. It has an attack strength of 20, +3 to hit, 10 defense, 14 resistance, and 25 hit points. The sky drake flies at a speed of 4, and its breath attack is armor piercing, so enemies can only use half of their defense against it.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 25 法力/回合
召喚一條兇猛的吐雷風龍。強大的天空惡龍免疫魔法與幻象。其閃電吐息可輕易蒸發大多數對手。攻擊強度 20、命中 +3、防禦 10、抗性 14、生命 25。天空惡龍飛行速度 4，其吐息攻擊具有穿甲效果，敵方防禦僅能發揮一半。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1250 mana
Upkeep: 50 mana/turn
All overland spells not cast by caster must overcome a 500 mana strength dispel or be eliminated.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1250 法力
維護: 50 法力/回合
所有非施法者本人施放的戰略地圖法術，必須克服強度 500 法力的解除，否則立即消散。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1500 mana
Upkeep: 200 mana/turn
Stops the passage of time for all enemy wizards and their troops and spells. Only the casting wizard may move units. He or she must pay maintenance on this spell, but only on this spell.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1500 法力
維護: 200 法力/回合
使所有敵方巫師及其軍隊與法術的時間靜止。只有施法巫師可以移動單位。施法者須為此法術支付維護費用，但僅此法術需要維護。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one missile-armed enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
Immediately twists and destroys all missile ammunition of a target normal unit, removing that unit's ability to attack at range. There is no way to prevent the effect of this spell. Ranged boulder or magical attack ammunition is not affected.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個持有飛彈武器的敵方單位
施法花費: 10 法力
維護: 無
立即扭曲並摧毀目標普通單位的所有飛彈彈藥，使該單位喪失遠程攻擊能力。此法術的效果無從阻止。巨石遠程攻擊或魔法攻擊彈藥不受影響。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one wall section
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Destroys one section of stone wall, clearing a way for troops to pass through.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一段城牆
施法花費: 15 法力
維護: 無
摧毀一段石牆，為部隊開闢通道。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 5+ mana
Upkeep: none
Shoots a bolt of intense flames at a target unit, striking as a 5 strength magical fire attack, +1 point of strength per additional mana spent.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 5+ 法力
維護: 無
向目標單位射出一道熾烈火焰，造成強度 5 的魔法火焰攻擊，每額外投入 1 法力增加 1 點強度。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons and binds a wild pack of four fire-breathing hell hounds to the will of the wizard. The hounds have 3 attack strength (both melee and breath), +1 to hit, 2 defense, 6 resistance, and 4 hit points each. They move with a speed of 2.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 40 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
召喚並束縛一群四隻會吐火的地獄獵犬，使其服從巫師意志。獵犬近戰與吐息攻擊強度各 3、命中 +1、防禦 2、抗性 6、生命 4。移動速度 2。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Desecrates the target land square. Corrupted lands produce no food or minerals, and can only be restored to production by the prayers of clerics or shamans.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 地圖格
施法花費: 40 法力
維護: 無
褻瀆目標地塊。腐化之地不再產出食物或礦物，只能藉由祭司或薩滿的祈禱恢復生產。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 15/75 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Imbues the target unit's weapons with a powerful chaotic spirit. These weapons are harder to defend against (an opponent's ability to defend decreases by 10%) and can effectively hit creatures with weapon immunity. Effects are cumulative with Flame Blade, but only work on melee-, thrown-, and ranged missile attacks, excluding all others.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 15/75 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
將強大的混沌靈魂注入目標單位的武器。這些武器更難防禦（對手防禦能力降低 10%），且能有效命中具有武器免疫的生物。效果與火焰刀鋒可疊加，但僅適用於近戰、投擲及飛彈遠程攻擊，不含其他類型。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 30/150 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Encircles a city with a protective wall of flames. Each figure of any non-flying unit that attempts to pass through suffers a 5 strength magical fire attack. Ranged attacks are not affected.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 30/150 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
以防護火焰牆環繞城市。任何試圖穿越的非飛行單位的每個個體均受到強度 5 的魔法火焰攻擊。遠程攻擊不受影響。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy normal unit
Casting Cost: 12 mana
Upkeep: none
A target unit receives one resistance roll to ignore Shatter's effects; if it is unsuccessful, all of the unit's melee, thrown, and missile attack strengths decrease to one.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方普通單位
施法花費: 12 法力
維護: 無
目標單位可進行一次抗性骰以忽略碎裂的效果；若抵抗失敗，該單位所有近戰、投擲及飛彈攻擊強度降至 1。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy normal unit
Casting Cost: 18 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to mutate all creatures within a target unit. Target creatures suffer a penalty of one to their resistance when trying to withstand being warped. Mutated or warped creatures suffer one of the following degenerative changes: half strength attacks, half strength defense, or no magic resistance.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方普通單位
施法花費: 18 法力
維護: 無
嘗試突變目標單位內所有生物。目標生物在抵抗扭曲時承受 -1 抗性懲罰。突變或遭扭曲的生物將承受以下退化之一：攻擊強度減半、防禦強度減半，或喪失魔法抗性。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: unoccupied map square
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a fire elemental to do battle for the wizard. The creature has 12 melee strength, 4 defense, 6 resistance, 10 hit points, and a movement speed of 1; and is impervious to Poison, Stoning, and Fire. Once combat ends, the fire elemental returns to the plane of chaos.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥召喚
目標: 空置地圖格
施法花費: 20 法力
維護: 無
召喚一個火元素為巫師作戰。該生物近戰強度 12、防禦 4、抗性 6、生命 10、移動 1；對毒素、石化與火焰完全免疫。戰鬥結束後，火元素返回混沌位面。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Shoots a bolt of intense electricity at the target unit, striking as a strength 5 armor-piercing magical attack, +1 strength per additional mana spent.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 10+ 法力
維護: 無
向目標單位射出一道強烈電流，造成強度 5 的穿甲魔法攻擊，每額外投入 1 法力增加 1 點強度。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons a fire giant and binds it to the will of the wizard. The fire giant has 10 attack strength, +1 to hit, 5 defense, 7 resistance, 15 hit points, and a speed of 2. It possesses the Mountaineer trait, allowing it and any units stacked with it to move over hills and mountains for a cost of only 1 movement point per tile. Fire giants are impervious to Fire, can make 2 ranged boulder attacks in every battle, and their attacks may destroy sections of city walls during combat.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 150 法力
維護: 3 法力/回合
召喚一個火焰巨人並使其服從巫師意志。火焰巨人攻擊強度 10、命中 +1、防禦 5、抗性 7、生命 15、速度 2。其具有登山者特性，使其及同堆疊的單位穿越丘陵與山地時每格僅消耗 1 移動力。火焰巨人對火焰完全免疫，每場戰鬥可進行 2 次巨石遠程攻擊，且其攻擊可在戰鬥中破壞城市城牆。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Transforms the target into a creature of chaos. Target unit receives one of following mutations: demon-skin armor (+3 defense), demon wings (2 speed flight), or fire-breathing (2 strength fiery breath). Once affected by this spell, the creature can never be Chaos Channeled again.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 25/125 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Causes the weapons of a target unit to burst into flames, increasing the strength of melee, thrown, and missile attacks of the unit by 2. Flame Blades also allow units to hit creatures which have weapon immunity, and exerts cumulative effects with Eldritch Weapon.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 25/125 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 200 mana

Summons four flying gargoyles. Gargoyles are extremely difficult to damage, as one might expect flying chunks of masonry to be, and exhibit immunity to Stoning and Poison attacks. They have 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 8 defense, 7 resistance, and 4 hit points each, and move with a speed of 2.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 15+ mana
Upkeep: none

效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 15+ 法力

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a

zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無

維護: 8 法力/回合

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Raises a volcano, destroying any food and minerals provided by a target map square (oceans, shores, rivers, and nodes may not be targeted). The volcano provides 1 magic power each turn to the caster. If this spell is cast on a city, each building has a 15 % chance of collapsing.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 地圖格
施法花費: 200 法力
維護: 無

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30/150 mana

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn

zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無

source:

Target: one enemy unit

source:

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana

效果: 召喚
目標: 無

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Calls forth the awesome power of chaos to strike the target enemy unit for 10 points of damage, regardless of the unit's defenses (although Magic Immunity and Righteousness will still prevent this damage).

施法花費: 40 法力

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none

Any unit in the path of the vortex takes 5 hits regardless of defense, although Magic Immunity and Righteousness will still prevent this damage. In addition, each time the vortex moves, adjacent units have a 33% chance of being struck by strength 5 armor-piercing lightning bolts. A magic vortex does terrible damage to a city that it moves through.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥召喚
目標: 地圖格
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 550 mana

zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 550 法力
維護: 15 法力/回合

source:

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana

目標: 無
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無
扭曲現實的本質，迷亂單位的感知。所有非混沌單位，無論敵我，命中機率均下降 -2。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none

維護: 無
對每支敵方單位的所有模型發動強度 15 的魔法火焰攻擊。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn

Each turn, units inside the city sustain five strength 8 armor-piercing Lightning Bolt attacks, and there is a 5% chance for each building to be destroyed. Replaced buildings, as well as those required by a still standing one are exempt from this effect however.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 敵方城市
施法花費: 300 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
在敵方城市上空開啟巨大的魔法漩渦。每個回合，城市內的單位承受五次強度 8 的穿甲閃電攻擊，且每棟建築有 5% 的機率被摧毀。已重建的建築以及仍存在建築所必需的前置建築不受此效果影響。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 650 mana
Upkeep: 14 mana/turn
Summons a nine-headed hydra. Each fire-breathing head on this monstrous creature can regenerate during and after combat. They individually have 6 melee strength, 5 breath strength, +1 to hit, 4 defense, 11 resistance, and 10 hit points. The hydra has a movement speed of 1.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 650 法力
維護: 14 法力/回合
召喚一隻九頭九頭蛇。這頭怪物的每個噴火頭在戰鬥中及戰鬥後均可再生。每顆頭各有 6 近戰強度、5 噴息強度、+1 命中、4 防禦、11 抗性及 10 生命。九頭蛇的移動速度為 1。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana

效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無
若目標的抗性低於 10，則立即且永久地被消滅。已被瓦解的單位無任何方式可以恢復。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Rains down fiery hail upon both planes, striking all creatures outside cities with a strength 4 magical fire attack, and erasing all outposts from the map. Buildings within cities may also be destroyed (1% chance each turn per building, although replaced structures and those required by another, still standing building are exempt). The casting wizard's outposts and cities are immune to the effects, but their units are not.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 900 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
在兩個位面降下熾熱的冰雹，對城市外的所有生物發動強度 4 的魔法火焰攻擊，並抹去地圖上所有前哨站。城市內的建築也可能被摧毀（每棟建築每回合有 1% 的機率，已重建的建築及仍存在建築所需的前置建築除外）。施法巫師的前哨站與城市免疫此效果，但其麾下單位不免疫。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Once this enchantment has been cast, the entire world begins to slowly be corrupted. Each turn 3-6 map squares are withered as per the spell Corruption. Unrest in all cities increases by 2. The caster's cities and surrounding areas are, of course, exempt.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 20 法力/回合
此結界施放後，整個世界開始緩慢腐化。每個回合有 3–6 個地圖格依照「腐化」法術的方式枯萎凋零。所有城市的動亂增加 2。施法者的城市及周邊地區當然不受影響。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: none
Strikes every enemy unit with a random effect from the following list: Nothing, Healing, Chaos Channels, Warp Creature, Fire Bolt (15 strength), Warp Lightning, Doom Bolt, or Disintegrate. Note some of these effects can actually be beneficial to the target unit.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 無
施法花費: 75 法力
維護: 無
對每支敵方單位施加下列隨機效果之一：無效果、治療、混沌通道、扭曲生物、火焰箭（強度 15）、扭曲閃電、厄運箭或瓦解。注意，其中某些效果對目標單位實際上是有益的。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 40 mana/turn
All creatures of chaos, regardless of allegiance, have 2 added to all of their non-spell conventional attack strengths. This affects melee-, thrown-, breath-, missile-, boulder-, and magical ranged attacks, as well as Doom Gaze. Multiple instances of this spell are not cumulative.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 40 法力/回合
所有混沌生物，無論陣營，所有非法術的常規攻擊強度均增加 2。此效果涵蓋近戰、投擲、噴息、射擊、投石及魔法遠程攻擊，以及厄運凝視。此法術不可重複疊加。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1100 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana /turn
All newly created normal units controlled by the casting wizard are mutated by the effects of chaos, the same as if Chaos Channels had been cast on them - granting either +3 defense, speed 2 flight, or a strength 2 fire breath, and turning them into creatures of the Chaos realm.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1100 法力
維護: 15 法力/回合
施法巫師新招募的所有普通單位均受混沌力量突變，效果等同於對其施放「混沌通道」——賦予 +3 防禦、速度 2 的飛行，或強度 2 的火焰噴息其中之一，並使其轉化為混沌領域的生物。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 30 mana/turn
Summons an avenging fire-breathing dragon from the depths of chaos. The flames spewing from a great drake's jaws are so hot that weak opponents may be incinerated before ever getting a chance to fight back. The drake has 30 attack strength (both melee and breath), +3 to hit, 10 defense, 12 resistance, and 30 hit points. It flies with a speed of 2.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 900 法力
維護: 30 法力/回合
從混沌深處召喚一條復仇的噴火巨龍。大翼龍口中噴湧的火焰熾熱無比，脆弱的對手甚至還沒來得及還手便已化為灰燼。大翼龍擁有 30 攻擊強度（近戰與噴息皆是）、+3 命中、10 防禦、12 抗性及 30 生命。飛行速度為 2。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: none
Every building in the target city has a 50% chance to be destroyed, every 1000 townsfolk above the first have a 50% chance of being lost, and each unit inside the city takes 10 points of damage regardless of defense (only Magic Immunity and Righteousness can prevent this). The amount of pure chaos being released also corrupts the surrounding area (50% chance per tile). If the target is an outpost, it is immediately removed from the map. Replaced buildings and those required by still standing ones are exempt from the destruction.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 敵方城市
施法花費: 500 法力
維護: 無

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
