Unrest in all cities increases by 3. The caster's cities and surrounding areas are, of course, exempt from both effects.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1250 法力
維護: 40 法力/回合
開始摧毀整個世界，火山接連噴發，蹂躪兩個世界的土地。如同「升起火山」，施法巫師每創造一座新火山便獲得 1 點魔力。所有城市的動亂增加 3。施法者的城市及周邊地區當然不受兩種效果影響。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 5/25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Adds 3 to the target unit's defense and resistance against all death or chaos related spells and attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms: Dark Elves (except Priests), Draconians, Dragon Turtles, Magicians, Nightmares, Stag Beetles, Warlocks, Sky Drakes, Storm Giants, and the Chaos Warrior, Draconian, Necromancer, and Warlock heroes.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 5/25 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
目標單位對所有死亡或混沌相關法術與攻擊的防禦及抗性各增加 3——包括某些雖非直接歸屬這些領域、但具有噴息及魔法遠程攻擊的單位：黑暗精靈（祭司除外）、龍蜥人、龍龜、法師、夢魘、鍬形蟲、術士、天空龍、風暴巨人，以及混沌戰士、龍蜥人、死靈法師和術士英雄。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one chaos or death unit
Casting Cost: 5 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes a holy blaze of burning light from the stars (strength 15 magic attack) to fall upon a target chaos or death unit (no other creatures can be affected).
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個混沌或死亡單位
施法花費: 5 法力
維護: 無
召喚星辰的神聖烈焰（強度 15 的魔法攻擊）降落在目標混沌或死亡單位身上（其他生物不受影響）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Fills the target unit with a holy purpose and increases the target unit's movement speed by one.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 30 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
以神聖使命充盈目標單位，使其移動速度增加 1。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 10/50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Blesses the target's weapons, allowing them to hit creatures which are immune to non-magical attacks and giving a +1 to-hit bonus in combat.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 10/50 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
祝福目標的武器，使其能夠攻擊免疫非魔法攻擊的生物，並在戰鬥中獲得 +1 命中加成。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: non-death unit
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Heals up to 5 hits of damage taken by the target unit.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 非死亡單位
施法花費: 15 法力
維護: 無
治療目標單位最多 5 點已受到的傷害。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 18/90 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
The target unit's defense is increased by 2.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 18/90 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
目標單位的防禦增加 2。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Increases the fame of the casting wizard by 10 in addition to any other bonuses as long as the spell is in effect, and reduces unrest in all of their cities by 1.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 150 法力
維護: 3 法力/回合
在法術生效期間，施法巫師的聲望在其他加成之外額外增加 10，且其所有城市的動亂減少 1。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Basks the entire battlefield in rays of holy light, increasing the attack, defense, and resistance of all creatures of life by 1. At the same time, creatures of death lose 1 from their attack, defense, and resistance. True Light and Darkness negate the effects of one another.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 20 法力
維護: 無
以神聖光芒籠罩整個戰場，使所有生命生物的攻擊、防禦及抗性各增加 1。同時，死亡生物的攻擊、防禦及抗性各減少 1。「真實之光」與「黑暗」的效果互相抵消。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 80 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a Guardian Spirit that can meld with a node to focus its power and direct it to the controlling wizard. A guardian spirit has a 75% chance of destroying any spirit sent by other wizards to try and take over the node. As a unit, the spirit has 10 melee strength, 4 defense, 10 resistance, and 10 hit points. It is Non-Corporeal, has a movement speed of 1, and confers a resistance bonus of +1 to all friendly units during combat.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 80 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
召喚一個守護之靈，可與節點融合以聚焦其力量並引導至控制巫師。守護之靈有 75% 的機率摧毀其他巫師試圖奪取節點時派遣的靈體。作為單位，守護之靈擁有 10 近戰強度、4 防禦、10 抗性及 10 生命。它是非實體的，移動速度為 1，並在戰鬥中賦予所有友方單位 +1 抗性加成。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 20/100 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
An entire unit becomes elite. This spell is automatically dispelled when the unit becomes elite naturally.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個普通單位
施法花費: 20/100 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
整個單位晉升為精銳。當該單位自然晉升為精銳時，此法術自動解除。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 20/100 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Endows a target unit with the gift of Illusions Immunity, allowing it to spot and target invisible units, see through Wall of Darkness, defend normally against Illusion attacks, and be immune to the combat curses of the Sorcery realm.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 20/100 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
賦予目標單位幻象免疫，使其能發現並鎖定隱形單位、看穿黑暗之牆、正常防禦幻象攻擊，並免疫巫術領域的戰鬥詛咒。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one map square
Casting Cost: 125 mana
Upkeep: none
All friendly units within the target map square are transported to the other plane of existence. Attempting to transport into an area which cannot normally be entered by movement, or into combat, will cause the spell to fail.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 一個地圖格
施法花費: 125 法力
維護: 無
目標地圖格內的所有友方單位被傳送至另一個位面。若嘗試傳送至正常移動無法進入的區域或戰鬥中，法術將失敗。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: one dead hero
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: none
Resurrects a hero from the dead, regardless of the length of time he or she has been dead. The hero reappears at the wizard's summoning circle and is fully healed. If six other heroes have already been hired the spell fails.
zh:
效果: 即時
目標: 一個已死亡的英雄
施法花費: 250 法力
維護: 無
復活一名已死亡的英雄，無論其死亡時間長短。英雄將出現在巫師的召喚圓陣處並完全恢復。若已有六名其他英雄在職，法術失敗。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one chaos or death unit
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: none
Each chaos or death creature within the target group must resist at -4 or be destroyed by the holy fires. Created undead units suffer an additional -5 penalty.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個混沌或死亡單位
施法花費: 25 法力
維護: 無
目標群組內每個混沌或死亡生物必須以 -4 抗性進行抵抗，否則被神聖火焰摧毀。人工製造的不死生物額外承受 -5 的懲罰。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Closes the junctions between the planes, sealing Arcanus from Myrror. No unit can travel between the planes by Plane Shift, Planar Travel, Astral Gates or through towers of wizardry.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 500 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
封閉兩個位面之間的通道，將阿卡努斯與鏡界隔絕。任何單位均無法透過位面轉移、位面旅行、星界之門或巫師塔在兩個位面之間移動。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Calls a herd of four magic unicorns. These lovely creatures can teleport to any location on the battlefield and inspire their allies to with an increased ability to resist the effects of negative spells (+2 resistance during battles). Unicorns have 5 melee strength, +2 to hit, 3 defense, 7 resistance, and 6 hit points each. They are impervious to Poison, and possess a movement speed of 2.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 250 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
召喚一群四隻魔法獨角獸。這些美麗的生物可傳送至戰場上任意位置，並鼓舞友方提升抵抗負面法術的能力（戰鬥中 +2 抗性）。每隻獨角獸擁有 5 近戰強度、+2 命中、3 防禦、7 抗性及 6 生命。它們對毒素免疫，移動速度為 2。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one dead normal unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Raises a fallen unit from the dead. The unit returns with half its normal creatures / hit points. All enchantments cast on the unit are lost. The spell does not work on fantastic creatures.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 一個已死亡的普通單位
施法花費: 35 法力
維護: 無
將陣亡的單位從死亡中喚起。該單位以一半的模型數量及生命值復甦。原本施於該單位的所有結界皆消失。此法術對奇幻生物無效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Allows a target unit to shift between Arcanus and Myrror at will. Note that units may not move into 'illegal' terrain types or initiate combat by Planar Travel.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 150 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
允許目標單位在阿卡努斯與鏡界之間自由切換。注意，單位不得透過位面旅行進入「非法」地形或主動發起戰鬥。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Calls forth the light of the heavens to shower the city in holy light. Any combat taking place within the area of the city is treated as if True Light was in effect (Life creatures receive +1 attack, +1 defense, and +1 resistance, while Death units a penalized by -1 in these attributes).
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 150 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
呼喚天堂之光籠罩城市。城市範圍內發生的任何戰鬥均視同「真實之光」生效（生命生物的攻擊、防禦及抗性各 +1，死亡單位在這些屬性上各受 -1 懲罰）。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Adds 1 to all rolls by all friendly units, including resistance rolls, attacks to hit, and defense rolls.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 30 法力
維護: 無
所有友方單位的各類擲骰均獲得 +1，包括抗性擲骰、命中擲骰及防禦擲骰。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
Adds 3 to the target unit's attack strength, hits, and resistance. Does not affect breath- or ranged magical attacks.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 40/200 法力
維護: 4 法力/回合
目標單位的攻擊強度、生命及抗性各增加 3。不影響噴息或魔法遠程攻擊。

source:
Effects: Hero Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 12 mana/turn
Summons the Chosen to aid your cause - a mighty melee hero and expert leader who is immune to magic and missiles, and can cast spells from his own mana. There is only one Chosen for each wizard. If he is killed or disbanded and summoned again he retains all experience from his previous incarnations. However, he may not be summoned when already controlling 6 other heroes.
zh:
效果: 英雄召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 500 法力
維護: 12 法力/回合
召喚「天選之人」相助——一位強大的近戰英雄與卓越領袖，免疫魔法與飛彈攻擊，且能以自身法力施展法術。每位巫師只有唯一一位天選之人。若他戰死或被解散後重新召喚，將保留前世的所有經驗值。然而，當已有 6 名其他英雄在職時，無法召喚他。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Maintenance: 5 mana/turn
Target unit is resistant to damage from non-magical attacks (gains Weapon Immunity), and the first two hits sustained by the unit from any attack against which it could make a defense roll are ignored. This effect does not work against doom damage and resistable damage however (e.g. Poison, Life Steal).
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 40/200 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
目標單位對非魔法攻擊的傷害具有抗性（獲得武器免疫），且在任何可進行防禦擲骰的攻擊中，前兩次命中傷害被忽略。然而，此效果對厄運傷害及可抵抗傷害（例如毒素、生命吸取）無效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Maintenance: 2 mana/turn
Gives a target unit a tremendous sense of holy purpose, which calls so strongly upon the forces of life that they manifest themselves in the unit, providing it with complete immunity to all death and chaos magic that targets a unit or inflicts spell damage. In addition, the unit gains a defense of 50 against death and chaos related ranged and special attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 40/200 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
賦予目標單位強烈的神聖使命感，強力召喚生命之力在單位內具現，使其對所有以單位為目標或造成法術傷害的死亡及混沌魔法完全免疫。此外，該單位對死亡及混沌相關的遠程攻擊及特殊攻擊（包括某些雖非直接歸屬這些領域的單位的噴息及魔法遠程攻擊）獲得 50 防禦。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Increases the gold obtained from the target city by 100% as long as the enchantment is in effect.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 250 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
在結界生效期間，目標城市的金幣產出增加 100%。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
All units built in the target city are Elite.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 300 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
目標城市建造的所有單位均為精銳。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 550 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons an angel, that can enhance the fighting ability of friendly units (+1 to melee strength, defense, and resistance) and Dispels Evil with its touch. The Angel has 13 melee strength, +2 to hit, 7 defense, 8 resistance, and 15 hit points. It also possesses Illusions Immunity, and flies at a speed of 3.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 550 法力
維護: 15 法力/回合
召喚一位天使，可提升友方單位的戰鬥能力（近戰強度、防禦及抗性各 +1），並以觸碰驅逐邪惡。天使擁有 13 近戰強度、+2 命中、7 防禦、8 抗性及 15 生命。它同時具備幻象免疫，飛行速度為 3。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
Turns an ordinary friendly city into a fertile utopia. Population growth rates double and all units in the city heal completely at the end of every game turn. The citizens are so pleased that unrest completely disappears.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 300 法力
維護: 8 法力/回合
將普通友方城市轉變為富饒的樂土。人口成長速度翻倍，城市內所有單位在每個遊戲回合結束時完全恢復。市民生活如此滿足，動亂完全消失。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Heals all friendly units for 5 hit points (or less, if a unit has sustained fewer than 5 hit points of damage).
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 無
施法花費: 50 法力
維護: 無
治療所有友方單位 5 點生命（若某單位受到的傷害不足 5 點，則以實際傷害為準）。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to banish outright all fantastic and/or undead creatures (whether Animated or Black Channeled). Each figure within each enemy unit must resist this holy utterance separately (at a penalty of 2 to resistance). Undead have a much more difficult time resisting Holy Word than do other creatures.
zh:
效果: 即時戰鬥
目標: 無
施法花費: 60 法力
維護: 無
嘗試直接驅逐所有奇幻生物及/或不死生物（無論是動畫屍體還是黑暗通道者）。每支敵方單位內的每個模型必須個別抵抗這道神聖話語（抗性受 -2 懲罰）。不死生物比其他生物更難抵抗聖言。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Calls upon the forces of holiness and light to make all friendly units fight and defend exceptionally well; adding 1 to all of their rolls (including resistance rolls, attacks to hit, and defense rolls), and increasing their melee strength, defense, and resistance scores by 2. Not cumulative with Prayer.
zh:
效果: 戰鬥結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 60 法力
維護: 無
呼喚神聖與光明的力量，使所有友方單位的戰鬥與防禦表現卓越：所有擲骰（含抗性擲骰、命中擲骰及防禦擲骰）均 +1，且近戰強度、防禦及抗性各增加 2。不與「祈禱」疊加。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Instills a sense of greater purpose into the local citizenry; that city's production rate rises by 50%.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 350 法力
維護: 2 法力/回合
為當地市民注入更崇高的使命感，使該城市的生產速度提升 50%。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Generates a portal in a target city that allows travel to the other plane. This spell only works as long as the portal does not lead directly to another city on the other world. If the portal leads to stationed enemy troops, movement through the Astral Gate is blocked.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 350 法力
維護: 5 法力/回合
在目標城市生成一個傳送門，允許前往另一個位面。此法術僅在傳送門的出口不直接通往另一個位面的城市時有效。若傳送門通往駐紮的敵方部隊，則通過星界之門的移動將被封鎖。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
All normal units' weapons are blessed with a +1 bonus to hit and can strike creatures immune to non-magical attacks. Not cumulative with Holy Weapon, and will prevent it from being cast while in effect.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 900 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
所有普通單位的武器均受到祝福，獲得 +1 命中加成，並能攻擊免疫非魔法攻擊的生物。不與「聖化武器」疊加，且在生效期間將阻止施放「聖化武器」。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
Dispels all negative chaos and death enchantments on a city and protects it from further chaos and death enchantments (whether city-specific or global). Removes any corruption from the tiles in the city's catchment area at the beginning of every turn.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 400 法力
維護: 8 法力/回合
驅散城市上的所有負面混沌與死亡結界，並保護城市免受後續的混沌與死亡結界（無論是針對城市的還是全域的）。每個回合開始時清除城市集水區內地圖格上的所有腐化。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
All non-combat death spells cast by any other wizard must resist against Life Force as if a Dispel Magic of 500 strength had been cast.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
任何其他巫師施放的所有非戰鬥死亡法術，都必須抵抗「生命之力」，如同遭受強度 500 的「消除魔法」一般。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Tries to prevent all non-combat chaos magic spells from being cast by any other wizard, requiring them to resist the forces of life as if a Dispel Magic of 500 strength had been cast.
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1000 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
嘗試阻止任何其他巫師施放所有非戰鬥混沌魔法法術，要求其抵抗生命之力，如同遭受強度 500 的「消除魔法」一般。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1100 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Inspires all of a wizard's normal units so that their levels all raise by one (recruit become regulars, regulars become veterans, etc.). One of only two ways to raise units above Elite level (the other one being the Warlord retort, with which this spell is cumulative).
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1100 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
激勵巫師麾下所有普通單位，使其等級全部提升一級（新兵升為常規兵，常規兵升為老兵，以此類推）。這是將單位晉升至精銳以上的兩種方式之一（另一種為「軍閥」天賦，與此法術效果可疊加）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 950 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Summons an archangel. Archangels are immune to illusions, inspire friendly units to fight better than normal (+2 each to melee strength, defense, and resistance) and can cast up to 40 mana in life magic spells every battle. They have 15 melee strength, +3 to hit, 10 defense, 12 resistance, and 18 hit points; and can fly with a speed of 4.
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 950 法力
維護: 20 法力/回合
召喚一位大天使。大天使免疫幻象，能激勵友方單位比平常表現更佳（近戰強度、防禦及抗性各 +2），且每場戰鬥可施放最多 40 法力的生命魔法法術。它擁有 15 近戰強度、+3 命中、10 防禦、12 抗性及 18 生命，飛行速度為 4。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1250 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Adds 25% of total hit points (with a minimum of one hit point added) to the hit points of each of a wizard's creatures. Yes, that means every individual figure in every single unit!
zh:
效果: 全域結界
目標: 無
施法花費: 1250 法力
維護: 10 法力/回合
巫師麾下每個生物的生命值增加總生命值的 25%（至少增加 1 點）。是的，這代表每支單位中每一個獨立模型！

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a group of 6 skeletons and binds them to the will of the wizard. Skeletons have 3 melee strength, +1 to hit, 4 defense, 5 resistance, and 1 hit point each. They have a movement speed of 1, and possess Missile Immunity, in addition to the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 25 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
召喚一組 6 具骷髏，並將其綁定於巫師的意志之下。每具骷髏擁有 3 近戰強度、+1 命中、4 防禦、5 抗性及 1 生命。移動速度為 1，具備飛彈免疫，以及死亡生物的固有免疫（寒冷、死亡、幻象及毒素）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 5 mana
Upkeep: none
Saps the strength from a target unit's creatures, who suffer a penalty of 2 to their melee, thrown and ranged attack strengths, unless the unit resists the spell at a -2 penalty.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 5 法力
維護: 無
抽乾目標單位生物的力量，使其近戰、投擲及遠程攻擊強度各受 -2 懲罰，除非該單位以 -2 的抗性成功抵抗此法術。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Generates a frenzy of sacrificing to the gods of death, which doubles the magic power obtained from shrines, temples, parthenons and cathedrals. However, the rituals reduce the city population growth by 25% and increase the level of unrest by one.
zh:
效果: 城市結界
目標: 友方城市
施法花費: 30 法力
維護: 無
引發一陣獻祭死亡之神的狂熱，使神殿、廟宇、萬神殿及大教堂所產生的魔力翻倍。然而，儀式使城市人口成長減少 25%，並使動亂等級增加 1。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 12/60 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Surrounds the target unit with a fear- inspiring aura. Any time enemy units attempt to engage in melee combat with the cloaked unit they must first try to overcome their fright (on a per figure basis) before they can attack or counterattack.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個單位
施法花費: 12/60 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
以令人生畏的氣場籠罩目標單位。每當敵方單位嘗試與披斗篷單位進行近戰，必須先逐個模型克服恐懼，才能發動攻擊或反擊。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
If the target unit fails to resist at -2, all creatures within are thrust into a deep sleep. The unit is unable to take any actions and any attacks on the unit automatically do maximum damage.
zh:
效果: 單位結界
目標: 一個敵方單位
施法花費: 15 法力
維護: 無
若目標單位以 -2 抗性失敗抵抗，其內部所有生物陷入沉睡。該單位無法採取任何行動，且對其發動的所有攻擊自動造成最大傷害。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 80 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a pack of four ghouls and binds them to the will of the wizard. Any units slain mostly by the ghouls arise after the battle to serve the wizard in his undead army. Ghouls have 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 6 resistance, and 3 hit points each. They possess a movement speed of 1, along with a strength 1 Poison Touch attack, and the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果: 召喚
目標: 無
施法花費: 80 法力
維護: 1 法力/回合
召喚一群四隻食屍鬼，並將其綁定於巫師的意志之下。主要被食屍鬼擊殺的單位，戰鬥結束後將復甦並加入巫師的不死大軍。每隻食屍鬼擁有 4 近戰強度、+1 命中、3 防禦、6 抗性及 3 生命。移動速度為 1，具備強度 1 的毒素觸碰攻擊，以及死亡生物的固有免疫（寒冷、死亡、幻象及毒素）。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to siphon life from a target unit and give it to a spell caster hero or convert the drained life into casting skill for a spell caster wizard. The target can make one resistance roll, and will be drained of as many hit points as it fails the roll by (or none if it succeeds). Additional mana makes the spell harder to resist by 1 for every 5 points spent. Units destroyed mainly by Life Drain become Undead under the caster's control.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
嘗試從目標單位吸取生命，轉移給施法者英雄，或將吸取的生命轉化為巫師的施法技能。目標可進行一次抗性擲骰，失敗幾點即被吸取幾點生命（成功則無損）。每額外花費 5 法力，法術的抵抗難度提高 1。主要因「生命汲取」倒下的單位，將以不死狀態歸施法者控制。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Casts a pall of fear on all enemy units. During every combat turn, each enemy unit must attempt (+1 bonus to resistance) to overcome the terror that grips it, or cower in fear. When a unit is cowering it cannot attack; however, the unit can still counterattack when it is defending against melee attacks initiated by the enemy.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
對所有敵方單位籠罩恐懼。每個戰鬥回合，每個敵方單位須嘗試（抗性 +1 加成）克服攫住它的恐懼，否則便蜷縮畏怯。單位畏怯時無法主動攻擊；但在抵禦敵方近戰攻擊時，仍可進行反擊。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: none
Drapes a shroud of darkness over the entire battlefield inspiring creatures of death who gain one point each in attack strength (swords), defense (shields) and resistance (crosses). Creatures of life, on the other hand, are dispirited and lose one point each in attack strength, defense and resistance.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：25 法力
維護：無
在整個戰場上披上黑暗的帷幕，激勵死亡系生物，使其攻擊（劍）、防禦（盾）、抗性（十字）各提升 1 點。生命系生物則意志消沉，攻擊、防禦、抗性各降低 1 點。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn. This includes the opponent wizard you are currently battling. Additionally, all units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
所有敵方施法者每個戰鬥回合流失 5 法力，包含當前對戰的對手巫師。此外，所有具備魔法遠程攻擊的單位每回合損失一次法術射擊次數。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: enemy wizard
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Drains 50-150 mana points from a target wizard's mana reserve.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：敵方巫師
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
從目標巫師的法力儲備中抽取 50–150 法力。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one enemy normal unit
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to change the allegiance of a normal enemy unit to that of the casting wizard. If the target unit becomes possessed, it fights for the casting wizard until combat ends. Note that fantastic creatures and heroes may not be possessed.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個敵方普通單位
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
嘗試將一個普通敵方單位的效忠改換為施法巫師。目標單位一旦被附身，便為施法巫師作戰直至戰鬥結束。注意，奇幻生物及英雄不可被附身。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 180 mana
Upkeep: none
'Curses' a normal unit with the effects of lycanthropy, changing them into a 6-figure werewolves unit with 5 melee strength, +1 to hit, 1 defense, 6 resistance, and 5 hit points each. Werewolves regenerate both during and after battle, have a movement speed of 2 as well as increased protection from non-magical weapons, and also possess the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison). Werewolves cost 5 mana per turn to maintain.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：一個普通單位
施法花費：180 法力
維護：無
對普通單位施加狼人詛咒，將其變為 6 個身形的狼人單位，每個身形具有 5 點近戰攻擊、+1 命中、1 點防禦、6 點抗性及 5 點生命。狼人在戰鬥中及戰後皆可再生，移動速度為 2，對非魔法武器具有額外防護，並擁有死亡系生物的特性免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。狼人每回合需消耗 5 法力維護。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
The attack strength and defense of all enemy units is reduced by 1 and their resistance is reduced by 2.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
所有敵方單位的攻擊與防禦各降低 1 點，抗性降低 2 點。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal or undead unit
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Transforms a target creature into a vile undead being with +2 melee strength, +1 ranged/thrown/breath, hit points, resistance and defense. Undead can not be healed or animated and gain no experience, but get all the immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison). Removing black channels forfeits the bonus attributes, but will not reverse the transformation. Similarly, this spell can also be cast on any unit already possessing the Undead attribute to grant just the bonuses.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個普通或不死單位
施法花費：100 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
將目標生物轉化為邪惡的不死存在，獲得 +2 近戰攻擊、+1 遠程／投擲／吐息攻擊、生命、抗性與防禦。不死單位無法被治療或再生動，也無法獲得經驗，但擁有死亡系生物的全部免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。解除黑暗通道將失去額外屬性，但不會逆轉轉化效果。此法術同樣可對已具備不死屬性的單位施放，僅給予屬性加成。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons an invisible night stalker and binds it to the will of the wizard. Night stalkers have 7 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 8 resistance, and 10 hit points. They possess a movement speed of 2, along with the dreaded Death Gaze ability, which forces any creature engaging or engaged by them to resist at a penalty of -2 or perish immediately. They also have all of the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：250 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一名隱形的夜行潛者，並將其意志綁定於巫師之下。夜行潛者擁有 7 點近戰攻擊、+1 命中、3 點防禦、8 點抗性及 10 點生命。移動速度為 2，並具備令人聞風喪膽的死亡凝視能力——任何與之交戰的生物須以 -2 懲罰進行抗性擲骰，失敗則即刻斃命。此外，夜行潛者擁有死亡系生物的全部特性免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: enemy wizard
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: none
Creates a feeling of contempt for the target wizard in all other wizards, reducing relations by 25 diplomatic points.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：敵方巫師
施法花費：100 法力
維護：無
使所有其他巫師對目標巫師產生輕蔑之感，外交關係降低 25 點。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana / turn
No unit outside a Wall of Darkness may attack a unit inside with a ranged attack, unless the attacking unit has Illusions Immunity.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：己方城市
施法花費：40 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
除非攻擊單位具備幻象免疫，否則黑暗之牆外的單位無法以遠程攻擊打擊牆內的單位。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
The target unit's melee attack strength is doubled and its defense is reduced to 0.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
目標單位的近戰攻擊力翻倍，但防禦降至 0。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 325 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Summons a group of 4 shadow demons and binds them to the will of the wizard. Shadow demons are Non-Corporeal, and can Plane Shift, regenerate, and use ranged magical attacks 8 times per battle. They have 5 melee strength, 4 ranged strength, +2 to hit, 4 defense, 8 resistance, and 5 hit points each. Shadow demons can fly with a speed of 1, have increased protection against non-magical attacks, and also possess the immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：325 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
召喚 4 個暗影惡魔並將其意志綁定於巫師之下。暗影惡魔為非實體形態，能夠位面轉移、再生，每場戰鬥可使用遠程魔法攻擊 8 次。每個身形擁有 5 點近戰攻擊、4 點遠程攻擊、+2 命中、4 點防禦、8 點抗性及 5 點生命。暗影惡魔可以速度 1 飛行，對非魔法攻擊具有額外防護，並擁有死亡系生物的免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30 / 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 man/turn
Target unit becomes Non-Corporeal, granting it Weapon Immunity and the ability to move across any terrain at a cost of 1/2 movement point.
zh:
效果：單位結界
目標：一個單位
施法花費：30 / 150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
目標單位變為非實體形態，獲得武器免疫，並能以 1/2 移動點的代價穿越任何地形。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Wracks all enemy non-death creatures with the powers of darkness. Every combat turn, each figure in every enemy unit must resist with a +1 bonus or take 1 point of damage.
zh:
效果：戰鬥結界
目標：無
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
以黑暗之力折磨所有敵方非死亡系生物。每個戰鬥回合，每個敵方單位的每個身形須以 +1 加成進行抗性擲骰，失敗則受到 1 點傷害。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
A demonic presence enters the target city, destroying any magic power generated by shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals; as well as preventing these buildings from reducing unrest. The spell has no effect if the city's owner can use death magic.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：100 法力
維護：4 法力/回合
惡魔之氣侵入目標城市，摧毀神龕、神殿、萬神殿及大教堂所產生的魔力，同時阻止這些建築降低動亂。若城市擁有者能使用死亡魔法，此法術則無效。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Summons a group of 4 wraiths and binds them to the will of the wizard. Wraiths are Non-Corporeal and have a -3 resistance life-stealing attack. They have 7 melee strength, +2 to hit, 6 defense, 8 resistance, and 8 hit points each. They fly with a speed of 2, have increased protection against non-magical attacks, and also possess the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：500 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
召喚 4 個怨靈並將其意志綁定於巫師之下。怨靈為非實體形態，具備 -3 抗性的生命竊取攻擊。每個身形擁有 7 點近戰攻擊、+2 命中、6 點防禦、8 點抗性及 8 點生命。以速度 2 飛行，對非魔法攻擊具有額外防護，並擁有死亡系生物的特性免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons a great cloud of shadow which surrounds the city as long as the enchantment is in effect. All combats taking place at the city are treated as though a Darkness spell has been cast (+1 attack, defense, and resistance for Death creatures, and -1 to the same attributes of Life units).
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：己方城市
施法花費：150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
召喚一片巨大的影雲籠罩城市，在結界持續期間始終有效。在該城市發生的所有戰鬥均視為施放了黑暗法術（死亡系生物攻擊、防禦、抗性各 +1；生命系單位相同屬性各 -1）。

source:
Effects: Overland Enchantment
Target: owned magic node
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: none
Corrupts the targeted magic node, cursing the controller and drawing out 5 power from the wizard instead of generating more. Once warped, a node can only be returned to normal by a Disenchant Area or Disenchant True spell. Until then the node will continue to draw out magical power.
zh:
效果：戰略地圖結界
目標：己方占有的魔法節點
施法花費：75 法力
維護：無
腐化目標魔法節點，詛咒其控制者，使節點每回合從巫師身上抽取 5 魔力而非產出魔力。一旦被扭曲，只能透過「解除結界區域」或「真實解除結界」法術才能恢復正常。在此之前，節點將持續抽取魔力。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
All figures in each unit within the targeted land must resist at -1 or rot away from a vile degenerative disease that slays almost immediately.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
目標地塊內每個單位的每個身形，須以 -1 懲罰進行抗性擲骰，失敗則感染惡性退化疾病，幾乎立即斃命。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 40 mana/turn
All normal creatures falling in battle become zombies at the end of the battle under the control of the casting wizard if that wizard is victorious. Zombies have 6 figures, 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 3 resistance, and 3 hit points each. They move with a speed of only 1, but possess all of the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：800 法力
維護：40 法力/回合
凡在戰鬥中倒下的所有普通生物，若施法巫師最終獲勝，戰鬥結束後皆成為由其控制的殭屍。殭屍有 6 個身形，每個身形擁有 4 點近戰攻擊、+1 命中、3 點防禦、3 點抗性及 3 點生命。移動速度僅 1，但擁有死亡系生物的全部特性免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素）。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Halves the food production of the afflicted city as long as the famine is in effect. If the city has an insufficient food supply, the citizens will begin to starve. Unrest is increased by 25%.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：200 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在飢荒持續期間，受影響城市的食物生產減半。若城市食物供應不足，市民將開始挨餓。動亂提升 25%。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Halves the production of a city, and increases the level of unrest in it by one.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：150 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
使城市生產減半，並將動亂等級提升一級。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: enemy wizard
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: none
Target wizard loses 1-10% of spell casting skill permanently.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：敵方巫師
施法花費：250 法力
維護：無
目標巫師永久失去 1–10% 的施法技能。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one enemy unit
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Each figure in one unit must save at -5 or be slain instantly. This spell ignores Death Immunity, and creatures destroyed by it may not be restored during the current battle, if at all.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個敵方單位
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
一個單位的每個身形須以 -5 懲罰進行抗性擲骰，失敗則即刻斃命。此法術無視死亡免疫，且被其消滅的生物在本場戰鬥中無法被恢復，甚至可能永久消失。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 600 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana / turn
Summons a group of 4 death knights and binds them to the will of the wizard. Death knights have 9 melee strength, +3 to hit, 8 defense, 10 resistance, and 8 hit points each. Their attacks are Armor Piercing, carry a -4 resistance Life Steal, and bear the First Strike trait, allowing them to deal damage before the opponent when attacking. They fly with a speed of 3, possess the immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison), and an increased resistance to non-magical attacks.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：600 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
召喚 4 名死亡騎士並將其意志綁定於巫師之下。死亡騎士每個身形擁有 9 點近戰攻擊、+3 命中、8 點防禦、10 點抗性及 8 點生命。其攻擊具備穿甲特性，攜帶 -4 抗性的生命竊取效果，並具有先攻特性，可在主動攻擊時搶先對手造成傷害。以速度 3 飛行，擁有死亡系生物的免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素），以及對非魔法攻擊的額外抵抗。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
All figures in each enemy unit must resist at - 2 or be struck dead where they stand.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：無
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
所有敵方單位的每個身形須以 -2 懲罰進行抗性擲骰，失敗則當場斃命。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one dead unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: Special
Raises one slain enemy (not protected by magic immunity) or ally unit from the dead and places it under your control. The creature becomes Undead, and is treated as a creature of Death for all purposes, gaining all of the characteristic immunities of such (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison), but losing the ability to gain experience or be healed. Animated fantastic units cost 50% more in maintenance, but normal ones require neither gold nor sustenance.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個已陣亡單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：特殊
從死亡中喚起一個陣亡的敵方（不受魔法免疫保護）或友方單位，置於你的控制之下。該生物成為不死狀態，所有情況下均視為死亡系生物，獲得相應特性免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素），但失去獲取經驗及被治療的能力。被動化的奇幻單位維護費提高 50%，普通單位則不需要金幣或糧食。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Spreads a deadly plague throughout the affected city killing one population each turn if the current population exceeds a 1-10 roll, and increasing the level of unrest by two.
zh:
效果：城市結界
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：350 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在受影響城市散布致命瘟疫，若當前人口超過 1–10 擲骰結果，每回合消滅一個人口，並將動亂等級提升兩級。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Covers the world in a blanket of darkness. Except for those cities protected by Heavenly Light, all combats are assumed to be covered by the spell of Darkness (+1 attack, defense, and resistance for creatures of Death; -1 attack, defense, and resistance for those of Life).
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
以黑暗籠罩整個世界。除受天光保護的城市外，所有戰鬥均視為覆蓋了黑暗法術（死亡系生物攻擊、防禦、抗性各 +1；生命系生物相同屬性各 -1）。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1100 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
All nature and life spells cost 50% more than normal to cast.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：1100 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
所有自然系與生命系法術的施法花費提高 50%。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: none
All enemy normal units on both planes must resist or be slain.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：無
施法花費：500 法力
維護：無
兩個位面上所有敵方普通單位須進行抗性擲骰，失敗則被消滅。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a demon lord and binds it to the will of the wizard. This creature has 20 melee and 10 ranged strength, +3 to hit, 10 defense, 12 resistance, and 20 hit points. It flies with a speed of 2, Causes Fear in melee, can fire 8 ranged magical attacks and summon 3 lesser demons per battle, has a -5 resist life-stealing attack, possesses the immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison), and has an increased resistance to non-magical attacks.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一名惡魔領主並將其意志綁定於巫師之下。此生物擁有 20 點近戰攻擊、10 點遠程攻擊、+3 命中、10 點防禦、12 點抗性及 20 點生命。以速度 2 飛行，近戰時使敵方陷入恐懼，每場戰鬥可發動 8 次魔法遠程攻擊並召喚 3 個次級惡魔，具備 -5 抗性的生命竊取攻擊，擁有死亡系生物的免疫（冰冷、死亡、幻象、毒素），以及對非魔法攻擊的額外抵抗。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a magic spirit which can meld with magical nodes and direct the node's power to the controlling wizard. A melded node radiates a magic aura the color of the wizard's banner. Magic spirits are Non-Corporeal, have 1 movement speed, 5 melee strength, 4 defense, 8 resistance, and 10 hit points.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：無
施法花費：30 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一個魔法精靈，可與魔法節點融合，將節點的魔力導向控制它的巫師。融合後的節點會散發出與巫師旗幟同色的魔法光暈。魔法精靈為非實體形態，移動速度 1，擁有 5 點近戰攻擊、4 點防禦、8 點抗性及 10 點生命。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to destroy all enemy spell effects on a tile. The chance for success is equal to the mana spent on this spell divided by the sum of the costs for this spell and the target enchantment. For example if this spell is cast with 30 mana on a unit with an Eldritch Weapon enchantment (cost 15) the chance to dispel it would be 30/(30+15) or 67%.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：地圖格
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
嘗試消除一個地格上所有敵方法術效果。成功機率等於本法術花費法力除以本法術花費與目標結界費用之總和。例如以 30 法力對一個擁有秘法武器結界（費用 15）的單位施放，解除機率為 30/(30+15)，即 67%。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Moves your summoning circle to another city. All creatures summoned by spells will appear in this new city.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：己方城市
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
將你的召喚圓陣移至另一座城市。此後所有法術召喚的生物均出現在該新城市。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to dispel all enemy spells in the targeted map square or, in the case of combat casting, the entire battlefield. The chance of successfully dispelling an enchantment is equal to the mana spent on this spell divided by the sum of the costs for this spell and the target enchantment. When cast in combat, disenchant area can only suppress opposing city enchantments for the duration of the battle, and will never remove them completely unless they were also cast during the same battle.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50+ 法力
維護：無
嘗試消除目標地圖格（或在戰鬥中施放時為整個戰場）上所有敵方法術。成功解除結界的機率等於本法術花費法力除以本法術花費與目標結界費用之總和。在戰鬥中施放時，解除結界區域只能在戰鬥期間壓制對方城市結界，除非目標結界也是在同一場戰鬥中施放的，否則絕不會完全移除。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: friendly hero
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Instantly summons the target hero to your summoning circle, removing her from the current combat.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：己方英雄
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
立即將目標英雄傳送至你的召喚圓陣，使其退出當前戰鬥。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana / turn
The current spell being cast by all wizards that you are in contact with will be displayed on the Magic Screen at the top of each wizard's gem.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：200 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
所有與你有接觸的巫師當前正在施放的法術，將顯示在魔法畫面中每位巫師寶石的頂部。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: special
Upkeep: none
Creates a lesser magical item for use by heroes, allowing only powers that cost 200 mana or less to be used.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：無
施法花費：特殊
維護：無
為英雄製作一件次級魔法物品，僅允許使用費用 200 法力以下的能力。

source:
Effects: Hero Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a lesser hero to lead your army. The hero will not require any initial gold to join, but still requires maintenance. This spell will fail if you already control six heroes.
zh:
效果：英雄召喚
目標：無
施法花費：300 法力
維護：無
召喚一名次級英雄率領你的軍隊。英雄加入時無需初始金幣，但仍需要維護費用。若你已控制六名英雄，此法術將失敗。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana / turn
Reveals the location of all cities on both planes.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：500 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
揭示兩個位面上所有城市的位置。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one global enchantment
Casting Cost: 200+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to dispel one enemy global enchantment. The chance of successfully dispelling this enchantment is calculated as in Dispel Magic: it is equal to the mana spent on this spell divided by the sum of the costs for this spell and the target enchantment. For example if this spell is cast with 300 mana on a Just Cause enchantment (cost 150) the chance to dispel it would be 300/(300+150) or 67%.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：一個全域結界
施法花費：200+ 法力
維護：無
嘗試解除一個敵方全域結界。成功機率的計算方式與解除魔法相同：等於本法術花費法力除以本法術花費與目標結界費用之總和。例如以 300 法力對正義之因結界（費用 150）施放，解除機率為 300/(300+150)，即 67%。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: special
Upkeep: none
Creates a magical artifact for use by heroes, allowing any available powers to be used.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：無
施法花費：特殊
維護：無
為英雄製作一件魔法神器，可使用所有可用能力。

source:
Effects: Hero Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 750 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a greater hero to lead your army. The hero will not require any initial gold to join, but still requires maintenance. This spell will fail if you already control six heroes.
zh:
效果：英雄召喚
目標：無
施法花費：750 法力
維護：無
召喚一名高階英雄率領你的軍隊。英雄加入時無需初始金幣，但仍需要維護費用。若你已控制六名英雄，此法術將失敗。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 5000
Caster obtains total control of all magic in both planes. Enemy wizards lose their ability to cast any spells and all summoned creatures come under your control. Successfully casting the Spell of Mastery ends the game in a glorious victory for the caster.
zh:
效果：全域結界
目標：無
施法花費：5000
施法者獲得對兩個位面全部魔法的絕對控制。敵方巫師失去施放任何法術的能力，所有召喚生物歸你控制。成功施放支配法術將為施法者帶來光榮勝利，遊戲就此終結。

source: Click here to turn to the previous page of your spell book
zh: 點此翻至法術書的上一頁。

source: Click here to turn to the next page of your spell book
zh: 點此翻至法術書的下一頁。

source: The game button brings up the game options screen, which can be used to load and save games, and set special game options.
zh: 遊戲按鈕開啟遊戲選項畫面，可用於讀取、儲存遊戲，以及設定特殊遊戲選項。

source: The spells button opens your spell book, which lists only those spells which can be cast overland.
zh: 法術按鈕開啟法術書，其中僅列出可在戰略地圖上施放的法術。

source: The army list button brings up a complete list of all armies under your control. Units may also be dismissed from this screen.
zh: 軍隊清單按鈕開啟你控制下所有軍隊的完整清單。亦可在此畫面解散單位。

source: The city list button calls up the list of all cities under your control. Not only can you see what is being built and the resources being produced by your cities, you can also change the items that the cities are currently building.
zh: 城市清單按鈕開啟你控制下所有城市的清單。不僅可查看各城市正在建造的項目及產出資源，還可更改城市當前的建造項目。

source: The magic button brings up the magic summary screen, which contains a list of all enemy spell casters, their relations with you, the breakdown in the way magical power is being divided up, a list of overland spells, the alchemy screen, and your spell casting skill.
zh: 魔法按鈕開啟魔法總覽畫面，其中包含所有敵方施法者清單及其與你的關係、魔力分配明細、戰略地圖法術清單、鍊金畫面，以及你的施法技能。

source: The info button provides you with information from various advisors: surveyor, cartographer, apprentice, historian, astrologer, chancellor, tax collector, and mirror.
zh: 資訊按鈕提供來自各顧問的資訊：測量師、製圖師、學徒、歷史學家、占星師、宰相、稅務官及鏡像。

source: The plane button toggles between the Prime and Myrror planes. If the current unit is able to switch planes, the unit will move from the current plane to the next.
zh: 位面按鈕在主位面與鏡位面之間切換。若當前單位能夠切換位面，該單位將從當前位面移至另一個位面。

source: The done button ends the turn for all active units. Right-click to re-activate the unit. Next turn the unit will be cycled to as normal.
zh: 完成按鈕結束所有活躍單位的行動。右鍵點擊可重新激活該單位。下一回合將正常輪到該單位。

source: The patrol button sets all active units in the stack to patrol status. Units set to patrol will not take any further action for the rest of the game. Units set to patrol may be taken off patrol status by clicking on them.
zh: 巡邏按鈕將堆疊中所有活躍單位設為巡邏狀態。設為巡邏的單位在遊戲剩餘時間內不再採取任何行動。點擊巡邏中的單位可解除其巡邏狀態。

source: The wait button sets all active units in the stack to wait status. Units set to wait will take no action now, but will need to be given an action before the end of the turn.
zh: 等待按鈕將堆疊中所有活躍單位設為等待狀態。設為等待的單位本回合暫不行動，但須在回合結束前給予指令。

source: The build button allows you to build either an outpost or a road. If there are settlers in the stack, an outpost will be built. If there are engineers in the stack, a road will be built.
zh: 建造按鈕允許建造前哨或道路。若堆疊中有拓荒者，則建造前哨；若有工程師，則建造道路。

source: The purify button allows you to clean up corrupted areas of the world. It takes five turns for a single unit to completely purify a map square. Additional units can reduce this though: to 3 turns if there are 2 or 3 total units, and to 2 when four or more are purifying.
zh: 淨化按鈕允許清除世界中被腐化的區域。單一單位完全淨化一個地圖格需要五個回合。增加單位可縮短時間：2 至 3 個單位縮短至 3 回合，4 個或以上縮短至 2 回合。

source: The meld button allows you to take control of a magic node.
zh: 融合按鈕允許你控制一個魔法節點。

source: The next turn button allows you to begin the next turn of the game.
zh: 下一回合按鈕允許你開始遊戲的下一個回合。

source: The reduced map displays the entire plane in a reduced form. Clicking will change your current view. The white box corresponds to your normal viewing window.
zh: 縮略地圖以縮小形式顯示整個位面。點擊可改變當前視角。白色方框對應你的正常視窗範圍。

source: This is the total amount of gold in your treasury.
zh: 這是你國庫中的金幣總量。

source: This is the total number of mana crystals in your reserve that you can draw from to cast spells.
zh: 這是你儲備中可用於施放法術的法力水晶總數。

source: The amount of gold you have as profitable income each turn.
zh: 你每回合的金幣盈利收入。

source: The amount of food in excess of that needed to support your troops. If negative, units will starve to death.
zh: 超出支援軍隊所需的食物餘量。若為負值，單位將因饑荒而死。

source: The number of mana crystals that are being saved/spent each turn.
zh: 每回合被儲存或消耗的法力水晶數量。

source: The total number of movement points the units in a stack can move.
zh: 堆疊中單位可移動的移動點總數。

source: This shows you where your unit is located on the plane. The blinking white dot represents the actual location of the unit.
zh: 顯示你的單位在位面上的所在位置。閃爍的白點代表單位的實際位置。

source: The name or type of the currently highlighted unit.
zh: 當前選中單位的名稱或類型。

source: A list of all of the enchantments that the currently highlighted unit has.
zh: 當前選中單位所擁有的所有結界清單。

source: The items button allows you to allocate magic items to heroes.
zh: 物品按鈕允許你將魔法物品分配給英雄。

source: The OK button allows you to exit the army list screen.
zh: 確定按鈕允許你離開軍隊清單畫面。

source: This is the total that you are spending on food, gold, and mana each turn to support your armies.
zh: 這是你每回合為維持軍隊而花費在食物、金幣及法力上的總計。

source: When a hero is hired, his or her portrait will appear here.
zh: 當英雄受僱時，其肖像將顯示於此。

source: Scrolls the list up one row at a time.
zh: 將清單向上捲動一列。

source: Scrolls the list down one row at a time.
zh: 將清單向下捲動一列。

source: Allows you to destroy unwanted magical items, for which you add one half the base creation cost in mana to your reserve.
zh: 允許你摧毀不需要的魔法物品，並將其基礎製作費用一半的法力加入你的儲備。

source: Allows you to convert gold to mana or mana to gold.
zh: 允許你將金幣轉換為法力，或將法力轉換為金幣。

source: The OK button allows you to exit the item screen.
zh: 確定按鈕讓你離開物品畫面。

source: This shows you where your city is located on the plane. The blinking white dot represents the actual location of the city.
zh: 此處顯示你的城市在位面上的位置。閃爍的白點代表城市的實際位置。

source: The name of the currently highlighted city.
zh: 目前選取城市的名稱。

source: A list of all of the enchantments currently cast on the highlighted city.
zh: 目前選取城市上所有已施放結界的清單。

source: The OK button allows you to exit the city list screen.
zh: 確定按鈕讓你離開城市清單畫面。

source: The gray gem indicates that either you have not come into contact with the wizard yet or, if there are fewer than 5 players in the game, the extra gems appear as gray.
zh: 灰色寶石表示你尚未與該巫師接觸，或是若遊戲玩家少於 5 人，多餘的寶石位置顯示為灰色。

source: The shattered gem indicates that the wizard has been eliminated from the game or has been banished.
zh: 破碎的寶石表示該巫師已被淘汰出局或遭到放逐。

source: The total power you are receiving is divided up into three ratios according to the highlight height on each staff. Below each group will appear the actual number of points being accumulated for each category, adjusted for all special abilities.
zh: 你所獲得的總魔力依照每根法杖的高亮高度分配為三個比例。每組下方會顯示各類別實際累積的點數，已計入所有特殊能力的調整。

source: Your spell casting skill dictates how many mana you can channel into spells each turn.
zh: 你的施法技能決定每回合可灌注進法術的法力數量。

source: The mana reserve represents the pool of magical power that you can draw from to cast spells. All spell maintenance will be drawn from the mana reserve. If you are placing less magical power into the mana reserve than what you are spending, the reserve will drop to zero, enchantments will fade away and magical creatures will disappear.
zh: 法力儲備代表你可用於施放法術的魔力池。所有法術維護費用都從法力儲備中扣除。若注入法力儲備的魔力少於消耗量，儲備將歸零，結界將消散，魔法生物也將消失。

source: Each magic point allocated toward spell research adds one research point toward getting the spell that you are currently researching. Note that research also includes all points being obtained from cities with libraries, sages guilds, etc.
zh: 每個用於法術研究的魔力點數，都能為你正在研究的法術增加一點研究點數。注意研究點數也包含來自擁有圖書館、賢者公會等建築城市的所有點數。

source: Allows you to convert gold to mana or mana into gold.
zh: 允許你將金幣轉換為法力，或將法力轉換為金幣。

source: The OK button allows you to exit the magic screen.
zh: 確定按鈕讓你離開魔法畫面。

source: A list of all current overland enchantments will appear in this window. The color of the spell indicates the color of the caster.
zh: 此視窗顯示所有目前生效的戰略地圖結界清單。法術的顏色代表施法者的顏色。

source: This shows your diplomatic relations with the wizard whose portrait appears in the gem. Relations are as follows: hate, troubled, tense, restless, unease, neutral, relaxed, calm, peaceful, friendly, and harmony.
zh: 此處顯示你與寶石中肖像巫師的外交關係。關係等級如下：仇恨、困擾、緊張、不安、疑慮、中立、輕鬆、平靜、和平、友好、和諧。

source: This displays your wizard statistics.
zh: 此處顯示你的巫師統計資料。

source: Your spell casting skill dictates how much mana you can channel into spells each turn. The value on the left is your casting skill plus any channeling ability offered by heroes. The value in parenthesis is your base casting skill.
zh: 你的施法技能決定每回合可灌注進法術的法力數量。左側數值為你的施法技能加上英雄所提供的任何導能能力。括號內的數值為你的基礎施法技能。

source: The magic reserve represents the pool of magical power that you can draw from to cast spells.
zh: 法力儲備代表你可用於施放法術的魔力池。

source: Your power base is the total power that you are able to distribute between skill, mana, and research before any bonuses are applied.
zh: 你的魔力基礎是在套用任何加成之前，可分配至技能、法力與研究的總魔力。

source: The spell that you are currently casting.
zh: 你目前正在施放的法術。

source: The spell that you are currently researching.
zh: 你目前正在研究的法術。

source: This is the name of the city where your summoning circle is located. All summoned creatures will appear in the city with your summoning circle.
zh: 此為你的召喚陣所在城市的名稱。所有召喚生物都將出現在擁有你召喚陣的城市中。

source: Barbarians grow very fast (+20 people/turn) and may not build Animist's Guilds, Cathedrals, or Universities.
zh: 野蠻人人口增長極快（+20 人/回合），但不能建造萬靈師公會、大教堂或大學。

source: Beastmen cities receive 1/2 power/population and may not build Fantastic Stables or Shipyards.
zh: 獸人城市每人口可獲得 1/2 魔力，但不能建造奇幻馬廄或造船廠。

source: Dark elf cities receive 1 power/population, grow very slowly (-20 people/turn) and may not build Cathedrals or Maritime Guilds.
zh: 暗精靈城市每人口可獲得 1 魔力，人口增長極慢（-20 人/回合），且不能建造大教堂或海事公會。

source: Draconian cities receive 1/2 power/population, grow slowly (-10 people/turn), and cannot build Fantastic Stables, Maritime Guild's or Mechanician's Guilds.
zh: 龍裔城市每人口可獲得 1/2 魔力，人口增長緩慢（-10 人/回合），且不能建造奇幻馬廄、海事公會或機械師公會。

source: Dwarves double special mine bonuses and taxed gold, grow very slowly (-20 people/turn), and cannot build Parthenons, Shipyards, Stables, or Universities.
zh: 矮人使特殊礦場加成與稅收金幣翻倍，人口增長極慢（-20 人/回合），且不能建造萬神殿、造船廠、馬廄或大學。

source: Gnoll cities grow slowly (-10 people/turn), and cannot build Animist's Guilds, Sage's Guilds, Armorer's Guilds, Maritime Guilds or Parthenons.
zh: 土狼人城市人口增長緩慢（-10 人/回合），且不能建造萬靈師公會、賢者公會、甲冑師公會、海事公會或萬神殿。

source: Halflings cannot build Armorer's Guilds, Stables, Shipyards or Universities.
zh: 半身人不能建造甲冑師公會、馬廄、造船廠或大學。

source: High elf cities receive 1/2 power/population, grow very slowly (-20 people/turn), and cannot build Parthenons or Maritime Guilds.
zh: 高等精靈城市每人口可獲得 1/2 魔力，人口增長極慢（-20 人/回合），且不能建造萬神殿或海事公會。

source: High men may not build Fantastic Stables.
zh: 高等人類不能建造奇幻馬廄。

source: Klackon cities grow slowly (-10 people/turn) and cannot build Sage's Guilds, Shipyards, or Temples. If your capitol race is klackon, unrest in klackon cities is reduced by -2.
zh: 克拉肯城市人口增長緩慢（-10 人/回合），且不能建造賢者公會、造船廠或神廟。若你的首都種族為克拉肯，克拉肯城市的動亂值降低 -2。

source: Lizardman grow quickly (+10 people/turn) and cannot build Animist's Guilds, War Colleges, Builder's Halls, Sage's Guild, Parthenons, or Ship Wright's Guild.
zh: 蜥蜴人人口增長較快（+10 人/回合），且不能建造萬靈師公會、戰爭學院、建築師廳、賢者公會、萬神殿或造船師公會。

source: Nomad cities receive a +50% trade bonus that is treated as a road gold bonus, grow slowly (-10 people/turn), and cannot build Maritime or Wizard's Guilds.
zh: 遊牧民城市獲得 +50% 貿易加成（視同道路金幣加成），人口增長緩慢（-10 人/回合），且不能建造海事公會或巫師公會。

source: Troll cities grow very slowly (-20 people/turn) and may not build Fantastic Stables, Miner's Guilds, Sage's Guilds, or Shipyards.
zh: 巨魔城市人口增長極慢（-20 人/回合），且不能建造奇幻馬廄、礦工公會、賢者公會或造船廠。

source: This is the name and size of the city. You can click it to rename the city, with a new default name being automatically selected if you leave the edit box blank and press enter.
zh: 此為城市的名稱與規模。你可以點擊來重新命名城市；若留空編輯框並按下 Enter，系統將自動選取新的預設名稱。

source: Cities have the potential of producing 5 different resources: food, production, gold, magical power, and spell research. People produce gold and production. The other resources are either obtained from working the surrounding lands, special buildings, and mines.
zh: 城市可生產 5 種不同資源：食物、生產、金幣、魔力與法術研究。人口生產金幣與生產力。其他資源則來自開墾周圍土地、特殊建築與礦場。

source: Each city is surrounded by farms and/or fishing colonies that provide food for the city's populace. The amount each farmer produces depends on the race inhabiting the city. Surplus food produced above the minimum needed to feed the city is used to feed your military units. The minimum amount of food required to support the city is shown in the group on the left. Surplus food is shown in the group to the right. If the city happens to be starving, a small gray food icon will represent the amount of food the city is short. Each large icon represents 10 food, while the smaller icon represents 1 food.
zh: 每座城市周圍都有農場和／或漁業聚落為城市居民提供食物。每位農民的產量取決於城市的居住種族。超過城市最低需求的剩餘食物用於供養你的軍事單位。維持城市所需的最低食物量顯示於左側群組，剩餘食物顯示於右側群組。若城市正在鬧饑荒，小型灰色食物圖示代表城市短缺的食物量。每個大圖示代表 10 食物，小圖示代表 1 食物。

source: Production is used to construct new buildings and create new military units. Workers generate production according to their race. Each large icon represents 10 production, while the smaller icon represents 1 production.
zh: 生產用於建造新建築與徵募新軍事單位。工人依據其種族產生生產力。每個大圖示代表 10 生產，小圖示代表 1 生產。

source: The amount of gold shown on the left is how much gold is required to operate the city. Net gold income is shown on the right (income - maintenance). Rivers, oceans, marketplaces, banks and merchant guilds increase your gold income by increasing commerce. Each large icon represents 10 gold, while the smaller icon represents 1 gold.
zh: 左側顯示的金幣量為維持城市運作所需的費用。右側顯示淨金幣收入（收入 - 維護）。河流、海洋、市集、銀行與商人公會可增加商業活動，進而提升你的金幣收入。每個大圖示代表 10 金幣，小圖示代表 1 金幣。

source: This is the amount of gold the city is losing each turn.
zh: 此為城市每回合流失的金幣數量。

source: Some races inherently generate magical power. Buildings such as shrines, temples, parthenons and libraries also produce magical power. This power is added to your power income. Each large icon represents 10 power, while the smaller icon represents 1 power.
zh: 某些種族天生可產生魔力。神壇、神廟、萬神殿與圖書館等建築也能產生魔力，這些魔力會加入你的魔力收入。每個大圖示代表 10 魔力，小圖示代表 1 魔力。

source: Spell research is obtained from special buildings and from power allocated to research. The research is placed directly into the wizard's spell research total each turn. Each large icon represents 10 research, while the smaller icon represents 1 research.
zh: 法術研究來自特殊建築以及分配至研究的魔力。研究點數每回合直接加入巫師的法術研究總計。每個大圖示代表 10 研究，小圖示代表 1 研究。

source: This window displays all enchantments that you or other wizards have cast on a city. Each enchantment is shown in the color of the spell caster.
zh: 此視窗顯示你或其他巫師對城市施放的所有結界。每個結界以施法者的顏色顯示。

source: This shows the current city and the surrounding area. The city does not control/work the darkened corners. If a nearby city and this city control the same square, each city receives only half of the square's value.
zh: 此處顯示目前城市及其周邊地區。城市不控制／開墾暗色角落的格子。若附近城市與本城市同時控制同一格，每座城市只獲得該格價值的一半。

source: This shows the layout of the city, with all of the buildings. Passing the mouse across a building will display its building type. A click on a building will allow you to sell the building.
zh: 此處顯示城市的配置，包含所有建築。將滑鼠移至建築上方可顯示其建築類型。點擊建築可出售該建築。

source: This area shows the item that is currently being built, and how many turns until it is completed.
zh: 此區域顯示目前正在建造的項目，以及完成所需的回合數。

source: The buy button allows you to buy the item that is currently being produced, providing you have enough gold. This completes the production of that item in one turn.
zh: 購買按鈕允許你在擁有足夠金幣的前提下，買下目前正在生產的項目。此操作將在一回合內完成該項目的生產。

source: The change button allows you to change what the city is currently producing.
zh: 更換按鈕允許你更改城市目前正在生產的項目。

source: The OK button exits the city screen.
zh: 確定按鈕離開城市畫面。

source: 2 food and 1/2 production/farmer
zh: 每位農民產出 2 食物和 1/2 生產

source: 2 production/worker
zh: 每位工人產出 2 生產

source: Produce nothing and cannot be taxed
zh: 不產生任何資源且無法課稅

source: A portrait of the wizard is displayed on a gem corresponding to his or her banner-color.
zh: 巫師的肖像顯示在對應其旗幟顏色的寶石上。

source: This is the name of the wizard.
zh: 此為巫師的名稱。

source: This area shows your relations with the wizard, any treaties you may have with that wizard, the personality of the wizard, and the overall objective of the wizard.
zh: 此區域顯示你與該巫師的關係、你們之間可能存在的任何條約、巫師的個性，以及巫師的整體目標。

source: This displays the total amount of gold in the wizard's treasury.
zh: 此處顯示巫師國庫中的金幣總量。

source: This displays the total amount of mana crystals in the wizard's reserve that he or she can draw from to cast spells.
zh: 此處顯示巫師儲備中可用於施放法術的法力水晶總量。

source: The spell ranks in the various realms are represented as books, with one book indicating one spell pick.
zh: 各領域的法術等級以書本表示，一本書代表一次法術選擇。

source: Special abilities bestow extraordinary powers on wizards.
zh: 特殊能力賦予巫師非凡的力量。

source: A complete list of heroes belonging to the wizard is shown here.
zh: 此處顯示屬於該巫師的英雄完整清單。

source: This is the name of the plane of the current map.
zh: 此為目前地圖所在位面的名稱。

source: The overland map shows a complete reduced view of all of the areas you have already explored. Cities are shown as squares, and units are shown as tiny dots in the appropriate color of their wizard owner. You can click on a particular point on the map and you are automatically centered on that location in the main view.
zh: 戰略地圖以縮小視角顯示你已探索的所有區域。城市顯示為方格，單位顯示為其所屬巫師顏色的小點。你可以點擊地圖上的特定位置，主視角將自動置中於該位置。

source: Click here to exit the map.
zh: 點擊此處離開地圖。

source: You can switch back and forth between viewing the two planes by clicking on the fold.
zh: 你可以點擊折頁在兩個位面之間切換檢視。

source: The map key shows a complete list of all wizards (and their colors) with whom you have thus far come into contact.
zh: 地圖說明顯示你迄今接觸過的所有巫師（及其顏色）完整清單。

source: The power graph shows a list of all wizards in the game and their overall power shown over time.
zh: 魔力圖表顯示遊戲中所有巫師的清單，以及其整體魔力隨時間的變化。

source: The status screen gives a quick comparison of wizard strengths and weaknesses. The longer the bar, the stronger the wizard is in that area.
zh: 狀態畫面提供巫師優勢與弱點的快速比較。長條越長，代表巫師在該方面越強。

source: Magic power is a comparison of the raw power a wizard is obtaining each turn.
zh: 魔力是對巫師每回合所獲得原始魔力的比較。

source: Spell research is a comparison of the size of a wizard's spell book measured in total base points of spells known.
zh: 法術研究是以巫師已知法術的總基礎點數衡量法術書大小的比較。

source: Army Strength is a measure of overall army strength.
zh: 軍隊實力是整體軍隊強度的衡量指標。

source: If you are transmuting gold to mana, this is the amount of gold you wish to convert. If you are transmuting mana to gold, this is the amount of gold that you will receive for the given amount of mana.
zh: 若你正在將金幣煉化為法力，此為你希望轉換的金幣數量。若你正在將法力煉化為金幣，此為給定法力數量所能獲得的金幣數量。

source: By sliding this back and forth, you affect the amount gold and mana involved.
zh: 前後滑動此滑桿可調整涉及的金幣與法力數量。

source: If you are transmuting mana to gold, this is the amount of mana you wish to convert. If you are transmuting gold to mana, this is the amount of mana that you will receive for the given amount of gold.
zh: 若你正在將法力煉化為金幣，此為你希望轉換的法力數量。若你正在將金幣煉化為法力，此為給定金幣數量所能獲得的法力數量。

source: The cancel button cancels the alchemy process.
zh: 取消按鈕取消煉金術流程。

source: The arrow button toggles between transmuting gold to mana and mana to gold.
zh: 箭頭按鈕在金幣煉化為法力與法力煉化為金幣之間切換。

source: The OK button accepts the amount of transmutation.
zh: 確定按鈕確認煉化數量。

source: Choose one of these buildings to have your city construct.
zh: 選擇其中一棟建築讓你的城市建造。

source: Choose one of these units to have your city construct.
zh: 選擇其中一種單位讓你的城市徵募。

source: The cancel button exits the building screen, taking no action.
zh: 取消按鈕離開建築畫面，不執行任何動作。

source: The OK button exits the building screen, beginning construction on the selected building or unit.
zh: 確定按鈕離開建築畫面，並開始建造所選的建築或單位。

source: This describes the benefits of constructing the selected building.
zh: 此處描述建造所選建築的效益。

source: Certain building types allow the construction of other buildings or units.
zh: 某些建築類型可以解鎖其他建築或單位的建造。

source: This is the amount of gold that is required each turn for this city to maintain the building.
zh: 此為城市每回合維護此建築所需的金幣數量。

source: This is the production cost of the building/unit. If you are building a unit, the cost is reduced due to any coal and iron mines that the city controls. The cost in parenthesis is the unit's base cost.
zh: 此為建築／單位的生產費用。若你正在建造單位，費用將因城市控制的煤礦與鐵礦而降低。括號內的費用為單位的基礎費用。

source: The total number of movement points the unit can move.
zh: 單位可移動的總移動點數。

source: Each icon represents a hand to hand strength of one in one of the following areas. A gold icon represents a bonus due to spells or special abilities. A darkened icon represents a minus.
zh: 每個圖示代表以下某個區域的 1 點近戰攻擊強度。金色圖示代表來自法術或特殊能力的加成。暗色圖示代表減項。

source: Each icon represents a ranged attack strength of one in one of the following areas. A gold icon represents a bonus due to spells or special abilities. A darkened icon represents a minus.
zh: 每個圖示代表以下某個區域的 1 點遠程攻擊強度。金色圖示代表來自法術或特殊能力的加成。暗色圖示代表減項。

source: Each icon represents an armor value of one. A gold icon represents a bonus due to spells or special abilities. A darkened icon represents a minus.
zh: 每個圖示代表 1 點防禦值。金色圖示代表來自法術或特殊能力的加成。暗色圖示代表減項。

source: Each icon represents a resistance value of one. A gold icon represents a bonus due to spells or special abilities. A darkened icon represents a minus.
zh: 每個圖示代表 1 點抗性值。金色圖示代表來自法術或特殊能力的加成。暗色圖示代表減項。

source: Each icon represents one hit point. A gold icon represents a bonus due to spells or special abilities. A darkened icon represents damage already taken.
zh: 每個圖示代表 1 點生命。金色圖示代表來自法術或特殊能力的加成。暗色圖示代表已承受的傷害。

source: Large shields add +2 to the unit's defense against all ranged attacks (including thrown and breath) and direct damage spells.
zh: 大型盾牌為單位對所有遠程攻擊（包含投擲與吐息攻擊）以及直接傷害法術的防禦增加 +2。

source: Plane shift allows the unit to shift back and forth between the planes at will. While the unit is active and the plane is changed, the unit will move back and forth between planes, although it can't shift into squares it could not normally enter, or squares occupied by enemy troops.
zh: 位面轉移允許單位隨意在位面之間轉換。當單位處於行動狀態且位面切換時，單位會在位面之間來回移動，但無法轉移至通常無法進入的格子，或被敵軍佔據的格子。

source: Wall crusher allows the unit to destroy a section of a stone wall 50% of the time in close combat, and 25% of the time with its ranged attacks, if it has any.
zh: 破牆能力允許單位在近戰時有 50% 機率摧毀一段石牆，若擁有遠程攻擊則有 25% 機率以遠程攻擊摧毀石牆。

source: Every turn, a healer will heal 25% (rounded down) of the damage that any units stacked with the healer have sustained. This ability is not cumulative, but is independent of the units' natural healing.
zh: 每回合，治療者將恢復與其編隊的所有單位已承受傷害的 25%（向下取整）。此能力不累疊，但獨立於單位的自然恢復之外。

source: Create outpost is reserved for settlers and allows them to build an outpost. The square must be at least four squares from any city. Forming the outpost eliminates the settlers.
zh: 建立前哨站是拓荒者的專屬能力，允許其建立前哨站。所在格子必須距離任何城市至少四格。建立前哨站後，拓荒者將消失。

source: Invisibility makes the unit undetectable unless adjacent to an enemy, untargetable by ranged attacks in general, and otherwise reduces any attacker's chance to hit by 1. Enemies with Illusions Immunity will ignore all of these effects, but will not extend that to their allies beyond revealing the location of the invisible unit.
zh: 隱身使單位無法被偵測（除非相鄰敵方），通常無法被遠程攻擊鎖定，且使任何攻擊者的命中機率降低 1。擁有幻術免疫的敵人將無視所有這些效果，但除了揭露隱身單位的位置外，不會將此效果延伸至其盟友。

source: All damage (including poison damage) dealt by this unit is treated the same as life stealing damage with respect to creating undead - units slain mostly by such will be raised if the battle is won. Heroes, and units with Death or Magic Immunity are exempt from the effect. If an Undead is created, it will return with full hit points, and retain whatever unit type and abilities it had in life. It counts as a Death creature, gains all related immunities (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison), but may no longer be healed or gain experience. Undead fantastic creatures have 50% higher upkeep, but normal units no longer cost food or gold to maintain.
zh: 此單位造成的所有傷害（包含毒素傷害）在創造不死生物方面與生命汲取傷害相同——若戰鬥獲勝，主要被此類傷害殺死的單位將被復活為不死生物。英雄以及擁有死亡或魔法免疫的單位不受此效果影響。若創造了不死生物，其將以滿生命回歸，並保留生前的單位類型與所有能力。其被視為死亡系生物，獲得所有相關免疫（寒冰、死亡、幻術與毒素），但不再能被治療或獲得經驗。不死系奇幻生物的維護費用提高 50%，但普通單位不再需要食物或金幣來維持。

source: Long range limits range penalties for missile attacks to a maximum of -1.
zh: 遠程射擊能力將飛彈攻擊的距離懲罰上限限制為 -1。

source: Land corruption allows the unit to corrupt any overland square that it remains on for an entire turn.
zh: 土地腐化允許單位在停留整個回合的戰略地圖格子上造成腐化。

source: Meld with nodes allows spirits to merge with a magical node and begin channeling the power of the node to you. The process of melding destroys the spirit.
zh: 融合節點允許靈體與魔法節點合而為一，並開始將節點的魔力導流給你。融合過程將摧毀該靈體。

source: Non-corporeal allows the unit to pass through any map square at a cost of 1/2 movement point, and allows it to move through walls unimpeded. However, the unit can no longer benefit from enchanted roads.
zh: 無實體允許單位以 1/2 移動點數的代價通過任何地圖格子，並可穿越城牆而不受阻礙。然而，該單位不再能從結界道路中受益。

source: Wind walking allows the unit and all stacked with it to fly on the overland map. It does not work in combat however.
zh: 風行允許單位及所有與其編隊的部隊在戰略地圖上飛行。但此能力在戰鬥中無效。

source: Regeneration allows the unit to heal one hit per combat turn, and be completely healed at the end of a combat. If the unit was destroyed but its side was victorious, the unit will come back to life, completely healed. The unit also ignores spell damage on the overland map, although it can still be hurt or destroyed by resistance-based magic. Irreversible damage, such as Stoning or Dispel Evil, may not be healed during battle, and can possibly prevent the unit from coming back if destroyed mostly by such damage.
zh: 再生允許單位每戰鬥回合恢復 1 點生命，並在戰鬥結束時完全恢復。若單位被消滅但其陣營獲勝，該單位將滿血復活。該單位在戰略地圖上也無視法術傷害，但仍可能被抗性類魔法傷害或摧毀。石化或驅邪等不可逆傷害在戰鬥中無法被治療，若單位主要因此類傷害被消滅，可能無法復活。

source: Purify allows a unit to clean corruption from a square. It takes five turns for a single unit to completely purify a map square. Additional units can reduce this though - to 3 turns if there are 2 or 3 total units; or to 2 when four or more are purifying.
zh: 淨化允許單位清除格子上的腐化。單一單位需要五回合才能完全淨化一個地圖格子。額外的單位可以縮短此時間——若共有 2 至 3 個單位則縮短至 3 回合；若有 4 個或以上單位同時淨化則縮短至 2 回合。

source: Negate first strike allows the unit to nullify the first strike ability of attackers. This special ability has no effect on thrown, breath, or gaze attacks.
zh: 抵銷先制打擊允許單位抵銷攻擊者的先制打擊能力。此特殊能力對投擲、吐息或凝視攻擊無效。

source: Luck adds +1 to all of the unit's rolls, including attack, defense, and resistance.
zh: 幸運為單位的所有擲骰增加 +1，包含攻擊、防禦與抗性。

source: Poison immunity makes the unit immune to all forms of poison attacks.
zh: 毒素免疫使單位對所有形式的毒素攻擊免疫。

source: Fire immunity grants a defense score of 50 against all fire attacks.
zh: 火焰免疫對所有火焰攻擊賦予 50 點防禦值。

source: Stoning immunity makes the unit immune to all forms of stoning.
zh: 石化免疫使單位對所有形式的石化攻擊免疫。

source: Weapon immunity grants a defense score of 10 against weapon attacks from normal units that do not have magical, mithril, adamantium, holy, eldritch, or flaming weapons. Weapon immunity triggers off melee, thrown, ranged missile, and ranged boulder attacks; but does not protect against magical attacks, heroes, fantastic creatures, or spells.
zh: 武器免疫對不擁有魔法、秘銀、精金、神聖、秘法或火焰武器的普通單位的武器攻擊賦予 10 點防禦值。武器免疫對近戰、投擲、飛彈遠程與巨石遠程攻擊有效；但無法防禦魔法攻擊、英雄、奇幻生物或法術。

source: Missiles immunity grants a defense score of 50 against all forms of missile attacks (bows, javelins, and slings). It has no effect on ranged boulder attacks, ranged magical attacks, and spells.
zh: 飛彈免疫對所有形式的飛彈攻擊（弓箭、標槍與投石）賦予 50 點防禦值。對巨石遠程攻擊、遠程魔法攻擊與法術無效。

source: Illusions immunity negates the illusionary bonus of illusionary attacks and makes the unit impervious to illusion-resistance spells. In addition, the unit can see invisible units, and does not suffer a penalty to hit when engaging them. If the unit has a ranged attack, it may also use it against invisible units, and can fire into a Wall of Darkness as normal.
zh: 幻術免疫抵銷幻術攻擊的幻術加成，並使單位對幻術抗性法術免疫。此外，該單位可以看見隱身單位，且與其交戰時不承受命中懲罰。若該單位擁有遠程攻擊，也可對隱身單位使用，並可正常對黑暗之牆內射擊。

source: Cold immunity grants a defense score of 50 against all cold attacks.
zh: 冷免疫使單位對所有冰冷攻擊獲得 50 點防禦值。

source: Magic immunity makes a unit immune to all spell damage, as well as all spells that target units, with the exception of Web. It grants a resistance bonus of +30 otherwise, and a defense score of 50 against breath- and ranged magical attacks. However, it offers no protection from combat enchantments that affect all units, such as Black Prayer or Warp Reality, although it will still prevent any damage from such spells. Doom Gaze and Chaos-enchanted magical items also ignore this ability.
zh: 魔法免疫使單位對所有法術傷害免疫，以及所有以單位為目標的法術（蜘蛛網除外）。此外獲得 +30 抗性加成，並對吐息與遠程魔法攻擊獲得 50 點防禦值。但對影響全體單位的戰鬥結界（如黑色禱告或現實扭曲）無效，不過仍可阻止此類法術造成傷害。末日凝視與混沌附魔的魔法物品同樣無視此能力。

source: Death immunity protects the unit from most effects associated with the Death realm: fear, instant death, life stealing, and curses that target a single unit. It also prevents the unit from being turned into Undead, and negates any damage it would suffer from Wrack. On the other hand, multi-unit curses such as Black Prayer and Mana Leak completely ignore this immunity, as does the unique Word of Death spell.
zh: 死亡免疫保護單位免受大多數死亡位面效果影響：恐懼、即死、生命竊取，以及以單一單位為目標的詛咒。同時防止單位被轉化為不死生物，並抵消因折磨法術受到的傷害。但黑色禱告與法力洩漏等影響多個單位的詛咒，以及獨特法術死亡之言，完全無視此免疫。

source: Can use the Spell action once per battle to cast a Healing spell:\nHeals a target unit by 5 hit points (or less, if the unit has sustained fewer than 5 hit points of damage).
zh: 每場戰鬥可使用一次法術行動施放治療術：\n回復目標單位 5 點生命（若所受傷害不足 5 點，則只回復實際傷害量）。

source: Can use the Spell action once per battle to cast a Fireball spell:\nThrows a giant exploding ball of flames at all the figures in a target unit, hitting each of them with a strength 5 magical fire attack.
zh: 每場戰鬥可使用一次法術行動施放火球術：\n向目標單位所有模型投擲一顆巨大的爆炸火球，每個模型受到強度 5 的魔法火焰攻擊。

source: Can use the Spell action once per battle to cast a Doom Bolt spell:\nCalls upon the forces of chaos to viciously tear into the target unit, causing ten points of damage regardless of defenses, although Magic Immunity and Righteousness can still negate this damage.
zh: 每場戰鬥可使用一次法術行動施放末日閃電：\n召喚混沌之力猛烈撕裂目標單位，無視防禦造成十點傷害，但魔法免疫與正義之力仍可抵消此傷害。

source: Surrounds a target unit with a fiery aura that inflicts a strength 4 magic attack on all enemies engaged in melee combat with the target unit. This magic attack is in addition to the unit's normal attacks.
zh: 以烈焰光環籠罩目標單位，對所有與目標單位進行近戰的敵人造成強度 4 的魔法攻擊。此魔法攻擊與單位的正常攻擊疊加計算。

source: Each individual enemy figure engaging or engaged by this unit in melee must resist or stand frozen in terror, unable to attack, even if swung upon.
zh: 每個與本單位近戰交鋒的敵方模型必須通過抗性檢定，否則因恐懼而僵立，無法進行攻擊，即便遭受攻擊也無法反擊。

source: Can use the Spell action once per battle to invoke the Web ability:\nCreates a sticky 12 hit point web over a target unit. Creatures stuck in this web may not move until they have destroyed it using melee and magic ranged attacks, both of which do their full force in damage against webs. The sticky remnants of the web prevent flying units that were trapped from flying for the remainder of the battle. Using this ability is not considered as spellcasting, and may not be prevented by Counter Magic or Node Auras. The resulting effect may be dispelled as normal however.
zh: 每場戰鬥可使用一次法術行動發動蜘蛛網能力：\n在目標單位上方生成一張具有 12 點生命的黏性蜘蛛網。被困生物無法移動，直到以近戰或魔法遠程攻擊將其摧毀；兩種攻擊對蜘蛛網均造成全額傷害。蜘蛛網殘留的黏性使被困飛行單位在本場戰鬥餘下時間無法飛行。使用此能力不視為施法，無法被反制魔法或節點光環阻止，但產生的效果仍可如常被解除。

source: Resistance to all increases the resistance of all friendly units in the combat by the listed bonus level. The bonus is not cumulative with other creatures with the same ability, nor does it stack with the Prayermaster hero ability.
zh: 全屬性抗性提升戰鬥中所有友方單位的抗性，提升量等於所列加成等級。此加成不與其他擁有相同能力的生物疊加，也不與祈禱大師英雄能力疊加。

source: Holy bonus increases the melee strength, defense, and resistance of all friendly units in the combat by the bonus level of the holy bonus. The bonus is not cumulative.
zh: 神聖加成依神聖加成等級提升戰鬥中所有友方單位的近戰強度、防禦與抗性。此加成不累加。

source: Armor piercing halves the effectiveness of the defender's armor rating. This occurs after enchantments have been taken into account, but before immunities are considered. Therefore, it will halve the defense gained from most protective spells, but not any defense granted by a relevant immunity.
zh: 穿甲效果使防禦方的護甲值減半。此效果在結界計算之後、免疫計算之前生效。因此大多數防護法術帶來的防禦值會被減半，但相關免疫賦予的防禦值不受影響。

source: First strike allows the unit to deal its damage before hand-to-hand attacks, but after breath, thrown, and gaze attacks. This ability only works when the unit is initiating the attack, and will not trigger on counter attacks made by it.
zh: 先制攻擊使單位在一般近戰攻擊之前、吐息、投擲與凝視攻擊之後造成傷害。此能力僅在本單位主動發起攻擊時生效，不在反擊時觸發。

source: Poison attacks force the attacked unit to resist for each level of the poison or suffer one hit for each failure.
zh: 毒素攻擊迫使被攻擊單位針對每個毒素等級進行抗性檢定，每次失敗受到一點傷害。

source: Life stealing attacks have an additional resistance check, usually with a penalty. For each point the resistance is failed, the defending unit loses one hit, while the attacker gains one. Units killed mainly by life steal return as undead under the control of their destroyer.
zh: 生命竊取攻擊附加一次抗性檢定，通常帶有懲罰。抗性每失敗一點，防禦方失去一點生命，攻擊方獲得一點生命。主要死於生命竊取的單位將以不死生物的形態復生，受其消滅者控制。

source: The attacks of this unit inflict damage automatically. There are no rolls to hit or to defend.
zh: 本單位的攻擊自動造成傷害，不需進行命中或防禦擲骰。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) force one figure in the target unit to resist or be irrevocably slain. Units destroyed mostly by irreversible damage can not regenerate and may not be raised or animated.
zh: 以附魔武器發動攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭可近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）時，迫使目標單位中一個模型進行抗性檢定，失敗則被永久消滅。主要死於不可逆傷害的單位無法再生，也無法被復活或製成傀儡。

source: Illusionary attack allows the attacking unit to ignore the defender's armor entirely.
zh: 幻象攻擊使攻擊單位完全無視防禦方的護甲。

source: Stoning touch makes one enemy figure resist or be turned to stone in addition to any other hand-to-hand attack. The unit will perform the touch once for every attack it makes (i.e. once per figure).
zh: 石化觸碰在一般近戰攻擊之外，額外迫使一個敵方模型通過抗性檢定，否則被石化。單位每次攻擊發動一次觸碰（即每個模型一次）。

source: Special ability that causes one figure in the target unit to save at -3 or die.
zh: 特殊能力，迫使目標單位中一個模型以 -3 懲罰進行死亡豁免，失敗即死。

source: Special ability that causes the enemy spell casting unit to resist or lose 2-20 spell points.
zh: 特殊能力，迫使敵方施法單位進行抗性檢定，失敗則失去 2 至 20 點法術點數。

source: Every attack made by this unit against chaos or death creatures calls upon the forces of light to envelop one enemy with holy fires. If the target figure is unable to withstand (at a penalty of 4 to resistance) the bright, holy flames it is instantly destroyed. Units that are undead (black channeled or animated) are particularly susceptible to this ability, having to resist the effect at a penalty of -9.
zh: 本單位每次攻擊混沌或死亡生物時，會召喚光明之力以神聖烈火包圍一個敵方模型。若目標模型無法承受（抗性懲罰 4）明亮的神聖火焰，則立即被消滅。不死單位（黑暗轉化或動畫傀儡）對此能力尤為脆弱，需以 -9 懲罰進行抗性檢定。

source: Grants demon-skin armor (+3 defense).
zh: 賦予惡魔皮膚護甲（+3 防禦）。

source: Grants demon wings (2 speed flight).
zh: 賦予惡魔翅膀（飛行速度 2）。

source: Grants a fixed (unimprovable) 2 strength fiery breath.
zh: 賦予固定（無法提升）的強度 2 烈焰吐息。

source: Thrown weapons allows an attacking unit to hurl its thrown weapons before engaging in hand-to-hand. This ability does not work when counter attacking against an enemy assailant.
zh: 投擲武器使攻擊單位能在進入近戰前投出投擲武器。此能力在反擊敵方攻擊時無效。

source: Fire breath allows an attacking unit to breathe a fiery blast before engaging in hand-to-hand. This ability does not work when counter attacking against an enemy assailant.
zh: 火焰吐息使攻擊單位能在進入近戰前噴出烈焰。此能力在反擊敵方攻擊時無效。

source: Lightning breath allows an attacking unit to breathe an armor piercing blast of lightning before entering hand-to-hand. This ability does not work when counter attacking against an enemy assailant.
zh: 閃電吐息使攻擊單位能在進入近戰前噴出具有穿甲效果的閃電。此能力在反擊敵方攻擊時無效。

source: Stoning gaze makes all enemy figures resist or be stoned before engaging in hand-to-hand combat. Gaze attacks come after breath and thrown attacks.
zh: 石化凝視使所有敵方模型在進入近戰前通過抗性檢定，否則被石化。凝視攻擊在吐息和投擲攻擊之後發動。

source: Doom gaze is a gaze attack that automatically does damage, with no to-hit or defense rolls. It comes before hand-to-hand combat, but after thrown and breath attacks.
zh: 末日凝視是一種自動造成傷害的凝視攻擊，無需進行命中或防禦擲骰。在近戰之前、投擲與吐息攻擊之後發動。

source: Death gaze makes all enemy figures resist or die instantly. The gaze takes effect before actual melee is entered, but comes after thrown and breath attacks.
zh: 死亡凝視迫使所有敵方模型通過抗性檢定，否則即刻死亡。凝視在進入實際近戰之前生效，但在投擲與吐息攻擊之後發動。

source: Immolation strikes all enemy figures engaged in hand-to-hand with a fire attack of strength 4.
zh: 焚燒對所有進入近戰的敵方模型造成強度 4 的火焰攻擊。

source: Grants Missiles Immunity (defense 50 against bow, javelin, and sling attacks).
zh: 賦予飛彈免疫（對弓箭、標槍與投石攻擊獲得 50 點防禦）。

source: Unit fights with twice its normal strength in melee combat, while disregarding its own safety (defense is zero regardless of other modifiers, although conditionals, such as immunities, still apply).
zh: 單位以正常近戰強度的兩倍作戰，同時無視自身安危（無論其他加成為何，防禦均降為零，但免疫等條件效果仍然適用）。

source: Any time that enemy units attempt to engage in melee combat with the cloaked unit they must first try to overcome their fright (on a per figure basis) before they can attack or counterattack.
zh: 任何敵方單位嘗試與披上恐懼斗篷的單位進行近戰時，每個模型必須先克服恐懼，才能發起攻擊或反擊。

source: Creature is now a vile undead being with +2 melee attack strength, and +1 to missile attack strength, thrown/breath attacks, hit points, resistance, and defense. Removing this enchantment does not remove the Undead property, only these bonus attributes.
zh: 生物現在成為一個邪惡的不死存在，近戰攻擊強度 +2，遠程攻擊強度、投擲／吐息攻擊、生命、抗性與防禦各 +1。移除此結界不會去除不死屬性，僅去除這些加成屬性。

source: Unit has Weapon Immunity (defense is 10 against normal weapons) and an insubstantial wraith-like form (the unit is Non-Corporeal, able to pass through walls and move over any terrain for 1/2 movement point overland, but unable to benefit from enchanted roads).
zh: 單位具有武器免疫（對普通武器防禦值為 10）並擁有虛無的幽靈形態（單位為非實體，可穿越牆壁，在戰略地圖上以 1/2 移動力穿越任何地形，但無法從附魔道路中獲益）。

source: Grants the Regeneration ability, allowing the unit to heal one hit per combat turn, and be completely healed at the end of a combat. If the unit was destroyed but its side was victorious, the unit will come back to life, completely healed. The unit also ignores spell damage on the overland map, although it can still be hurt or destroyed by resistance-based magic. Irreversible damage, such as Stoning or Dispel Evil, may not be healed during battle, and can possibly prevent the unit from coming back if destroyed mostly by such damage.
zh: 賦予再生能力，使單位每個戰鬥回合恢復一點生命，並在戰鬥結束時完全復原。若單位被消滅但己方獲勝，該單位將完全復原並重生。單位在戰略地圖上無視法術傷害，但仍可被基於抗性的魔法傷害或消滅。石化或驅邪等不可逆傷害在戰鬥中無法被治癒，若單位主要死於此類傷害，可能無法復生。

source: Endows the target unit (and any units currently stacked with that unit) with the ability to travel over all terrain it can normally enter as if it were traveling on roads (i.e., the cost is only 1/2 movement point per square).
zh: 賦予目標單位（以及當前與其同格的所有單位）能力，使其穿越可正常進入的所有地形時如同在道路上行進（即每格僅消耗 1/2 移動力）。

source: Endows the unit with the ability to walk on water. The unit's movement speed remains unchanged.
zh: 賦予單位在水面行走的能力。單位的移動速度保持不變。

source: Grants increased resistance (+10) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+10) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation.
