These bonuses do not exert cumulative effects with the spell Resist Elements however, but will override them instead.
zh: 對混沌與自然位面的元素魔法獲得提升抗性（+10），並對這兩個位面相關的傷害法術及遠程魔法攻擊獲得提升防禦（+10）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊，但賢者與幻術師英雄的攻擊除外，同時也對吐息攻擊與焚燒有效。但此加成與抵抗元素法術不累加，而是以覆蓋方式取代。

source: Grants increased resistance (+3) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+3) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation.
zh: 對混沌與自然位面的元素魔法獲得提升抗性（+3），並對這兩個位面相關的傷害法術及遠程魔法攻擊獲得提升防禦（+3）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊，但賢者與幻術師英雄的攻擊除外，同時也對吐息攻擊與焚燒有效。

source: Causes the unit's skin to harden, increasing the unit's defense (shields) by one.
zh: 使單位的皮膚硬化，防禦值（護盾）提升一點。

source: Fuses iron with the unit's skin, making it able to withstand most attacks (adds 5 to defense).
zh: 將鐵融入單位的皮膚，使其能抵禦大多數攻擊（防禦值 +5）。

source: Fills the unit with a holy purpose and increases the unit's movement speed by 1.
zh: 以神聖目標充盈單位，使其移動速度提升 1。

source: As long as the Spell Lock is in effect, no friendly enchantment on the unit may be dispelled. This also protects fantastic units from the effects of Dispel Evil, Banish, etc. The Spell Lock resists being dispelled as if it had a strength of 150.
zh: 法術封鎖生效期間，單位上的所有友方結界均無法被解除。同時保護奇幻單位免受驅邪、放逐等效果影響。法術封鎖的抗解除強度視為 150。

source: Renders the unit undetectable to all units except those with Illusions Immunity. In combat, the unit becomes visible when adjacent to an enemy unit, but still penalizes the to-hit roll of enemy units by -1, and may only be targeted with ranged attacks if the attacker is immune to illusions.
zh: 使單位對所有單位（擁有幻象免疫者除外）不可被偵測。在戰鬥中，當本單位與敵方單位相鄰時會現形，但仍對敵方命中擲骰施加 -1 懲罰，且只有對幻象免疫的攻擊者才能以遠程攻擊將其作為目標。

source: Allows the enchanted unit and all units in its stack to fly on the overland map. Does not work in combat.
zh: 允許被施法單位及其同格所有單位在戰略地圖上飛行。在戰鬥中無效。

source: Bestows the power of flight upon the unit, and increases its movement speed to 3 if it was lower.
zh: 賦予單位飛行能力，若移動速度低於 3 則提升至 3。

source: Endows the unit with a tremendously improved resistance (+5 crosses) to negative spells and effects from all magic realms!
zh: 賦予單位對所有魔法位面的負面法術與效果極大幅度的抗性提升（+5 格）！

source: Grants the Magic Immunity ability, making the unit immune to all spell damage, as well as all spells that target units, with the exception of Web. The unit gains a resistance bonus of +30 otherwise, and a defense score of 50 against breath- and ranged magical attacks. However, this spell offers no protection from combat enchantments that affect all units, such as Black Prayer or Warp Reality, although it will still prevent any damage from such spells. Doom Gaze and Chaos-enchanted magical items also ignore this ability.
zh: 賦予魔法免疫能力，使單位對所有法術傷害免疫，以及所有以單位為目標的法術（蜘蛛網除外）。此外獲得 +30 抗性加成，並對吐息與遠程魔法攻擊獲得 50 點防禦值。但此法術對影響全體單位的戰鬥結界（如黑色禱告或現實扭曲）無效，不過仍可阻止此類法術造成傷害。末日凝視與混沌附魔的魔法物品同樣無視此能力。

source: Adds +2 attack strengths to melee, thrown, and missile attacks. Flaming weapons can hit creatures with Weapon Immunity and exert cumulative effects with eldritch weapon.
zh: 對近戰、投擲與飛彈攻擊各增加 +2 攻擊強度。火焰武器可命中擁有武器免疫的生物，並與秘法武器的效果疊加。

source: The unit's ranged, thrown, and melee attacks are harder to defend against (an opponent's ability to defend decreases by one; i.e., each shield loses 10% in its ability to block a hit) and can effectively hit creatures that have Weapon Immunity. Eldritch weapon exerts cumulative effects with flame blade.
zh: 單位的遠程、投擲與近戰攻擊更難被防禦（對手的防禦能力降低一點，即每個護盾格的格擋率降低 10%），並可有效命中擁有武器免疫的生物。秘法武器與火焰刀鋒的效果疊加。

source: Grants Illusions Immunity, negating the illusionary bonus of illusionary attacks and making the unit impervious to illusion-resistance spells. In addition, the unit can see invisible units, and does not suffer a penalty to hit when engaging them. If the unit has a ranged attack, it may also use it against invisible units, and can fire into a Wall of Darkness as normal.
zh: 賦予幻象免疫，抵消幻象攻擊的幻象加成，並使單位對幻象抗性法術免疫。此外，單位可看見隱形單位，與其交戰時不受命中懲罰。若單位擁有遠程攻擊，亦可對隱形單位使用，並可正常向黑暗之牆射擊。

source: Blesses the unit's weapons, allowing them to hit creatures with Weapon Immunity and giving a +1 to-hit bonus on their melee-, thrown-, missile-, and boulder attacks in combat.
zh: 祝福單位的武器，使其能命中擁有武器免疫的生物，並在戰鬥中對近戰、投擲、飛彈與岩石攻擊賦予 +1 命中加成。

source: The entire unit becomes elite. This spell will automatically be dispelled when the unit becomes elite naturally.
zh: 整個單位晉升為精英。當單位自然成為精英時，此法術將自動解除。

source: Adds 3 to the unit's defense and resistance against all death or chaos related spells and attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms: Dark Elves (except Priests), Draconians, Dragon Turtles, Magicians, Nightmares, Stag Beetles, Warlocks, Sky Drakes, Storm Giants, and the Chaos Warrior, Draconian, Necromancer, and Warlock heroes.
zh: 對所有死亡或混沌相關的法術與攻擊（包括部分單位的吐息與遠程魔法攻擊，這些單位本身不直接隸屬這些位面：黑暗精靈（祭司除外）、龍裔、龍龜、法師、夢魘、鹿角甲蟲、術士、天空巨龍、風暴巨人，以及混沌戰士、龍裔、死靈法師與術士英雄）的防禦與抗性各 +3。

source: Adds 3 to the unit's attack strength, hits, and resistance. Does not affect breath- or ranged magical attacks.
zh: 攻擊強度、生命與抗性各 +3。不影響吐息或遠程魔法攻擊。

source: Adds +1 to the unit's melee and thrown attack strengths.
zh: 近戰與投擲攻擊強度各 +1。

source: Allows the unit to shift back and forth between the planes at will. While the unit is active and the plane is changed, the unit will move back and forth between planes, although it can't shift into squares it could not normally enter, or squares occupied by enemy troops.
zh: 允許單位隨意在位面之間穿梭。單位活躍且位面切換時，單位將在各位面間往返移動，但無法進入正常無法進入的格子，或被敵軍佔據的格子。

source: The unit's defense is increased by +2.
zh: 單位的防禦值提升 +2。

source: Grants complete immunity to all death and chaos magic that targets a unit or inflicts spell damage. In addition, the unit gains a defense of 50 against death and chaos related ranged and special attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms: Dark Elves (except Priests), Draconians, Dragon Turtles, Magicians, Nightmares, Stag Beetles, Warlocks, Sky Drakes, Storm Giants, and the Chaos Warrior, Draconian, Necromancer, and Warlock heroes.
zh: 對所有以單位為目標或造成法術傷害的死亡與混沌魔法完全免疫。此外，對死亡與混沌相關的遠程與特殊攻擊獲得 50 點防禦——包括部分單位的吐息與遠程魔法攻擊，這些單位本身不直接隸屬這些位面：黑暗精靈（祭司除外）、龍裔、龍龜、法師、夢魘、鹿角甲蟲、術士、天空巨龍、風暴巨人，以及混沌戰士、龍裔、死靈法師與術士英雄。

source: Grants Weapon Immunity, and the first two hits sustained by the unit from any attack against which it could make a defense roll are ignored. This effect does not work against doom damage and resistable damage however (e.g. Poison, Life Steal).
zh: 賦予武器免疫，並使單位從可進行防禦擲骰的攻擊中承受的前兩次命中被忽略。但此效果對末日傷害與需抗性檢定的傷害無效（如毒素、生命竊取）。

source: Chance to hit decreased by 2, defense decreased by 1.
zh: 命中機率降低 2，防禦值降低 1。

source: This unit is confused. At the beginning of each turn, the effects are determined randomly from this list: 1) unit stands confused, 2) unit moves randomly, 3) unit is controlled by the opponent this turn, and 4) unit can act normally this turn.
zh: 本單位陷入混亂。每個回合開始時，從以下清單中隨機決定效果：1）單位呆立困惑、2）單位隨機移動、3）本回合由對手控制、4）本回合可正常行動。

source: Attack strength decreased by 5. Defense decreased by 5. Resistance decreased by 5.
zh: 攻擊強度降低 5，防禦值降低 5，抗性降低 5。

source: Attack strength reduced to 1.
zh: 攻擊強度降至 1。

source: Melee, thrown, and ranged missile attack strength decreased by 2.
zh: 近戰、投擲與遠程飛彈攻擊強度各降低 2。

source: Affected unit sleeps through the remainder of combat, providing a defenseless target for enemies. If attacked by an enemy unit while in this condition, a sleeping unit takes the full force of the attack in damage.
zh: 受影響單位在戰鬥剩餘時間內沉睡，成為敵人毫無防禦的目標。在此狀態下遭受敵方攻擊時，沉睡的單位受到攻擊全額傷害。

source: Melee strength reduced by half.
zh: 近戰強度減半。

source: Reduced the defense strength of the unit by half.
zh: 單位的防禦強度減半。

source: Reduces the magical resistance of the unit to zero.
zh: 將單位的魔法抗性降至零。

source: All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn, including the opponent wizard if applicable. Additionally, all enemy units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh: 每個戰鬥回合，所有敵方施法者（包括對手巫師，如適用）流失 5 點法力。此外，所有擁有魔法遠程攻擊的敵方單位每回合失去一次法術射擊次數。

source: Doubles the unit's movement and number of attacks in combat.
zh: 戰鬥中使單位的移動與攻擊次數翻倍。

source: The unit can't fly. If the Web visual is also active on it in the tactical view, it can't move or act either, and will spend its turn attacking the Web until it is removed.
zh: 單位無法飛行。若戰術視圖中蜘蛛網的視覺效果同樣作用於其上，則無法移動或行動，並將每回合攻擊蜘蛛網直至其被移除。

source: Affected creature is bound to fight for the casting wizard until the end of combat (or until disenchanted). The bound creature disappears after combat ends.
zh: 受影響生物被束縛，為施法巫師戰鬥直至戰鬥結束（或被解除結界）。被束縛的生物在戰鬥結束後消失。

source: Possessed unit fights for the casting wizard until combat ends, at which point it will die.
zh: 被附身單位為施法巫師戰鬥直至戰鬥結束，之後死亡。

source: This indicates how much gold, food, and mana it costs to maintain this unit each turn.
zh: 表示每回合維護此單位所需的金幣、食物與法力。

source: Scrolls the list up one page at a time.
zh: 每次將清單向上捲動一頁。

source: Scrolls the list down one page at a time.
zh: 每次將清單向下捲動一頁。

source: The dismiss button allows you to get rid of units that you no longer need.
zh: 解散按鈕允許您清除不再需要的單位。

source: The OK button exits the unit view screen.
zh: 確定按鈕退出單位檢視畫面。

source: This shows the layout of the city with all of the buildings. Passing the mouse across the buildings will display their names.
zh: 顯示城市及所有建築的佈局。將滑鼠移過建築物時會顯示其名稱。

source: Troops within the city.
zh: 城市內的部隊。

source: This lists all units in the square.
zh: 列出該格內所有單位。

source: Each home represents 1/10th of a townsfolk. Each 10th of a population is shown as a house appropriate to the race of the inhabitants. Darkened homes indicate the rest of the 10 homes required to grow into a hamlet.
zh: 每棟房屋代表十分之一位居民。每十分之一人口以符合居民種族的房屋顯示。變暗的房屋表示成長為小村所需的其餘房屋數量。

source: Each home represents 1/10th of a townsfolk. Each 10th of a population is shown as a house appropriate to the race of the inhabitants. Darkened homes indicate the rest of the 10 homes required to grow into a hamlet.
zh: 每棟房屋代表十分之一位居民。每十分之一人口以符合居民種族的房屋顯示。變暗的房屋表示成長為小村所需的其餘房屋數量。

source: Each home represents 1/10th of a townsfolk. Each 10th of a population is shown as a house appropriate to the race of the inhabitants. Darkened homes indicate the rest of the 10 homes required to grow into a hamlet.
zh: 每棟房屋代表十分之一位居民。每十分之一人口以符合居民種族的房屋顯示。變暗的房屋表示成長為小村所需的其餘房屋數量。

source: This shows the basic layout of the outpost.
zh: 顯示前哨站的基本佈局。

source: The cancel button aborts the casting of the spell.
zh: 取消按鈕中止法術的施放。

source: This area explains what type of spell you are casting and the name of the spell.
zh: 此區域說明您正在施放的法術類型及其名稱。

source: By clicking on the overland map, you can select where you want your engineers to build a road to. A red line indicates that a road cannot be constructed over that path, while a blue line indicates a valid path. The number of turns it will take to complete construction of the road is also displayed.
zh: 在戰略地圖上點擊，可選擇您希望工程師建造道路的目的地。紅線表示無法沿該路徑建造道路，藍線表示路徑有效。同時顯示完成道路建設所需的回合數。

source: The OK button tells the engineers to begin building the road.
zh: 確定按鈕指示工程師開始建造道路。

source: The cancel button aborts the building of a road.
zh: 取消按鈕中止道路的建造。

source: The surveyor gives an explanation of the land that you pass your mouse pointer over.
zh: 測量師對您滑鼠指標所經過的地形提供說明。

source: The cancel button exits the surveyor.
zh: 取消按鈕退出測量師。

source: Leadership increases the melee strength of all normal units and heroes in combat by one per 3 levels of the hero, and their ranged attack strengths by one per 6 levels. Super leadership (*) increases this bonus by 50% (+1 melee strength every 2 levels, +1 ranged every 4).
zh: 領導力每 3 個英雄等級提升戰鬥中所有普通單位與英雄的近戰強度一點，每 6 個等級提升遠程攻擊強度一點。超級領導力（*）將此加成提升 50%（每 2 個等級 +1 近戰強度，每 4 個等級 +1 遠程）。

source: Legendary represents the hero's reputation and increases the frequency and strength of mercenaries approaching the wizard for hire, as well as decreases the initial hiring cost. The hero adds +3 fame per level of the hero directly to the controlling wizard's fame total. Super legendary (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 傳奇代表英雄的聲譽，提升僱傭兵主動找巫師投效的頻率與強度，並降低初始僱用費用。英雄每個等級直接為控制巫師的名望總值增加 +3 點。超級傳奇（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Blademaster increases the hero's chance to hit by +1 per 2 levels of experience. Super blademaster (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 劍聖每 2 個經驗等級提升英雄命中機率 +1。超級劍聖（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Armsmaster adds 2 experience to all units stacked with the hero at the end of each turn, per level of experience. Super armsmaster (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 武器大師每個經驗等級在每回合結束時為與英雄同格的所有單位增加 2 點經驗值。超級武器大師（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Constitution increases the hero's sturdiness beyond human norms, adding +1/level to the hero's hit points. Super constitution (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 體魄使英雄的耐久度超越常人，每個等級為英雄生命值增加 +1。超級體魄（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Might increases the hero's hand-to-hand attack by +1 per level of experience. Super might (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 神力每個經驗等級提升英雄近身攻擊 +1。超級神力（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Arcane power increases the hero's magical ranged attack by +1 per level of experience. Super arcane power (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 奧術魔力每個經驗等級提升英雄的魔法遠程攻擊 +1。超級奧術魔力（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Sage heroes contribute 3 spell research points per level of experience each turn to the controlling wizards research total. Super sage ability (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 賢者英雄每個經驗等級每回合為控制巫師的研究總值貢獻 3 點法術研究點數。超級賢者能力（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Prayermaster adds +1/level of experience to all resistance rolls for all units in the battle. Super prayermaster (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 祈禱大師每個經驗等級對戰鬥中所有單位的所有抗性擲骰增加 +1。超級祈禱大師（*）將此加成提升 50%。

source: Luck adds +1 to all of the hero's rolls, including attack, defense, and resistance.
zh: 幸運為英雄的所有骰點加 +1，包含攻擊、防禦與抗性。

source: Charmed heroes never fail a resistance roll.
zh: 受魅護英雄從不會抗性骰點失敗。

source: Noble heroes do not cost money but instead contribute 10 gold to your cause each turn.
zh: 高貴英雄不消耗金幣，反而每回合為你貢獻 10 金幣。

source: Normal troops begin as recruits. It requires 20 experience points to reach Regular status.
zh: 一般部隊起始為新兵。需要 20 點經驗值才能晉升為正規兵。

source: Regulars have enhanced combat factors. Troops created in a city with a Fighter's Guild begin as Regulars. It requires 60 experience points to achieve Veteran status.
zh: 正規兵擁有強化的戰鬥數值。在設有戰士公會的城市中訓練的部隊起始即為正規兵。需要 60 點經驗值才能晉升為老兵。

source: Veterans have enhanced combat factors. Troops created in a city with a War College begin as Veterans. It requires 120 experience points to achieve Elite status.
zh: 老兵擁有強化的戰鬥數值。在設有戰爭學院的城市中訓練的部隊起始即為老兵。需要 120 點經驗值才能晉升為精英兵。

source: Elite troops have enhanced combat factors. It requires the Warlord ability or Crusade spell to achieve Ultra Elite status.
zh: 精英兵擁有強化的戰鬥數值。需要領主天賦或十字軍法術才能晉升為超精英兵。

source: Ultra Elite troops have enhanced combat factors. It requires both the Warlord ability and the Crusade spell to achieve Champion status.
zh: 超精英兵擁有強化的戰鬥數值。需要同時具備領主天賦與十字軍法術才能晉升為勇冠三軍。

source: Champion troops have enhanced combat factors. Normal troops may never achieve a level of experience above Champion.
zh: 勇冠三軍部隊擁有強化的戰鬥數值。一般部隊的經驗等級永遠無法超越勇冠三軍。

source: All heroes begin the game at this level. It requires 20 experience points to achieve Myrmidon status.
zh: 所有英雄開局即處於此等級。需要 20 點經驗值才能晉升為蟻兵武士。

source: Myrmidons have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 60 experience points to achieve Captain status.
zh: 蟻兵武士擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 60 點經驗值才能晉升為隊長。

source: Captains have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 120 experience points to achieve Commander status.
zh: 隊長擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 120 點經驗值才能晉升為指揮官。

source: Commanders have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 200 experience points to achieve Champion status.
zh: 指揮官擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 200 點經驗值才能晉升為勇冠三軍。

source: Champions have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 300 experience points to achieve Lord status.
zh: 勇冠三軍擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 300 點經驗值才能晉升為領主。

source: Lords have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 450 experience points to achieve Grand Lord status.
zh: 領主擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 450 點經驗值才能晉升為大領主。

source: Grand Lords have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 600 experience points to achieve Super Hero status.
zh: 大領主擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 600 點經驗值才能晉升為超級英雄。

source: Super Heroes have enhanced combat factors and abilities. It requires 1000 experience points to achieve Demi-god status.
zh: 超級英雄擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。需要 1000 點經驗值才能晉升為半神。

source: Demi-gods have enhanced combat factors and abilities. A hero can never rise above Demi-god status.
zh: 半神擁有強化的戰鬥數值與能力。英雄永遠無法超越半神等級。

source: Quiver indicates the total number of ranged attacks the unit has remaining. The shots are replaced after each combat.
zh: 箭袋表示該單位剩餘的遠程攻擊總次數。每場戰鬥結束後補充。

source: Each plus increases the unit's chance to hit by 10%.
zh: 每個加號使該單位的命中機率提升 10%。

source: Each minus decreases the unit's chance to hit by 10%.
zh: 每個減號使該單位的命中機率降低 10%。

source: Construction allows units to build roads.
zh: 建設能力使單位可以建造道路。

source: Scouting increases the range a unit can see on the overland map by the scouting level.
zh: 偵察依偵察等級提升單位在戰略地圖上的視野範圍。

source: The unit has the ability to merge with the earth, pass through it, and reform itself at a destination anywhere within a 10-tile radius on the combat map. This action costs 1 movement point.
zh: 該單位能與大地融合，穿越其中，並在戰鬥地圖 10 格半徑內的任意目的地重新成形。此行動消耗 1 點移動。

source: Teleporting allows a unit to move anywhere within a 10-tile radius on the combat map for a cost of 1 movement point.
zh: 傳送能力允許單位以 1 點移動的代價在戰鬥地圖 10 格半徑內任意移動。

source: Pathfinding allows the unit and all stacked with it to move across any map square they could normally enter at the cost of 1/2 movement point.
zh: 探路能力允許該單位及與其同格的所有單位，以 1/2 移動點的代價穿越原本可進入的任何地形格。

source: Mountaineer allows all units stacked to cross mountains and hills at a cost of one movement point per square.
zh: 山地行軍允許同格所有單位以每格 1 點移動的代價越過山脈與丘陵。

source: Forester allows all units stacked to pass through forest at a cost of one movement point per square.
zh: 林地行軍允許同格所有單位以每格 1 點移動的代價穿越森林。

source: Summon demons allows the unit to summon demons in combat. Instead of attacking, the summoner may conjure one demon into combat. The demon always appears where the wizard's units began. The summoned demon will remain even after the summoning creature is slain, but the demon will disappear after combat.
zh: 召喚惡魔允許該單位在戰鬥中召喚惡魔。召喚者可以放棄攻擊，改為召喚一隻惡魔進入戰鬥。惡魔總是出現在巫師部隊的起始位置。被召喚的惡魔在召喚者戰死後仍會留存，但惡魔將在戰鬥結束後消失。

source: Undead creatures never heal normally or magically (they may still Regenerate though), and gain all the immunities (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison) and vulnerabilities of Death creatures. Undead fantastic creatures have a 50% higher upkeep cost. Undead normal units, on the other hand, no longer require food or gold to maintain - although they can't gain experience any more either.
zh: 不死生物無法透過正常或魔法方式回復生命（但仍可再生），並獲得死亡生物的所有免疫（寒冷、死亡、幻象與毒素）與弱點。不死幻異生物的維護費用高出 50%。另一方面，不死一般單位不再需要食物或金幣維持，但也無法再獲得經驗值。

source: Places all units in the targeted overland map square in stasis for 1 turn. Thereafter, each unit in stasis must resist at -5 to be freed, making one attempt every turn until successful.
zh: 將目標戰略地圖格內所有單位置入靜止狀態 1 回合。此後，每個處於靜止狀態的單位每回合進行一次抗性-5 的判定，直到成功為止才能解除。

source: Caster allows the unit to cast spells like a wizard in combat, without cost of mana points drawn from the wizard's mana reserve. Furthermore, heroes with caster ability add half the caster's skill to a wizard casting overland spells if the hero is inside the wizard's fortress. You must still provide the required mana to support the skill.
zh: 施法者能力允許該單位在戰鬥中如巫師般施放法術，無需消耗巫師法力儲備中的法力點。此外，若英雄身處巫師要塞內，具備施法者能力的英雄會為巫師施放戰略地圖法術時額外貢獻施法者技能的一半。仍須提供維持此技能所需的法力。

source: Grants the Magic Immunity ability, making the hero immune to all spell damage, as well as all spells that target units, with the exception of Web. The hero gains a resistance bonus of +30 otherwise, and a defense score of 50 against breath- and ranged magical attacks. However, this spell offers no protection from combat enchantments that affect all units, such as Black Prayer or Warp Reality, although it will still prevent any damage from such spells. Doom Gaze and Chaos-enchanted magical items also ignore this ability.
zh: 賦予魔法免疫能力，使英雄對所有法術傷害及所有以單位為目標的法術免疫（蛛網除外）。此外英雄獲得 +30 抗性加成，以及對吐息和遠程魔法攻擊獲得 50 點防禦。然而此法術無法防護影響所有單位的戰鬥結界，例如黑禱或現實扭曲，儘管仍可防止此類法術造成的傷害。末日凝視與混沌附魔魔法物品亦無視此能力。

source: Grants the Regeneration ability, allowing the hero to heal one hit per combat turn, and be completely healed at the end of a combat. If the hero is defeated but its side is victorious, they will come back to life, completely healed. The hero also ignores spell damage on the overland map, although they can still be hurt or destroyed by resistance-based magic. Irreversible damage such as Stoning will still prevent the hero from coming back if slain by such damage.
zh: 賦予再生能力，允許英雄每戰鬥回合回復 1 點生命，並在戰鬥結束時完全恢復。若英雄戰敗但己方獲勝，英雄將復活且完全恢復。英雄亦無視戰略地圖上的法術傷害，但仍可被基於抗性的魔法傷害或消滅。石化等不可逆傷害若導致英雄死亡，仍將阻止其復活。

source: Doubles the unit's movement and number of attacks in combat.
zh: 將單位在戰鬥中的移動與攻擊次數翻倍。

source: Grants Illusions Immunity, negating the illusionary bonus of illusionary attacks and making the hero impervious to illusion-resistance spells. In addition, they can see invisible units, and do not suffer a penalty to hit when engaging them. If the hero has a ranged attack, they may also use it against invisible units, and can fire into a Wall of Darkness as normal.
zh: 賦予幻象免疫，消除幻象攻擊的幻象加成，並使英雄對幻象抗性法術免疫。此外，英雄可看見隱形單位，與其交戰時亦不受命中懲罰。若英雄擁有遠程攻擊，亦可對隱形單位使用，並可正常向黑暗之牆內射擊。

source: Endows the hero (and any units stacked with them) with the ability to travel over all terrain they can normally enter as if they were traveling on roads (i.e., the cost is only 1/2 movement point per square).
zh: 使英雄（及與其同格的所有單位）能以道路速度（即每格僅需 1/2 移動點）穿越所有可正常進入的地形。

source: Grants the hero the ability to walk on water. Movement speed remains unchanged.
zh: 賦予英雄在水面行走的能力。移動速度保持不變。

source: Adds 3 to the hero's defense and resistance against all death or chaos related spells and attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms: Dark Elves (except Priests), Draconians, Dragon Turtles, Magicians, Nightmares, Stag Beetles, Warlocks, Sky Drakes, Storm Giants, and the Chaos Warrior, Draconian, Necromancer, and Warlock heroes.
zh: 對所有死亡或混沌相關法術與攻擊，為英雄的防禦與抗性各加 3——包括某些本不直接隸屬這些領域之單位的吐息及遠程魔法攻擊：黑暗精靈（祭司除外）、龍人、龍龜、魔法師、夢魘、牡鹿甲蟲、術士、天空巨龍、風暴巨人，以及混沌武士、龍人、死靈法師與術士英雄。

source: Adds 3 to the hero's attack strength, hits, and resistance. Does not affect breath- or ranged magical attacks.
zh: 為英雄的攻擊強度、生命與抗性各加 3。不影響吐息或遠程魔法攻擊。

source: Renders the hero undetectable to all enemies except those with Illusions Immunity. In combat, the hero becomes visible when adjacent to an enemy unit, but still penalizes the to-hit roll of enemy units by -1, and may only be targeted with ranged attacks if the attacker is immune to illusions.
zh: 使英雄對所有敵人隱形，具幻象免疫者除外。在戰鬥中，英雄與敵方單位相鄰時現形，但敵方單位的命中骰點仍受 -1 懲罰，且只有對幻象免疫的攻擊者才能以遠程攻擊瞄準英雄。

source: Allows the hero to shift back and forth between the planes at will. While the hero is active and the plane is changed, they will move back and forth between planes, although they can't shift into squares they could not normally enter, or squares occupied by enemy troops.
zh: 允許英雄隨意在位面之間往返穿梭。英雄行動期間若切換位面，將在各位面間移動，但無法移入通常不可進入的格子，或被敵軍佔據的格子。

source: Fills the hero with a holy purpose and increases their movement speed by 1.
zh: 以神聖使命充盈英雄，使其移動速度提升 1。

source: Grants immunity to death and chaos magic that targets a unit or inflicts damage. In addition, the hero gains a defense of 50 against death and chaos related ranged and special attacks - including the breath- and ranged magical attacks of certain units that are otherwise not directly associated with these realms: Dark Elves (except Priests), Draconians, Dragon Turtles, Magicians, Nightmares, Stag Beetles, Warlocks, Sky Drakes, Storm Giants, and the Chaos Warrior, Draconian, Necromancer, and Warlock heroes.
zh: 對以單位為目標或造成傷害的死亡與混沌魔法免疫。此外，英雄對死亡與混沌相關遠程及特殊攻擊獲得 50 點防禦——包括某些本不直接隸屬這些領域之單位的吐息及遠程魔法攻擊：黑暗精靈（祭司除外）、龍人、龍龜、魔法師、夢魘、牡鹿甲蟲、術士、天空巨龍、風暴巨人，以及混沌武士、龍人、死靈法師與術士英雄。

source: Grants Weapon Immunity, and the first two hits sustained by the hero from any attack against which they could make a defense roll are ignored. This effect does not work against doom damage and resistable damage however (e.g. Poison, Life Steal).
zh: 賦予武器免疫，且英雄每次受到可進行防禦骰點之攻擊時，前兩次命中將被無視。然而此效果對末日傷害及可抗性傷害（如毒素、生命竊取）無效。

source: Grants increased resistance (+3) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+3) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation.
zh: 對混沌與自然的元素魔法提供抗性加成（+3），並對這兩個領域相關的傷害法術與遠程魔法攻擊提供防禦加成（+3）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊（賢者與幻術師英雄的攻擊除外），亦對吐息攻擊與焚燒有效。

source: Grants increased resistance (+10) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense (+10) against damage spells and ranged magical attacks associated with these two realms. The latter includes all such attacks with the exception of those made by the Sage and Illusionist heroes, and also works against breath attacks and Immolation. These bonuses do not exert cumulative effects with the spell Resist Elements however, but will override them instead.
zh: 對混沌與自然的元素魔法提供抗性加成（+10），並對這兩個領域相關的傷害法術與遠程魔法攻擊提供防禦加成（+10）。後者涵蓋所有此類攻擊（賢者與幻術師英雄的攻擊除外），亦對吐息攻擊與焚燒有效。然而這些加成與抵禦元素法術不累積，而是將其覆蓋。

source: Any time that enemy units attempt to engage in melee combat with the cloaked hero they must first try to overcome their fright (on a per figure basis) before they can attack or counterattack.
zh: 每當敵方單位試圖與披著恐懼斗篷的英雄進行近戰時，必須先以個體為單位克服恐懼，方可攻擊或反擊。

source: Bestows the power of flight upon the hero, and increases their base movement speed (before items) to 3 if it was lower.
zh: 賦予英雄飛行能力，並將其基礎移動速度（裝備前）提升至 3（若原速度較低）。

source: Endows the hero with a tremendously improved resistance (+5 crosses) to negative spells and effects from all magic realms!
zh: 賦予英雄對所有魔法領域的負面法術與效果極大幅度的抗性提升（+5 格）！

source: Grants Missiles Immunity (defense 50 against bow, javelin, and sling attacks).
zh: 賦予飛彈免疫（對弓箭、標槍與投石攻擊獲得 50 點防禦）。

source: Adds +1 to the hero's melee strength (as well as thrown if the item is an Axe).
zh: 為英雄的近戰強度加 +1（若物品為斧頭，投擲強度亦加 +1）。

source: The hero has the ability to merge with the earth, pass through it, and reform themselves at a destination anywhere within a 10-tile radius on the combat map. This action costs 1 movement point.
zh: 英雄能與大地融合，穿越其中，並在戰鬥地圖 10 格半徑內的任意目的地重新成形。此行動消耗 1 點移動。

source: The hero normally uses a sword. This icon allows the hero to use a sword, mace, or an axe in this slot. The hero cannot equip with a bow or staff.
zh: 英雄通常使用劍。此圖示允許英雄在此欄位裝備劍、錘或斧。英雄不可裝備弓或法杖。

source: The hero normally fires a bow. This icon also allows the hero to use a sword, mace, or axe.
zh: 英雄通常使用弓。此圖示亦允許英雄使用劍、錘或斧。

source: The hero can use any melee weapon, staff, or wand.
zh: 英雄可使用任意近戰武器、法杖或魔杖。

source: The hero normally uses a staff. The hero can equip with a staff or wand.
zh: 英雄通常使用法杖。英雄可裝備法杖或魔杖。

source: This slot can hold any type of armor.
zh: 此欄位可放置任意類型的護甲。

source: This slot can hold any miscellaneous item.
zh: 此欄位可放置任意雜項物品。

source: The hero normally uses a sword. This icon allows the hero to use a sword, mace, or an axe in this slot. The hero cannot equip with a bow or staff.
zh: 英雄通常使用劍。此圖示允許英雄在此欄位裝備劍、錘或斧。英雄不可裝備弓或法杖。

source: The hero normally fires a bow. This icon also allows the hero to use a sword, mace, or axe.
zh: 英雄通常使用弓。此圖示亦允許英雄使用劍、錘或斧。

source: The hero can use any melee weapon, staff, or wand.
zh: 英雄可使用任意近戰武器、法杖或魔杖。

source: The hero normally uses a staff. The hero can equip with a staff or wand.
zh: 英雄通常使用法杖。英雄可裝備法杖或魔杖。

source: This slot can hold any type of armor.
zh: 此欄位可放置任意類型的護甲。

source: This slot can hold any miscellaneous item.
zh: 此欄位可放置任意雜項物品。

source: The spell button allows you to throw spells or use spell-like abilities.
zh: 法術按鈕允許你施放法術或使用類法術能力。

source: The wait button moves to the next unit.
zh: 等待按鈕切換至下一個單位。

source: The info button will show you what overland enchantments, city spells, and nodes affect the combat, as well as list the highest magnitude unit ability auras currently in effect for each side (e.g. Holy Bonus, Leadership).
zh: 資訊按鈕將顯示哪些戰略地圖結界、城市法術與節點影響當前戰鬥，並列出雙方目前生效的最高等級單位能力光環（如神聖加成、領導力）。

source: The auto button allows the computer to control both sides.
zh: 自動按鈕允許電腦控制雙方。

source: The flee button allows you to retreat from battle. Each fleeing unit has a 50% chance of being destroyed; fleeing heroes have a 25% chance.
zh: 逃跑按鈕允許你從戰鬥中撤退。每個逃跑單位有 50% 的機率被消滅；逃跑英雄的機率為 25%。

source: The done button ends the turn for the unit.
zh: 完成按鈕結束該單位的回合。

source: Your skill represents the total number of mana you can spend to cast spells for the entire combat.
zh: 你的技能代表整場戰鬥中可用於施放法術的法力總量。

source: The total amount of mana crystals in your reserve that you can draw from to cast spells.
zh: 你的儲備中可用於施放法術的法力水晶總量。

source: Range is a multiplier that affects the mana cost of a spell. The farther away the combat is from your Fortress, the greater the multiplier.
zh: 距離是影響法術法力消耗的倍率。戰鬥地點距你的要塞越遠，倍率越高。

source: This is the name of the attacker.
zh: 這是攻擊方的名稱。

source: This is the name of the defender.
zh: 這是防禦方的名稱。

source: All creatures of Life are bathed in the light's glow and gain one to their attack strengths, defense, and resistance. Creatures of Death are hampered by the brightness, losing one to each of their attack strengths, defense, and resistance. True Light and Darkness negate the effects of one another.
zh: 所有生命生物沐浴在光輝之中，攻擊強度、防禦與抗性各加 1。死亡生物受光芒干擾，攻擊強度、防禦與抗性各減 1。真光與黑暗相互抵消。

source: All creatures of Death are inspired by the shadows and gain one to their attack strengths, defense, and resistance. Creatures of Life are dispirited by the lack of light, losing one to each of their attack strengths, defense, and resistance. Darkness and True Light negate the effects of one another.
zh: 所有死亡生物受暗影鼓舞，攻擊強度、防禦與抗性各加 1。生命生物因缺乏光芒而沮喪，攻擊強度、防禦與抗性各減 1。黑暗與真光相互抵消。

source: All non-Chaos units, enemy or friendly, have a -2 to their chance to hit.
zh: 所有非混沌單位，無論敵我，命中機率各減 2。

source: The attack strength and defense of all enemy units is reduced by 1, and their resistance is reduced by 2.
zh: 所有敵方單位的攻擊強度與防禦各減 1，抗性減 2。

source: Every combat turn, each figure in every enemy unit must resist with a +1 bonus or take 1 point of damage.
zh: 每個戰鬥回合，每個敵方單位的每個個體必須以 +1 加成通過抗性判定，否則受到 1 點傷害。

source: Flaming melee, thrown, and missile weapons have a +1 attack strength and can inflict normal damage on units with Weapon Immunity. Metal fires and flame blade do not exert cumulative effects.
zh: 燃燒的近戰、投擲與飛彈武器攻擊強度 +1，且可對具有武器免疫的單位造成正常傷害。金屬之火與火焰刀鋒不累積效果。

source: Adds +1 to all rolls by all friendly units, including resistance rolls, attacks to hit and defense rolls.
zh: 為所有友方單位的所有骰點加 +1，包含抗性骰點、命中攻擊與防禦骰點。

source: Adds +1 to all rolls by all friendly units, including resistance rolls, attacks to hit and defense rolls (not cumulative with prayer); and increases their melee strength, defense, and resistance attributes by 2.
zh: 為所有友方單位的所有骰點加 +1，包含抗性骰點、命中攻擊與防禦骰點（與祈禱不累積）；並使其近戰強度、防禦與抗性各提升 2。

source: During every combat turn, each enemy unit must attempt (+1 bonus to resistance) to overcome the terror that grips it, or cower in fear. When a unit is cowering it cannot attack; however, the unit can still counterattack when it is defending against melee attacks initiated by the enemy.
zh: 每個戰鬥回合，每個敵方單位必須嘗試（抗性 +1 加成）克服恐懼，否則將因恐懼而退縮。退縮的單位無法攻擊；然而，面對敵方發起的近戰攻擊時，單位仍可反擊。

source: A powerful electrical storm is enveloping the battlefield. Three to five armor piercing lightning bolts of strength 8 strike random opponents at the beginning of every turn.
zh: 一場強力雷暴籠罩戰場。每回合開始時，3 至 5 道強度 8 的穿甲閃電隨機打擊敵方目標。

source: Sustains a reserve of counter magic power which resists all spells cast by the opponent as if an equally-strong dispel magic has been cast. The counter percent chance equals 100 x remaining strength / (remaining strength + target spell cost). Each spell casting attempt by the opposing wizard or their forces reduces the strength of the counter magic reserve by five mana, thereby lessening its effectiveness against subsequent spells, until the field dissipates.
zh: 維持一道反制魔法儲備，對對手施放的所有法術進行抵抗，如同施放了同等強度的解除魔法。反制成功率 = 100 × 剩餘強度 ÷（剩餘強度＋目標法術消耗）。對方巫師或其部隊每次嘗試施法，反制魔法儲備強度減少 5 點法力，直至此場域消散，對後續法術的效力逐漸降低。

source: Makes all friendly units invisible to the opponents. While invisible, the units cannot be targeted by ranged weapons and all melee attacks against them suffer a penalty to hit of one (i.e., -10% chance to hit).
zh: 使所有友方單位對對手隱形。隱形期間，單位無法被遠程武器瞄準，且對其發動的所有近戰攻擊受命中懲罰 1（即命中機率 -10%）。

source: Resists all non-Sorcery magic with a dispel strength of 50.
zh: 以 50 的解除強度抵抗所有非奧術魔法。

source: Resists all non-Chaos magic with a dispel strength of 50.
zh: 以 50 的解除強度抵抗所有非混沌魔法。

source: Resists all non-Nature magic with a dispel strength of 50.
zh: 以 50 的解除強度抵抗所有非自然魔法。

source: Being under the influence of a Sorcery node adds +2 attack, +2 defense, and +2 resistance to all Sorcery creatures.
zh: 受奧術節點影響時，所有奧術生物攻擊 +2、防禦 +2、抗性 +2。

source: Being under the influence of a Chaos node adds +2 attack, +2 defense, and +2 resistance to all Chaos creatures.
zh: 受混沌節點影響時，所有混沌生物攻擊 +2、防禦 +2、抗性 +2。

source: Being under the influence of a Nature node adds +2 attack, +2 defense, and +2 resistance to all Nature creatures.
zh: 受自然節點影響時，所有自然生物攻擊 +2、防禦 +2、抗性 +2。

source: All combat in the city takes place under the effect of the Darkness spell (+1 attack, defense, and resistance to Death creatures, -1 attack, defense, and resistance to Life creatures).
zh: 城市中的所有戰鬥在黑暗法術效果下進行（死亡生物攻擊、防禦與抗性各 +1，生命生物各 -1）。

source: All combat in the city takes place under the effect of the True Light spell (+1 attack, defense, and resistance to Life creatures, -1 attack, defense, and resistance to Death creatures).
zh: 城市中的所有戰鬥在真光法術效果下進行（生命生物攻擊、防禦與抗性各 +1，死亡生物各 -1）。

source: All creatures of chaos, regardless of allegiance, have 2 added to all of their non-spell conventional attack strengths. This affects melee-, thrown-, breath-, missile-, boulder-, and magical ranged attacks, as well as Doom Gaze.
zh: 所有混沌生物，無論陣營，所有非法術的常規攻擊強度各加 2。影響近戰、投擲、吐息、飛彈、投石及遠程魔法攻擊，以及末日凝視。

source: Covers the world in a blanket of darkness. Except for those cities protected by Heavenly Light, all combats are assumed to be covered by the spell of Darkness (+1 attack, defense, and resistance for creatures of Death; -1 attack, defense, and resistance for those of Life).
zh: 以黑暗之幕覆蓋世界。除受天堂之光保護的城市外，所有戰鬥均視為處於黑暗法術效果下（死亡生物攻擊、防禦與抗性各 +1；生命生物各 -1）。

source: Inspires all of a wizard's normal units so that their levels all raise by one (recruit become regulars, regulars become veterans, etc.).
zh: 激勵巫師所有一般單位，使其等級各提升一級（新兵升為正規兵，正規兵升為老兵，依此類推）。

source: All normal units' weapons are blessed with a +1 bonus to hit and can strike creatures immune to non-magical attacks. Not cumulative with Holy Weapon, and will prevent it from being cast while in effect.
zh: 所有一般單位的武器獲得神聖祝福，命中 +1，並可攻擊對非魔法攻擊免疫的生物。與神聖武器不累積，且生效期間無法施放神聖武器。

source: Adds 25% of total hit points (with a minimum of one hit point added) to the hit points of each of a wizard's creatures.
zh: 為巫師每個生物的生命值增加生命總量的 25%（至少增加 1 點生命）。

source: All normal creatures falling in battle become zombies at the end of the battle under the control of the casting wizard if that wizard is victorious. Zombies have 6 figures, 4 melee strength, +1 to hit, 3 defense, 3 resistance, and 3 hit points each. They move with a speed of only 1, but possess all of the characteristic immunities of Death creatures (Cold, Death, Illusions, and Poison).
zh: 若施法巫師獲勝，所有在戰鬥中陣亡的一般生物於戰鬥結束時變為殭屍，受施法巫師控制。殭屍每隊 6 個個體，近戰強度 4，命中 +1，防禦 3，抗性 3，各有 3 點生命。移動速度僅為 1，但擁有死亡生物的所有特性免疫（寒冷、死亡、幻象與毒素）。

source: This indicates how much damage the unit has taken.
zh: 此欄顯示該單位已受到的傷害量。

source: Increases the hero's defense by +1 per level of experience. Super Agility (*) increases this bonus by +50%.
zh: 每個經驗等級為英雄防禦加 +1。超級敏捷（*）使此加成額外提升 +50%。

source: Loads and runs the most recently played game.
zh: 載入並執行最近一次遊玩的遊戲。

source: Allows you to load a previously saved game and/or change the game settings.
zh: 允許你載入先前儲存的遊戲或更改遊戲設定。

source: Starts a new game.
zh: 開始新遊戲。

source: Exit Master Of Magic and return to DOS.
zh: 離開魔法大帝並返回 DOS。

source: Causes all enemy creatures to lose one point from their movement speed. If a creature's movement speed is zero, it cannot attack or move the rest of combat; but it can still strike back if attacked.
zh: 使所有敵方生物的移動速度各減 1 點。若某生物的移動速度降至零，本場戰鬥剩餘時間內無法攻擊或移動；但被攻擊時仍可反擊。

source: Loads a selected game.
zh: 載入所選遊戲。

source: Returns to Main Menu Screen.
zh: 返回主選單畫面。

source: Allows you to change the game settings.
zh: 允許你更改遊戲設定。

source: Save the current game to the selected file.
zh: 將目前遊戲儲存至所選檔案。

source: Returns to the main screen.
zh: 返回主畫面。

source: Click on an existing file in order to load that game.
zh: 點擊現有檔案以載入該遊戲。

source: Click on a file name to save your current game or load a previous one.
zh: 點擊檔案名稱以儲存目前遊戲或載入先前遊戲。

source: Accept the current game options.
zh: 接受目前遊戲選項。

source: Go back to the Main Menu Screen.
zh: 返回主選單畫面。

source: Controls the strength of both neutral forces and computer wizards.
zh: 控制中立勢力與電腦巫師的強度。

source: Recommended for first time players.
zh: 建議首次遊玩的玩家選用。

source: Recommended for effortless play.
zh: 建議輕鬆遊玩時選用。

source: Normal strength neutrals, enemy resource advantage.
zh: 中立勢力強度正常，敵方擁有資源優勢。

source: For players wanting a challenge.
zh: 適合尋求挑戰的玩家。

source: This setting should only be chosen by players who have mastered the rules, and the game.
zh: 此設定僅適合已精通規則與遊戲的玩家選用。

source: Choose from one to four opposing wizards that you will face on both worlds.
zh: 選擇你將在兩個世界中面對的 1 至 4 位對手巫師。

source: Determines the number and size of the continents of the worlds.
zh: 決定世界各大陸的數量與大小。

source: A handful of tiny islands (7% land).
zh: 少數小型島嶼（陸地佔 7%）。

source: Small, scattered islands (12% land).
zh: 零散的小型島嶼（陸地佔 12%）。

source: Fair-sized continents (18% land).
zh: 中等規模大陸（陸地佔 18%）。

source: Determines the strength of magic nodes. Myrran nodes have twice the coverage of Arcanus ones.
zh: 決定魔法節點的強度。妙然位面的節點覆蓋範圍是阿卡努斯位面的兩倍。

source: Magic nodes produce 1/2 point of power per map square they cover.
zh: 魔法節點每覆蓋 1 個地圖格產生 1/2 點魔力。

source: Magical nodes produce 1 point of power per map square covered.
zh: 魔法節點每覆蓋 1 個地圖格產生 1 點魔力。

source: Magical nodes produce 1 1/2 points of power per map square covered.
zh: 魔法節點每覆蓋 1 個地圖格產生 1 又 1/2 點魔力。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000
Upkeep: none
When your enchanted fortress is captured by an enemy you are banished to Limbo until you finish casting the Spell of Return. You may not cast any other spells while banished and you receive no power income.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：無
施法花費：1000
維護：無
當你的附魔要塞被敵人佔領，你將被流放至虛空，直到你完成施放回歸法術為止。流放期間無法施放其他任何法術，且不獲得任何魔力收入。

source: Click on a banner to select your wizard's banner color. This color will be used on your units and your city flags.
zh: 點擊旗幟以選擇你的巫師旗幟顏色。此顏色將用於你的單位與城市旗幟。

source: Wizard of nature and life. He has the special ability of Sage which increases his spell research by 25%.
zh: 自然與生命系巫師。他擁有智者的特殊能力，可提升 25% 的法術研究速度。

source: Native Shaman who specializes in nature and sorcery magic.
zh: 土著薩滿，專精自然與魔法系魔法。

source: Voodoo priestess that specializes in chaos and death magic. She is also a Conjurer, paying 25% less for all summoning spells.
zh: 巫毒女祭司，專精混沌與死亡系魔法。她同時是召喚師，所有召喚法術的施法花費減少 25%。

source: Oriental mystic that specializes in chaos and sorcery magic. He is also a Channeler and does not pay increased mana rates for casting spells in combat and only pays half the normal spell maintenance.
zh: 東方神秘師，專精混沌與魔法系魔法。他同時是通靈師，在戰鬥中施展法術無需支付額外法力，且法術維護費用只需正常的一半。

source: Nomad Sorcerer. He has the special ability of Alchemy which allows him to exchange gold and mana without loss and gives all units built in cities magic weapons.
zh: 游牧術士。他擁有煉金術的特殊能力，可在金幣與法力之間無損耗地互換，並使城市中建造的所有單位獲得魔法武器。

source: Elementalist that specializes in chaos and nature magic. He has the ability of Mana Focusing which increases the mana he obtains from allocated power by 25%.
zh: 元素師，專精混沌與自然系魔法。他擁有法力聚焦能力，可使從分配魔力中獲得的法力增加 25%。

source: Demonic force specializing in chaos magic. He has the ability of Chaos Mastery which increases his chaos research by 15%, reduces chaos casting costs by 15%, makes it twice as hard to dispel his chaos spells, and doubles the magic power he receives from chaos nodes.
zh: 專精混沌系魔法的惡魔力量。他擁有混沌精通能力，使混沌法術研究速度提升 15%、混沌法術施法花費降低 15%、解除他的混沌法術的難度翻倍，並使從混沌節點獲得的魔力翻倍。

source: Draconian warlock specializing in chaos and life magic. He is a Myrran and begins the game on the Myrror plane controlling a special race (beastmen, dark elves, draconians, dwarves, or trolls).
zh: 專精混沌與生命系魔法的龍族術士。他是密羅居民，遊戲開始時位於密羅位面，統治一個特殊種族（獸人、黑暗精靈、龍族、矮人或巨魔）。

source: Warlock specializing in death magic. He also possesses Infernal Power which increases the power and pacifying effects received from shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals by 50%.
zh: 專精死亡系魔法的術士。他還擁有地獄魔力，使從神壇、神廟、萬神殿及大教堂獲得的魔力與安撫效果提升 50%。

source: Elvish sylph that specializes in nature magic. She has the special ability of Nature Mastery which increases her nature research by 15%, reduces nature casting costs by 15%, makes it twice as hard to dispel her nature spells, and doubles the magic power she receives from nature nodes.
zh: 專精自然系魔法的精靈仙子。她擁有自然精通的特殊能力，使自然法術研究速度提升 15%、自然法術施法花費降低 15%、解除她的自然法術的難度翻倍，並使從自然節點獲得的魔力翻倍。

source: Prodigal sorcerer specializing in life and sorcery magic. He is an Archmage, which adds +10 to his spell casting skill.
zh: 專精生命與魔法系魔法的天才術士。他是大法師，法術施放技能值 +10。

source: High priestess specializing in life magic. She is Charismatic which halves the cost of hero, mercenary, and magic item offers; doubles the effect of good- and halves that of bad diplomatic actions.
zh: 專精生命系魔法的大女祭司。她具有魅力特質，可使英雄、傭兵及魔法物品的費用減半；好感外交行動效果翻倍，負面外交行動效果減半。

source: Aztec priest who specializes in nature and death magic. He possesses the special ability of Warlord which adds +1 level to all of his units, allowing them to rise above the normal limit of elite.
zh: 專精自然與死亡系魔法的阿茲特克祭司。他擁有戰爭領主的特殊能力，使旗下所有單位等級 +1，並能超越一般精英的上限。

source: Black witch who specializes in death and sorcery magic. She is an Artificer which allows her to start with the Enchant Item and Create Artifact spells and to pay 50% less to create magic items.
zh: 專精死亡與魔法系魔法的黑巫師。她是人造器師，遊戲開始時即擁有「附魔物品」與「創造神器」法術，且製作魔法物品的費用減少 50%。

source: Allows you to customize your wizard.
zh: 允許你自訂你的巫師。

source: Select your new wizard's picture.
zh: 選擇新巫師的圖像。

source: Controls whether or not digitized sounds are played. This option is ignored if your card does not support digitized sound.
zh: 控制是否播放數位音效。若你的音效卡不支援數位音效，此選項將被忽略。

source: Controls whether or not continuous 'mood' music is played in the background.
zh: 控制是否在背景持續播放「氛圍」音樂。

source: Controls whether or not special music is played when events or reports are played.
zh: 控制事件或報告出現時是否播放特殊音樂。

source: Controls whether or not you will view when city enchantment spells are thrown on your cities or enemy cities.
zh: 控制當城市結界法術施加於你的城市或敵方城市時，是否顯示相應畫面。

source: Controls whether or not you will view when overland enchantment spells are thrown.
zh: 控制施放戰略地圖結界法術時，是否顯示相應畫面。

source: Controls whether or not you will view the summoning sequence spells when they are thrown.
zh: 控制施放召喚法術時，是否顯示召喚動畫序列。

source: Controls whether or not the summary scroll is shown at the end of each turn.
zh: 控制每回合結束時是否顯示摘要卷軸。

source: Controls whether or not you will be given suggestions by the computer as the game progresses.
zh: 控制遊戲進行中是否由電腦提供建議。

source: Controls whether or not random events affecting you or anyone else occur during the game.
zh: 控制遊戲中是否發生影響你或其他人的隨機事件。

source: Controls whether or not you are prompted for the end of turn once all units have been moved.
zh: 控制所有單位移動完畢後，是否提示回合結束。

source: Controls whether or not tactical combat takes place. If turned on (check) all battles will take place automatically under computer control.
zh: 控制是否進行戰術戰鬥。若開啟（勾選），所有戰鬥將由電腦自動處理。

source: Controls wether or not in combat additional unit statistics on any unit over which the mouse is passed will be displayed. The additional information includes: the unit's attack strength, movement allowance remaining, defense, resistance, ammunition, spell points, level, and hit points.
zh: 控制戰鬥中滑鼠懸停於單位上時，是否顯示額外的單位數據。額外資訊包括：單位的攻擊強度、剩餘移動力、防禦、抗性、彈藥、法術點數、等級及生命值。

source: Controls whether or not your view will be moved while other detected enemy troops move.
zh: 控制偵測到敵軍移動時，畫面是否跟隨移動。

source: Controls whether or not spells cast by enemy wizards will be displayed.
zh: 控制敵方巫師施放法術時，是否顯示相應畫面。

source: Controls whether spells on your spell book are ordered in categories versus only realms.
zh: 控制法術書中的法術是按分類排列，還是僅依系別排列。

source: Controls whether or not the animations dealing with spells you have thrown will be displayed.
zh: 控制你施放法術時的動畫是否顯示。

source: Controls whether or not the magic aura of the controlling wizard is displayed surrounding the magic nodes on the main view map.
zh: 控制主地圖上的魔法節點是否顯示控制巫師的魔法光環。

source: Controls whether or not the help information expands out from the questioned region.
zh: 控制說明資訊是否從查詢區域展開顯示。

source: Allows the wizard to change gold into mana and mana into gold in a 1 to 1 ratio, instead of loosing 1/2 in the exchange process and gives all units built in cities magic weapons.
zh: 允許巫師以 1 比 1 的比率互換金幣與法力，不再於兌換過程中損失一半，並使城市中建造的所有單位獲得魔法武器。

source: Increases the level of all units under the wizard's control by one level. In addition, warlord allows your units to achieve ultra elite status which is otherwise unattainable. Warlord costs 2 picks.
zh: 將巫師旗下所有單位的等級提升一級。此外，戰爭領主可使你的單位達到正常情況下無法企及的超級精英狀態。戰爭領主需耗費 2 點選擇點。

source: Allows the wizard to cast spells in combat as if the battle took place at his fortress, which means the channeler does not spend any extra mana when casting any spell in combat. In addition, a channeler only pays one half the normal spell maintenance. Channeler costs 2 picks.
zh: 允許巫師在戰鬥中施放法術時，視同在自己的堡壘中作戰，即通靈師在戰鬥中施放任何法術均無需支付額外法力。此外，通靈師的法術維護費用僅需正常的一半。通靈師需耗費 2 點選擇點。

source: Increases the wizard's casting skill by +10, and makes it twice as hard to dispel any of his spells. Also, there is a 50% bonus on all power allocated to increasing skill.
zh: 將巫師的施法技能值提升 +10，並使解除其任何法術的難度翻倍。此外，所有分配用於提升技能的魔力均有 50% 的加成。

source: Reduces the cost of making magical items by 50%. Artificers also begin the game with the Enchant Item and Create Artifact spells.
zh: 將製作魔法物品的費用降低 50%。人造器師在遊戲開始時即擁有「附魔物品」與「創造神器」法術。

source: Reduces the casting costs and increases the research speed of all summoning spells by 25% and also reduces the maintenance costs of fantastic creatures by 25%.
zh: 將所有召喚法術的施法花費降低 25%、研究速度提升 25%，並使奇幻生物的維護費用降低 25%。

source: Increases the speed of the wizard's spell research in all six realms by 25% from all sources.
zh: 使巫師在全部六個系別的法術研究速度從所有來源提升 25%。

source: The wizard begins the game with a city on Myrror instead of Arcanus. Myrran wizards may start with a corresponding race: beastmen, dark elves, draconians, dwarves, or trolls. In addition, the wizard's fortress generates 5 more power. The Myrran special costs 3 picks.
zh: 巫師遊戲開始時在密羅位面擁有一座城市，而非在阿卡納斯。密羅巫師可選擇相應種族起始：獸人、黑暗精靈、龍族、矮人或巨魔。此外，巫師堡壘多產生 5 點魔力。密羅特殊能力需耗費 3 點選擇點。

source: Increases the power and the pacifying effects the wizard obtains from shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals by 50%.
zh: 使巫師從神壇、神廟、萬神殿及大教堂獲得的魔力與安撫效果提升 50%。

source: The wizard begins the game with 10 fame. Furthermore, being famous doubles the chance of the wizard being offered heroes and mercenaries for hire, and magical items for purchase.
zh: 巫師遊戲開始時擁有 10 點聲望。此外，聲名大噪使巫師獲得英雄、傭兵招募及魔法物品購買機會的概率翻倍。

source: The power of all dispel magic type spells is doubled. In addition, arcane spells have a 25% bonus to research and a 25% reduction in casting cost.
zh: 所有解除魔法類法術的魔力翻倍。此外，奧術法術的研究速度提升 25%，施法花費降低 25%。

source: The wizard possesses an unnatural presence that dramatically improves dealings with others. The charismatic wizard pays half when hiring heroes and mercenaries, and when purchasing magical items. In addition, all diplomatic penalties from negative actions are halved and good diplomatic effects are doubled.
zh: 巫師擁有超自然的魅力，大幅改善與他人的往來。魅力巫師在雇用英雄、傭兵及購買魔法物品時費用減半。此外，負面外交行動造成的懲罰減半，正面外交效果翻倍。

source: Increases the wizard's chaos spell research by 15%, reduces the casting cost of chaos spells by 15%, makes it twice as hard to dispel the wizard's chaos spells, and doubles the magic power obtained from chaos nodes.
zh: 使巫師的混沌法術研究速度提升 15%、混沌法術施法花費降低 15%、解除巫師混沌法術的難度翻倍，並使從混沌節點獲得的魔力翻倍。

source: Increases the wizard's nature spell research by 15%, reduces the casting cost of nature spells by 15%, makes it twice as hard to dispel the wizard's nature spells, and doubles the magic power obtained from nature nodes.
zh: 使巫師的自然法術研究速度提升 15%、自然法術施法花費降低 15%、解除巫師自然法術的難度翻倍，並使從自然節點獲得的魔力翻倍。

source: Increases the wizard's sorcery spell research by 15%, reduces the casting cost of sorcery spells by 15%, makes it twice as hard to dispel the wizard's sorcery spells, and doubles the magic power obtained from sorcery nodes.
zh: 使巫師的魔法系法術研究速度提升 15%、魔法系法術施法花費降低 15%、解除巫師魔法系法術的難度翻倍，並使從魔法節點獲得的魔力翻倍。

source: Increases the power and the pacifying effects the wizard obtains from shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals by 50%.
zh: 使巫師從神壇、神廟、萬神殿及大教堂獲得的魔力與安撫效果提升 50%。

source: Increases the mana obtained from power by 25%.
zh: 使從魔力中獲得的法力提升 25%。

source: Doubles the magical power obtained from all nodes. The wizard's spells are immune to the dispelling power of nodes.
zh: 使從所有節點獲得的魔力翻倍。巫師的法術對節點的解除魔力免疫。

source: Select your wizard's magic ability in each of the different realms of magic.
zh: 選擇你的巫師在各個不同魔法系別的魔法能力。

source: Accept the current wizard design. This option is only valid when you have selected all your picks.
zh: 接受目前的巫師設計。此選項僅在你已選擇所有點數後才有效。

source: The unit's physical appearance (not the attributes) are those of any fantastic unit of the casting wizard's choice. Heroes cannot be the target of this enchantment. Hint: this spell will not fool the computer players.
zh: 該單位的外觀（非屬性）將變為施法巫師所選任意奇幻單位的外觀。英雄不能成為此結界的目標。提示：此法術無法欺騙電腦玩家。

source: A special setting used to produce trade goods and convert 2 production to 1 gold. No other bonus will increase the trade goods gold revenues, including prosperity; but increasing production itself will still improve the income.
zh: 一項特殊設定，用於生產貿易商品，並將 2 點生產轉換為 1 枚金幣。任何其他加成（包括繁榮）均不會提升貿易商品的金幣收益；但提升生產本身仍會改善收入。

source: A special setting used to build new housing for the local populace to draw them into the city and increase the city's population growth rate. This only works as long as the city has not reached its maximum population yet, and its efficiency depends on the ratio of workers to current population (as opposed to their actual production output), although it will also be improved by the Builders' Hall and the Sawmill, if present.
zh: 一項特殊設定，用於為當地居民建造新住房，以吸引人口進入城市並提升城市的人口成長率。此設定僅在城市尚未達到最大人口時有效，其效率取決於工人與現有人口的比例（而非實際生產產出），但若城市擁有建築大廳及鋸木廠，效率也會隨之提升。

source: Maintenance: 0 gold/turn\n營房讓城市能夠訓練並組織軍事單位。
zh: 維護費用：0 金幣／回合\n營房讓城市能夠訓練並組織軍事單位。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nAn armory provides the city with a central location for the distribution and storage of arms and armor.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n兵器庫為城市提供武器與護甲的集中分發及儲存場所。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nA fighter's guild teaches troops basic fighting techniques. All new troops start as regulars.
zh: 維護費用：3 金幣／回合\n戰士公會傳授士兵基本戰鬥技巧。所有新部隊以正規兵身份起步。

source: Maintenance: 4 gold/turn\nAn armorer's guild provides troops with training in fighting techniques and basic battle tactics.
zh: 維護費用：4 金幣／回合\n鎧甲師公會為士兵提供戰鬥技巧及基本戰術的訓練。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA war college serves as a center for the teaching of battle strategy and tactics, as well as advanced fighting techniques. All new troops start as veterans.
zh: 維護費用：5 金幣／回合\n戰爭學院是傳授戰略戰術與高級戰鬥技巧的中心。所有新部隊以老兵身份起步。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA smithy can develop and produce quality weaponry.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n鐵匠鋪能夠研發並生產優質武器。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nStables serve as a place for the training, housing and care of mounted troops and/or war beasts.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n馬廄是騎乘部隊及戰獸的訓練、住所與照護場所。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nThe animist's guild increases each farmer's food harvest by 1, reduces unrest by 1, allows use of nightshade, and doubles the healing rate of units inside the city.
zh: 維護費用：5 金幣／回合\n泛靈師公會使每位農民的食物收穫增加 1，動亂減少 1，允許使用夜影草，並使城內單位的治療速度翻倍。

source: Maintenance: 6 gold/turn\nA city's fantastic stable will house and care for magical beasts.
zh: 維護費用：6 金幣／回合\n城市的奇幻馬廄可收容並照護魔法異獸。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA ship wrights guild brings together skilled craftsmen to build small boats.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n造船師公會匯聚技藝精湛的工匠，建造小型船隻。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA shipyard provides the city with a centralized location that has the necessary equipment and workers to produce medium-sized ships.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n船塢為城市提供具備必要設備與工人的集中場所，用以建造中型船艦。

source: Maintenance: 4 gold/turn\nA maritime guild allows the creation of large ships by training, organizing, and supporting experienced ship builders.
zh: 維護費用：4 金幣／回合\n海事公會透過訓練、組織及支援經驗豐富的造船師，使大型船艦的建造成為可能。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA sawmill will turn wood into deadly weaponry. It increases production by 25%, and improves the efficiency of Housing projects by 10%.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n鋸木廠能將木材轉化為致命武器。生產提升 25%，並使住房專案的效率提升 10%。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA library acts as a storehouse for knowledge and scholarship. It adds +2 spell research points.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n圖書館是知識與學問的寶庫。法術研究點數 +2。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA sage's guild is dedicated to the advanced study of magic. It adds +3 spell research points and allows use of nightshade.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n賢者公會專注於魔法的高階研究。法術研究點數 +3，並允許使用夜影草。

source: Maintenance: 4 gold/turn\nAn Oracle provides the city with magical guidance, detecting all enemies within 4 squares of the city and reducing unrest by 2.
zh: 維護費用：4 金幣／回合\n神諭所為城市提供魔法指引，偵測城市 4 格範圍內的所有敵人，並使動亂降低 2。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nThe alchemists' guild generates 3 power and equips all new troops with magical weapons that give +1 to hit. If there is Mithril or Adamantium nearby, it will be used to create weapons and armor granting further bonuses of attack and defense to new troops.
zh: 維護費用：3 金幣／回合\n煉金師公會產生 3 點魔力，並為所有新部隊裝備命中 +1 的魔法武器。若附近有秘銀或精金礦，將用於製作武器與護甲，為新部隊提供額外的攻擊與防禦加成。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA university serves as a stronghold for education and scholarship. It adds +5 spell research points.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n大學是教育與學術的堡壘。法術研究點數 +5。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA wizard's guild acts as a center for the study and teaching of magic. It adds +8 spell research points at an upkeep cost of 3 power points a turn.
zh: 維護費用：5 金幣／回合\n巫師公會是研究與傳授魔法的中心。法術研究點數 +8，但每回合需支付 3 點魔力作為維護費用。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA shrine provides the people of the city with a center for spiritual comfort. It adds +1 power, allows use of nightshade, and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n神壇為城市居民提供心靈慰藉的場所。魔力 +1，允許使用夜影草，動亂等級降低 1。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA temple serves as a center for basic religious instruction. It adds +2 power, allows use of nightshade, and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n神廟是基礎宗教教育的中心。魔力 +2，允許使用夜影草，動亂等級降低 1。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nA parthenon is a centralized locale for the study of religion. It adds +3 power and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護費用：3 金幣／回合\n萬神殿是研習宗教的集中場所。魔力 +3，動亂等級降低 1。

source: Maintenance: 4 gold/turn\nA cathedral provides the city with a cultural and religious center. It adds +4 power and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護費用：4 金幣／回合\n大教堂為城市提供文化與宗教中心。魔力 +4，動亂等級降低 1。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA marketplace promotes the city's economic growth by increasing the taxable revenues and precious mineral (gold, silver, gems) income of the city by +50%.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n市場透過使城市的應稅收入及貴重礦物（金、銀、寶石）收益提升 +50% 來促進城市的經濟成長。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nA bank increases the taxable revenues and precious mineral (gold, silver, gems) income of the city by +50%, in addition to the marketplace.
zh: 維護費用：3 金幣／回合\n銀行在市場的基礎上，進一步使城市的應稅收入及貴重礦物（金、銀、寶石）收益提升 +50%。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA merchant's guild increases the taxable revenues and precious mineral (gold, silver, gems) income of a city by +100%, in addition to the marketplace and bank.
zh: 維護費用：5 金幣／回合\n商人公會在市場與銀行的基礎上，進一步使城市的應稅收入及貴重礦物（金、銀、寶石）收益提升 +100%。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA granary serves as a storehouse for the city's food surplus. It adds +2 food, +2 maximum population, and +20 people per turn.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n糧倉是城市食物盈餘的儲存場所。食物 +2，最大人口 +2，每回合人口 +20。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA farmer's market acts as a centralized location for the buying and selling of the city's food surplus. It adds +3 food, +3 maximum population, and +30 people per turn.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n農夫市集是買賣城市食物盈餘的集中場所。食物 +3，最大人口 +3，每回合人口 +30。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA forester's guild trains experienced hunters and lumberjacks, increasing the food harvest by up to +2 and production by +25%.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n林業公會培訓經驗豐富的獵人與伐木工，使食物收穫最多增加 +2，生產提升 +25%。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nThe builder's hall educates workers in skilled building techniques, and increases the efficiency of Housing projects by 15%.
zh: 維護費用：1 金幣／回合\n建築大廳傳授工人精良的建築技術，並使住房專案的效率提升 15%。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA mechanician's guild teaches advanced engineering techniques, increasing the production points of a city by +50%.
zh: 維護費用：5 金幣／回合\n機械師公會傳授高級工程技術，使城市的生產點數增加 +50%。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nThe miner's guild trains workers in the intricacies of mining. It increases any special mineral bonuses by +50% and production by +50%.
zh: 維護費用：3 金幣／回合\n礦工公會傳授工人複雜的採礦技術。特殊礦物加成提升 +50%，生產提升 +50%。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nSurrounds the city with a high brick wall with towers that extend the detection range out to 3 squares, and lend the city some protection in combat.
zh: 維護費用：2 金幣／回合\n以高聳磚牆與塔樓環繞城市，偵測範圍延伸至 3 格，並在戰鬥中為城市提供一定防護。

source: When creatures are summoned by the wizard, they appear here in the summoning circle.
zh: 當巫師召喚生物時，它們將在此召喚陣中現身。

source: An earth gate serves as a teleportation portal between any two cities held by the wizard.
zh: 大地之門是巫師所擁有的任意兩座城市之間的傳送門。

source: Stream of life causes the population growth rate to double and all units in the city heal completely at the end of every game turn. The citizens are so pleased that unrest completely disappears.
zh: 生命之流使人口成長率翻倍，城內所有單位在每回合結束時完全治癒。市民對此欣喜若狂，動亂完全消失。

source: The astral gate serves as a portal to the other plane, so that units may travel back and forth.
zh: 星界之門是通往另一位面的傳送門，使單位能夠往返兩個位面。

source: Each wizard resides in his or her own fortress. This serves as a base of operations. If the fortress is lost, the wizard is banished and must cast the Spell of Return.
zh: 每位巫師居住在自己的堡壘中，作為行動基地。若堡壘淪陷，巫師將被放逐，必須施放「歸返法術」。

source: Dark rituals and sacrifices to the death gods double the power generated from shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals. Population growth is reduced by 25%, and the level of unrest is increased by 1.
zh: 向死亡諸神獻祭的黑暗儀式使神壇、神廟、萬神殿及大教堂產生的魔力翻倍。人口成長降低 25%，動亂等級提升 1。

source: The altar of battle elevates all new troops produced in the city to elite level.
zh: 戰鬥祭壇使城市生產的所有新部隊直接晉升至精英等級。

source: This is a list of treaties that the wizard has with all other wizards. The scroll indicates a wizard pact, the peace symbol indicates an alliance, and the crossed swords indicate war. The icons will be of the color of the wizard that the treaty is with.
zh: 這是巫師與所有其他巫師之間的條約清單。卷軸代表巫師協定，和平符號代表聯盟，交叉劍代表戰爭。圖示的顏色對應締約巫師的顏色。

source: Turn page of spell book.
zh: 翻至法術書上一頁。

source: Turn page of spell book.
zh: 翻至法術書下一頁。

source: Cancel spell. Caster loses all mana spent on spell but does not annoy anyone.
zh: 取消法術。施法者損失已花費在法術上的所有法力，但不會惹惱任何人。

source: The extra mana cost to spell blast the currently selected wizard.
zh: 對目前選定巫師施放法術衝擊所需的額外法力花費。

source: This wizard is not currently casting a spell.
zh: 此巫師目前未在施放任何法術。

source: This list allows the setting of the tax rate. Every member of the population pays the indicated amount of gold each turn. The tax rate causes the indicated percentage of unrest in the total city's population. Dwarves generate twice the revenue of other races and pay double the specified tax rate without an increase in the unrest. Each city's gold income is also affected by the presence of shores, rivers, and a marketplace, bank, or merchant's guild.
zh: 此清單允許設定稅率。每位居民每回合繳納所示數量的金幣。稅率會在城市總人口中造成所示百分比的動亂。矮人產生的稅收是其他種族的兩倍，且在不增加動亂的情況下繳納雙倍稅率。每座城市的金幣收入還受海岸、河流及市場、銀行或商人公會的影響。

source: This list allows you to select a specialist to give you information about your progress and environment.
zh: 此清單允許你選擇一位專家，為你提供有關進度與環境的資訊。

source: Fame decreases the total amount a wizard pays for troop maintenance by one gold for each fame point. In addition, more powerful heroes will only approach a famous wizard. \n\nA wizard may obtain fame from being famous, hiring legendary heroes, winning a major battle (4 or more opponents), building a new city, or by capturing a village, city or capitol. Likewise, any wizard losing a major battle will lose one point of fame.
zh: 聲望使巫師支付的部隊維護總費用每聲望點減少一枚金幣。此外，更強大的英雄只會主動拜訪聲名顯赫的巫師。\n\n巫師可透過聲名大噪、雇用傳奇英雄、贏得重大戰役（4 名或以上對手）、建立新城市或奪取村落、城市或首都來獲得聲望。反之，任何在重大戰役中落敗的巫師將損失一點聲望。

source: Nightshade is a magical plant that protects the city from spells. Each plant adds +100 dispel strength against any bad city enchantment.
zh: 夜影草是一種保護城市免受法術侵害的魔法植物。每株植物對任何有害城市結界增加 +100 解除強度。

source: All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn, including the opponent wizard if applicable. Additionally, all enemy units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh: 所有敵方法術施放者每回合戰鬥耗損 5 點法力，若適用則包括對手巫師。此外，所有擁有魔法遠程攻擊的敵方單位每回合失去一次法術射擊機會。

source: The virulent plague kills one population each turn if the current population exceeds a 1-10 roll. There is a 5% chance each turn that the plague will cease.
zh: 若當前人口超過 1-10 的隨機值，烈性瘟疫每回合消滅一個人口。每回合有 5% 的機率瘟疫終止。

source: The population boom doubles the population growth rate of a city. The boom will continue until a 5% chance roll cancels the event.
zh: 人口暴增使城市的人口成長率翻倍。此熱潮將持續至 5% 概率的判定取消該事件為止。

source: The rising triad of blue stars come together, doubling all power gained from sorcery nodes and halving all others. There is a 5% chance each turn that the conjunction will end.
zh: 上升的藍色三星聚合，使從魔法節點獲得的所有魔力翻倍，其餘節點魔力減半。每回合有 5% 的機率合相結束。

source: The rising triad of red stars come together, doubling all power gained from chaos nodes and halving all others. There is a 5% chance each turn that the conjunction will end.
zh: 上升的紅色三星聚合，使從混沌節點獲得的所有魔力翻倍，其餘節點魔力減半。每回合有 5% 的機率合相結束。

source: The rising triad of green stars come together, doubling all power gained from nature nodes and halving all others. There is a 5% chance each turn that the conjunction will end.
zh: 上升的綠色三星聚合，使從自然節點獲得的所有魔力翻倍，其餘節點魔力減半。每回合有 5% 的機率合相結束。

source: The moon controlling the powers over evil waxes, increasing the power from bad temples by 50% while halving the power obtained from good temples. There is a 5% chance each turn that the event will cease, returning power levels to normal.
zh: 掌管邪惡力量的月亮盈滿，使邪惡神廟的魔力提升 50%，同時使善良神廟的魔力減半。每回合有 5% 的機率該事件終止，魔力恢復正常水準。

source: The moon controlling the powers over good waxes, increasing the power from good temples by 50% while halving the power obtained from bad temples. There is a 5% chance each turn that the event will cease, returning power levels to normal.
zh: 掌管善良力量的月亮盈滿，使善良神廟的魔力提升 50%，同時使邪惡神廟的魔力減半。每回合有 5% 的機率該事件終止，魔力恢復正常水準。

source: All sources of power are shorted out. No player receives any form of new power from any source until the event ends (5% chance per turn).
zh: 所有魔力來源全部中斷。事件結束前（每回合 5% 機率），所有玩家均無法從任何來源獲得任何形式的新魔力。

source: This is the actual population of the city and the population growth rate shown in parenthesis. Each townsfolk figure represents 1000 townsfolk. The growth rate is by how many people the city grows each turn.
zh: 此為城市的實際人口及括號中顯示的人口成長率。每個市民圖示代表 1000 名市民。成長率為城市每回合增長的人口數量。

source: Death spells provide the summoning and controlling of the dead and the forces of darkness. Death magic has powerful enchantments that strike disease and misfortune upon their enemies.
zh: 死亡法術提供召喚與控制亡者及黑暗力量的能力。死亡魔法擁有強大的結界，可對敵人施以疾病與厄運。

source: Chaos spells deal primarily with corruption and destruction, calling upon the elemental forces of change.
zh: 混沌法術主要涉及腐化與毀滅，召喚變化的元素力量。

source: Life spells focus on healing, protections and inspirational enchantments, and planar travel. Life magic forcefully opposes the forces of death and mildly resists the forces of chaos.
zh: 生命法術專注於治療、防護與鼓舞性結界,以及跨位面旅行。生命魔法強力對抗死亡力量,並對混沌力量有一定抵制。

source: Nature spells control the raw forces of earth and water, as well as fertility and growth.
zh: 自然法術掌控大地與水域的原始力量,以及肥沃與生長。

source: Sorcery spells focus on elemental forces of air and illusion. Sorcery also has a number of meta-magic spells that resist and control other wizard's spells.
zh: 巫術法術專注於空氣元素力量與幻象。巫術亦擁有多種元魔法法術,可抵制並控制其他巫師的法術。

source: Maniacal wizards hate everyone, reducing the effects of positive diplomacy by 25% and increasing the diplomatic effects of hostile actions by 50%.
zh: 狂熱型巫師仇視所有人,正面外交效果降低 25%,敵對行動的外交影響則提高 50%。

source: Ruthless wizards attack with little or no provocation and are quite willing to sacrifice troops and people to achieve their goals.
zh: 冷酷型巫師幾乎不需要任何藉口便會發動攻擊,且願意犧牲軍隊與人民以達成目標。

source: Aggressive wizards will attack any time they are put in a favorable situation.
zh: 好戰型巫師只要處於有利局面,便會立即發動攻擊。

source: Chaotic wizards are totally unpredictable. One turn the chaotic may be peaceful and non-violent, while the next the wizard will go to war over any little excuse.
zh: 混沌型巫師完全無法預測。某一回合可能和平不戰,下一回合卻可能為任何微小藉口宣戰。

source: Lawful wizards will never attack anyone that they are on good terms with. However, they will react twice as strongly against unprovoked attacks.
zh: 守序型巫師絕不攻擊關係良好的對象。然而,面對無故挑釁時,其反應強度將提高一倍。

source: Peaceful wizards are eager to maintain peaceful relations even after being attacked.
zh: 和平型巫師即使遭到攻擊後,仍積極維持和平關係。

source: The pragmatist seeks a balance between military buildup, expansion, and spell research.
zh: 務實型巫師在軍事建設、版圖擴張與法術研究之間尋求平衡。

source: The militarist seeks to build great and powerful armies. The wizard will build and maintain large and powerful armies.
zh: 軍事型巫師致力於建立強大的軍隊,並維持規模龐大且實力強勁的武裝力量。

source: The theurgist will focus resources on the development of new spells with little emphasis placed on any one single area.
zh: 神術型巫師將資源集中於開發新法術,不特別偏重任何單一領域。

source: The perfectionist wishes to develop and maintain huge prosperous cities. The wizard will concentrate on creating new buildings and city improvements. The perfectionist prefers to research beneficial city enchantments.
zh: 完美型巫師希望建立並維護龐大繁榮的城市。此類巫師專注於興建新建築與城市設施,且偏好研究有益的城市結界。

source: The expansionist is primarily interested in expanding controlled territory. The wizard will spend considerable resources on settlers and new outposts.
zh: 擴張型巫師主要關注擴大控制版圖,並投入大量資源於殖民者與新據點的建設。

source: Wizard pacts are mutual agreements not to attack the opponent wizard or enter his/her territory. You agree not to move within 2 squares of any of the wizard's cities. The wizard pact does not immediately affect diplomatic relations, but instead improves the relations as long as the treaty is enforced.
zh: 巫師協定是雙方同意不攻擊對方巫師、不進入對方領土的協議。你同意不進入任何對方城市 2 格範圍內。巫師協定不立即影響外交關係,但在條約執行期間將持續改善雙方關係。

source: An alliance is a stronger version of a wizard pact. The alliance also carries with if the expectation that the allied wizard will come to the aid of the ally should someone declare war on them. The alliance does not immediately affect diplomatic relations, but instead improves the relations as long as the treaty is enforced.
zh: 同盟是巫師協定的強化版本。同盟還附帶期望:若有人對盟友宣戰,結盟巫師應前來援助。同盟不立即影響外交關係,但在條約執行期間將持續改善雙方關係。

source: You are unable to determine what units this city has in its garrison because the city is beyond your detection range.
zh: 由於此城市超出你的偵測範圍,無法得知其駐守單位。

source: Controls whether or not troops in combat will animate while moving from square to square.
zh: 控制戰鬥中的部隊在格與格之間移動時是否顯示移動動畫。

source: Blurs the outline of all friendly units making them more difficult to hit. There is a 10% chance that each point of attack damage done to these units will miss instead. This effect applies only against attacks made by other units however, and is ignored by spell effects entirely.
zh: 模糊所有友方單位的輪廓,使其更難被命中。每一點攻擊傷害有 10% 機率會對這些單位造成未命中。此效果僅對其他單位的攻擊有效,完全不受法術效果影響。

source: Displays the top 10 scores ever attained in Master Of Magic!
zh: 顯示《魔法大帝》中史上最高的前 10 名分數紀錄！

source: You receive one point for every spell that you learned.
zh: 你每學會一個法術可獲得一分。

source: You receive 1/2 a point for every thousand townsfolk you have in all cities that you control.
zh: 你所控制的所有城市中,每一千名市民可獲得 0.5 分。

source: You receive 50 points for every wizard that you banished.
zh: 你每放逐一名巫師可獲得 50 分。

source: You recieve your fame * 2 points.
zh: 你可獲得聲望值 × 2 的分數。

source: The amount of points that you recieve for time is 2000 - (total months * 2). You will only receive points for time if you actually win the game.
zh: 你因時間獲得的分數為 2000 - (總月數 × 2)。只有在實際贏得遊戲時才能獲得時間分數。

source: You receive 250 points for successfully casting the Spell Of Mastery.
zh: 你成功施放支配法術可獲得 250 分。

source:
Your final score is the sum of all points gained and then is modified by the game difficulty level.
Easy: score * .5
Normal: score * .75
Hard: score * 1
Expert: score * 2
Impossible: score * 3
zh:
你的最終分數為所有得分之總和,再依遊戲難度進行修正。
簡單:分數 × 0.5
普通:分數 × 0.75
困難:分數 × 1
專家:分數 × 2
不可能:分數 × 3

source: Controls whether or not you are prompted for confirmation on razing a city after you conquer it. If this setting is off you may still raze a captured city by pressing the 'R' key while the combat results scroll is on the screen.
zh: 控制征服城市後是否出現確認摧毀提示。若此設定關閉,仍可在戰鬥結果捲軸顯示期間按下「R」鍵摧毀已佔領的城市。

source: All nature and life spells cost 50% more than normal to cast.
zh: 所有自然與生命法術的施法花費增加 50%。

source:
A holy ritual that spreads the will of the gods over the land.
 - Unit and City Enchantments are 25% cheaper to cast.
 - Other enchantments cost 10% less.
 - Summoning creatures costs 10% more.
 - Combat spells cost 20% more to cast.
 The second and later copy of the spell cast by other wizards is cumulative but has halved effect.
zh:
一種將神明意志散布於大地的神聖儀式。
 - 單位與城市結界施法花費降低 25%。
 - 其他結界費用降低 10%。
 - 召喚生物的費用提高 10%。
 - 戰鬥法術的施法花費提高 20%。
 其他巫師重複施放此法術的效果累積,但每次減半。

source: All Dispel Magic and Dispelling Wave spells cast by the wizard during combat are twice as effective.
zh: 巫師在戰鬥中施放的所有解除魔法與解除魔法波法術效果提升一倍。

source: All of the wizard's units regain 2 health per turn in combat, including those that can not be healed otherwise. Unlike regeneration however, they will not be revived if they die.
zh: 巫師旗下所有單位在戰鬥中每回合回復 2 點生命,包括通常無法被治療的單位。但與再生不同,若這些單位死亡,並不會復活。

source: All fantastic creatures owned by the wizard gain +1 defense, +2 resistance, and +1 To Hit.
zh: 巫師旗下所有奇幻生物獲得 +1 防禦、+2 抗性,以及 +1 命中。

source: Scrolls the list up by one line.
zh: 將列表向上捲動一行。

source: Scrolls the list down by one line.
zh: 將列表向下捲動一行。

source: Switches the list below to show global spells and retorts instead.
zh: 切換下方列表以顯示全域法術與反制技能。

source: Switches the list below to show unit auras instead.
zh: 切換下方列表以顯示單位光環。

source: Prevents nature spells from being cast during combat.
zh: 阻止戰鬥中施放自然法術。

source: Prevents sorcery spells from being cast during combat.
zh: 阻止戰鬥中施放巫術法術。

source: Prevents chaos spells from being cast during combat.
zh: 阻止戰鬥中施放混沌法術。

source: Prevents life spells from being cast during combat.
zh: 阻止戰鬥中施放生命法術。

source: Prevents death spells from being cast during combat.
zh: 阻止戰鬥中施放死亡法術。

source: Large continents (27% land).
zh: 大型大陸(27% 陸地)。

source: Many large continents (36% land).
zh: 多個大型大陸(36% 陸地)。

source: Click here to fine tune the random map generation. Not recommended for new players.\n\nWARNING: some combinations of settings may cause the world creation to take very long or fail altogether. Please read the description of each setting carefully before changing it.
zh: 點此精細調整隨機地圖生成設定。不建議新手玩家使用。\n\n警告:某些設定組合可能導致世界創建耗時極長或完全失敗。請在更改前仔細閱讀每項設定的說明。

source: Click here to enable or disable optional patch features. Not recommended for new players.\n\nThese settings are saved globally, so you don't have to adjust them every time. However, they are also saved with each individual game, and may not be turned on and off once it's ongoing. If you want to use different settings, you will need to start a new campaign.
zh: 點此啟用或停用可選補丁功能。不建議新手玩家使用。\n\n這些設定會全域儲存,無需每次調整。但它們也會隨個別遊戲存檔,進行中途不可切換。若要使用不同設定,需開始新的戰役。

source: Click here to reload the wizard customization choices you made last time (portrait, name, picks, spells, and race) and proceed directly to the banner selection screen (or a new game if banner loading is also enabled).
zh: 點此重新載入上次的巫師自訂選項(肖像、名稱、選擇、法術及種族),並直接跳至旗幟選擇畫面(若旗幟載入也已啟用則直接開始新遊戲)。

source: Click here to go back to the new game screen.
zh: 點此返回新遊戲畫面。

source: Click here to reset all of these options to their defaults.
zh: 點此將所有選項重設為預設值。

source: Click here to scroll the list up.
zh: 點此向上捲動列表。

source: Click here to scroll the list down.
zh: 點此向下捲動列表。

source: Controls the amount of land tiles created by the map generator. The global Land Size setting will be adjusted accordingly. Please note that the current game versions only support at most 99 settlements at a time. As a result, creating maps with over 800 tiles is not recommended at this time.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器創建的陸地格數量,全域陸地大小設定將隨之調整。請注意,目前的遊戲版本最多同時支援 99 個聚落,因此不建議創建超過 800 格的地圖。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the maximum size of each continent. The lower this value, the more continents there will be on the map. Select "None" to disable this feature entirely. However, please note that the game's AI is continent-based, and performs comparably poorly if the entire landmass is a single huge continent.\n\nOVERRIDES: This setting has no effect if Single Continent is On. It may also be raised to the smallest safe value if too small to fit the desired amount of land tiles on the map, or if doing so would result in more than 45 continents (an AI limitation to be resolved at a later time).
zh: 控制每塊大陸的最大面積。數值越低,地圖上的大陸數量越多。選擇「無」可完全停用此功能。請注意,遊戲 AI 以大陸為單位運作,若整塊陸地為單一巨大大陸,AI 表現將相對較差。\n\n覆蓋設定:若「單一大陸」已開啟,則此設定無效。若數值過小導致無法容納所需陸地格數,或會產生超過 45 塊大陸(AI 限制,待日後解決),則會自動提升至最小安全值。

source: Turning this setting on forces the creation of a single continent, although magical nodes and towers of wizardry may still be created on off-shore islands afterwards. Please note that the game's AI is continent-based, and may perform comparably poorly with this setting enabled.\n\nOverrides: This setting is disabled on planes with less than 200 tiles if they would need to house more than 4 wizards.
zh: 開啟此設定將強制生成單一大陸,但魔法節點與巫術塔仍可能在近海島嶼上生成。請注意,遊戲 AI 以大陸為單位運作,啟用此設定可能導致 AI 表現相對較差。\n\n覆蓋設定:若位面面積不足 200 格且需容納超過 4 名巫師,則此設定將被停用。

source: Introduced in v1.50, the removal of inland lakes is meant to reduce the amount of resources the AI wastes on creating and maintaining fleets that it can not actually use. Until the problem is circumvented in a different manner, it is recommended to leave this setting turned off.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 此功能於 v1.50 引入,移除內陸湖泊的目的是減少 AI 浪費在創建與維護實際無法使用的艦隊上的資源。在以其他方式解決此問題之前,建議保持此設定關閉。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the ratio of base terrain types on the map. The Low setting yields more grasslands, while the High setting results in more hills and mountains.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制地圖基礎地形類型的比例。低設定會產生較多草原,高設定則會產生較多丘陵與山脈。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Determines whether the map generator uses the original fixed scaling when converting map elevations into basic land types. The alternative is a dynamic algorithm that aims to reproduce the terrain ratios seen on a normal medium sized map, while retaining the same general shapes and arrangements, independent of the land and continent settings, which both skew the fixed scaling results.\n\nOVERRIDES: If the game fails to find suitable locations for starting cities on the first try, all further attempts at recreating the map will always use dynamic scaling.
zh: 決定地圖生成器在將地圖高度轉換為基礎地形類型時,是否使用原始固定縮放比例。另一選項為動態演算法,旨在重現普通中型地圖上的地形比例,同時保留相同的整體形狀與配置,且不受陸地與大陸設定影響(這兩者都會扭曲固定縮放結果)。\n\n覆蓋設定:若遊戲首次嘗試找不到合適的起始城市位置,後續所有重建地圖的嘗試將一律使用動態縮放。

source: Controls whether polar caps are represented on the map with rows of tundra at the top and bottom. Removing the caps allows the habitable areas to be spread out slightly better.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制地圖頂端與底部是否以凍原列呈現極地冰帽。移除冰帽可讓適居區域的分布略為均勻。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls how far from the north and south poles - the top and bottom rows of the map - can tundra appear. Tundra is randomly converted from grassland and forest tiles (never hills or mountains) after setting the base terrain types, with the chance for each such tile to turn into tundra decreasing in a linear fashion the further away it is from the poles.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制凍原可從南北極(地圖頂端與底端列)延伸的距離。凍原在設定基礎地形類型後,從草原與森林格隨機轉換而來(絕不轉換丘陵或山脈),且每格轉為凍原的機率隨距離南北極越遠而線性遞減。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the amount of desert regions the map generator will try to create. This is not necessarily the amount there will be, as failed attempts also count, and a single region can actually span more than one continent if they are close enough to one another. Desert patches convert any non-ocean terrain in their area into desert.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器嘗試創建的沙漠區域數量。實際數量不一定與此相符,因為失敗的嘗試也計入次數,且若兩塊大陸足夠接近,單一沙漠區域實際上可以橫跨兩塊大陸。沙漠地塊會將其區域內所有非海洋地形轉換為沙漠。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the amount of swamp patches the map generator will try to create. This is not necessarily the amount there will be, as failed attempts also count, and a single patch can actually span more than one continent if they are close enough to one another. Swamp patches convert any forests in their area into swamps, but have no effect on other terrain types.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器嘗試創建的沼澤地塊數量。實際數量不一定與此相符,因為失敗的嘗試也計入次數,且若兩塊大陸足夠接近,單一地塊實際上可以橫跨兩塊大陸。沼澤地塊會將其區域內的森林轉換為沼澤,但對其他地形類型無效。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the amount of rivers that the map generator will attempt to create. Note that the actual amount is almost always less than this, as rivers flowing into each other count as separate instances, and not all shore tiles have river outflow counterparts, which prevents rivers from being created in certain locations.\n\nOverrides: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器嘗試創建的河流數量。請注意,實際數量幾乎總是少於此值,因為匯流的河流計為各自獨立的實例,且並非所有海岸格都有對應的河流出口,這會阻止河流在某些位置生成。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Allows rivers to replace hill, mountain, and desert terrain, which they originally can't. This increases both the chance of being able to generate the maximum specified amount of rivers, as well as the diversity of terrain encountered when doing tactical combat near them.\n\nOverrides: This setting has no effect if Max Rivers is set to none.
zh: 允許河流取代原本無法取代的丘陵、山脈及沙漠地形。這既能提高生成最大指定河流數量的機率,也能增加在河流附近進行戰術戰鬥時所遭遇的地形多樣性。\n\n覆蓋設定:若「最大河流數」設為無,則此設定無效。

source: Controls whether isles spawned under magical nodes or towers of wizardry can be expanded using dynamically scaled terrain, as opposed to only grasslands, which is the original behaviour. Enabling this setting also removes the 1-in-3 chance of not attempting to expand an isle at all.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制魔法節點或巫術塔下生成的島嶼是否可使用動態縮放地形擴展,而非原本僅限草原的行為。啟用此設定亦會移除三分之一機率不嘗試擴展島嶼的限制。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Determines how much emphasis the map generator places on the food availability of starting locations. The Low setting prioritises distance between capitals over food availability. The Normal setting uses a minimum food availability value, and can reduce only the distances if a suitable set of locations is not found on the first try. This is the original v1.31 behaviour. The High setting can reduce both values on failure, but has a higher initial food requirement, and yields more food on average. This is the system used in Caster of Magic.\n\nOVERRIDES: Under 300 Land Tiles, a Max Continent Size of 5 will always treat this as Low.
