zh: 決定地圖生成器在起始位置選取時對食物可用量的重視程度。低設定優先考量首都間的距離而非食物可用量。普通設定使用最低食物可用量門檻,若第一次嘗試找不到合適位置,可僅縮減距離要求,此為原始 v1.31 行為。高設定在失敗時可同時縮減兩項數值,但初始食物需求較高,平均食物產出也較多,此為《魔法施放者》所採用的系統。\n\n覆蓋設定:在陸地格數低於 300 時,最大大陸面積設為 5 將一律視為低設定。

source: Toggles whether starting cities are considered when creating initial roads between settlements. Please note that having a starting road is a double-edged sword. While it may yield some additional gold, it will also make it easier for raiders, rampaging monsters, and even the armies of rival wizards to reach the city.\n\nOverrides: This setting has no effect if Max Road Length is 4 or less.
zh: 切換起始城市是否納入聚落間初始道路的生成考量。請注意,擁有起始道路是把雙刃劍——雖然可能帶來額外金幣,但也會讓劫掠者、橫衝直撞的怪物,甚至敵對巫師的軍隊更容易抵達城市。\n\n覆蓋設定:若「最大道路長度」設為 4 或以下,則此設定無效。

source: Controls the maximum distance over which the viability of roads will be examined by the map generator. Roads are created between cities that are at most this far apart, but only if an unbroken, straight line of land tiles exists between the settlements. To disable initial roads altogether, please select a distance of 3.\n\nOverrides: This setting has no effect if Capital Roads is off and Max Neutral Cities is set to none.
zh: 控制地圖生成器評估道路可行性的最大距離。道路只會在相距不超過此距離的城市之間建立,且前提是聚落之間存在連續不中斷的直線陸地格。若要完全停用初始道路,請選擇距離 3。\n\n覆蓋設定:若「首都道路」已關閉且「最大中立城市數」設為無,則此設定無效。

source: Controls the amount of terrain specials the map generator will attempt to create. These are created in overlapping grids of 8-by-8 (Arcanus) or 6-by-6 (Myrror) tiles, with the top left tile shifted by 4 or 3 tiles respectively between attempts, first right, then down, in nested loops. If a selected tile is invalid (e.g. non-land), the attempt for that cell is wasted. Select Low to further discard half of the attempts, or High to roll twice in every cell.\n\nOverrides: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器嘗試創建的地形特殊資源數量。這些資源在重疊的 8×8(阿卡那斯)或 6×6(米爾)格網中生成,每次嘗試時左上角格分別向右移動 4 或 3 格,再向下,以巢狀迴圈進行。若選取的格無效(如非陸地),則該格的嘗試浪費。選擇低設定可進一步捨棄一半的嘗試次數,高設定則在每個格擲骰兩次。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the quality of the minerals created by the map generator. The Low setting yields mostly lower value ores, while the High setting results in better minerals, and allows adamantium and crysx crystals to appear on Arcanus as well.\n\nOverrides: None.
zh: 控制地圖生成器創建的礦物品質。低設定主要產出低價值礦石,高設定則產出品質更好的礦物,並允許精金與晶石在阿卡那斯位面出現。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Enabling this option forces the map generator to assign creature and treasure budgets to magical node encounters as if the game was created using the highest Magic setting. Consequently, this option has no effect in games played on that setting.\n\nOVERRIDES: The Extra Node Power patch option automatically activates this setting during map generation.
zh: 啟用此選項將強制地圖生成器在分配魔法節點遭遇的生物與寶藏預算時,如同使用最高魔力設定創建遊戲一般。因此,在使用該設定進行的遊戲中,此選項無效。\n\n覆蓋設定:「額外節點魔力」補丁選項會在地圖生成期間自動啟用此設定。

source:
Multiplies the random range and constant components (but not the random multiplier) of the budget formula for Towers of Wizardry with the selected value. For example, a setting of 2 turns the original
random(11) x 50 + 650
into:
random(22) x 50 + 1300
Please note that this can make "opening" the other plane significantly more difficult.

OVERRIDES: This setting is ignored in games created with the v1.51 Treasure patch option.
zh:
將巫術塔預算公式的隨機範圍與常數分量(但不包括隨機乘數)乘以所選數值。例如,設定為 2 時,原本的
random(11) x 50 + 650
變為:
random(22) x 50 + 1300
請注意,這可能使「開啟」另一個位面變得相當困難。

覆蓋設定:使用 v1.51 寶藏補丁選項創建的遊戲將忽略此設定。

source:
Multiplies the random range and constant component (but not the random multiplier) of the budget formula for normal lairs with the selected value. For example, a setting of 2 turns the original
random(29) x 50 + 50
into:
random(58) x 50 + 100
Or, on Myrror, the
random(24) x 100 + 100
into:
random(48) x 100 + 200

OVERRIDES: This setting is ignored in games created with the v1.51 Treasure patch option.
zh:
將普通巢穴預算公式的隨機範圍與常數分量(但不包括隨機乘數)乘以所選數值。例如,設定為 2 時,原本的
random(29) x 50 + 50
變為:
random(58) x 50 + 100
或在米爾位面,原本的
random(24) x 100 + 100
變為:
random(48) x 100 + 200

覆蓋設定:使用 v1.51 寶藏補丁選項創建的遊戲將忽略此設定。

source:
Multiplies the random range (but not the multiplier) of the budget formula for weak lairs with the selected value. For example, a setting of 10 turns the original
random(10) x 10
into:
random(100) x 10
Or, on Myrror, the
random(20) x 10
into:
random(200) x 10

OVERRIDES: This setting is ignored in games created with the v1.51 Treasure patch option.
zh:
將弱小巢穴預算公式的隨機範圍(但不包括乘數)乘以所選數值。例如,設定為 10 時,原本的
random(10) x 10
變為:
random(100) x 10
或在米爾位面,原本的
random(20) x 10
變為:
random(200) x 10

覆蓋設定:使用 v1.51 寶藏補丁選項創建的遊戲將忽略此設定。

source: Controls which realms of creatures will be used to populate Monster Lairs, Mysterious Caves, Dungeons, and Abandoned Keeps. 1 corresponds to the bugged 1.31 behaviour, where these sites always feature Nature guardians. 2 is the Insecticide system of Nature defenders 50% ot the time, Chaos the other 50%. 3 is the original design without the bug: 20% Nature, 40% Chaos, and 40% Death. 4 and 5 add Sorcery and Life creatures into the mix respectively, although Chaos and Death are still featured twice as often as the other realms.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制哪些領域的生物將用於填充怪物巢穴、神秘洞穴、地牢及廢棄要塞。1 對應有缺陷的 1.31 行為,這些地點永遠由自然守衛駐守。2 為殺蟲劑系統,自然防衛者佔 50%,混沌佔另外 50%。3 為無缺陷的原始設計:20% 自然、40% 混沌、40% 死亡。4 與 5 分別將巫術與生命生物加入組合,但混沌與死亡仍以其他領域兩倍的頻率出現。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Determines the amount of creature combinations available for a given encounter budget. Lower values result in stronger, but fewer monsters, while higher settings lean towards less powerful, but more numerous enemies. 2 matches to the original 1.31 system (primary budget divisor between 1 and 4, at most 8 primary creatures), and 4 matches 1.50 (divisor between 1 and 6, but with a maximum primary count of only 6). The rest of the settings all have a maximum primary count of 8, and use a more complex "throwback" mechanic with an increasing maximum primary divisor (2 at 1, 4 at 3, 6 at 5, and 8 at 6).\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 決定特定遭遇預算下可用的生物組合數量。較低的數值會產生更強但數量較少的怪物,較高的設定則傾向較弱但數量更多的敵人。2 對應原始 1.31 系統(主要預算除數介於 1 到 4 之間,最多 8 個主要生物),4 對應 1.50(除數介於 1 到 6,但主要數量上限僅為 6)。其餘設定的主要數量上限均為 8,並使用更複雜的「回溯」機制,隨著最大主要除數遞增(1 時為 2,3 時為 4,5 時為 6,6 時為 8)。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source: Controls the amount of neutral cities the game will try to create. Note that without the More Precise Neutrals patch feature, the actual amount of neutral cities will typically be less than what is set here. How much less is proportional to the Land Size or the amount of Land Tiles, as the original system requires neutral cities to be at least 4 tiles away from encounter zones. On the smallest maps, this criteria usually can't be met at all, resulting in no neutral cities regardless of this setting.\n\nOVERRIDES: None.
zh: 控制遊戲嘗試創建的中立城市數量。請注意,若未使用「更精確中立城市」補丁功能,實際的中立城市數量通常會少於此設定值。少多少與陸地大小或陸地格數量成比例,因為原始系統要求中立城市距遭遇區至少 4 格。在最小的地圖上,此條件通常完全無法達成,無論此設定為何都不會有中立城市。\n\n覆蓋設定:無。

source:
Controls the starting population of neutral cities. Low always yields populations of 2-5. Normal (v1.31 rules) adds +1 population above the Easy difficulty, along with a 20% chance to roll 1-10 instead of 2-5. High increases the chance to start with 1-10 population to 20% per level of difficulty (100% on Impossible), and the additional population also scales (+4 on Impossible).
WARNING: the High setting can make the early stages of the game much more difficult and luck-dependent!

OVERRIDES: This setting has no effect if Max Neutral Cities is set to none.
zh:
控制中立城市的起始人口。低設定一律產生 2-5 的人口。普通設定(v1.31 規則)在簡單難度以上各增加 +1 人口,並有 20% 機率擲出 1-10 而非 2-5。高設定將起始人口為 1-10 的機率提升至每難度等級 20%(不可能難度為 100%),附加人口也會隨之擴展(不可能難度為 +4)。
警告:高設定可能使遊戲早期階段更加困難且依賴運氣！

覆蓋設定:若「最大中立城市數」設為無,則此設定無效。

source:
Controls the starting buildings in neutral cities. The original lineup, with required population in parentheses: (2) Barracks, (3) Smithy, (4) Builders' Hall, (5) Armory, (7) Granary, (8) Stables, (10) City Walls, (12) Fighters' Guild, (13) Armorers' Guild, (14) Shrine.
With Advanced Neutrals: (1) Barracks, (2) Smithy, (3) Builders' Hall, (4) Granary, (5) Armory, (6) Sawmill, (7) Stables, (8) Shrine, (9) Temple, (10) City Walls, (11) Fighters' Guild, (12) Armorers' Guild, (13) Animists' Guild, (14) Parthenon.
WARNING: this can make the early stages of the game much more difficult!

OVERRIDES: This setting has no effect if Max Neutral Cities is set to none.
zh:
控制中立城市的起始建築。原始建築序列(括號內為所需人口):(2) 兵營、(3) 鐵匠舖、(4) 建造者大廳、(5) 軍械庫、(7) 糧倉、(8) 馬廄、(10) 城牆、(12) 戰士公會、(13) 鎧甲師公會、(14) 神龕。
進階中立設定:(1) 兵營、(2) 鐵匠舖、(3) 建造者大廳、(4) 糧倉、(5) 軍械庫、(6) 鋸木廠、(7) 馬廄、(8) 神龕、(9) 神殿、(10) 城牆、(11) 戰士公會、(12) 鎧甲師公會、(13) 動物師公會、(14) 萬神殿。
警告:這可能使遊戲早期階段更加困難！

覆蓋設定:若「最大中立城市數」設為無,則此設定無效。

source: Enables fine tuning the random map generator. An extra button will appear on the new game screen, which can be used to adjust further parameters besides land size. Not recommended for new players.
zh: 啟用隨機地圖生成器的精細調整功能。新遊戲畫面將出現一個額外按鈕,可用於調整陸地大小以外的更多參數。不建議新手玩家使用。

source: Enables separate adjustment of the random map generator settings for Arcanus and Myrror. This option has no effect unless Custom Worlds is enabled.
zh: 啟用阿卡那斯與米爾位面的隨機地圖生成器設定分別調整功能。除非「自訂世界」已啟用,否則此選項無效。

source: Enables reloading the last saved wizard profile from the new game screen. An extra button will appear, which can be used to quickstart a game with the same wizard used in the previous one. Changes made to game options (difficulty, opponents, etc.), patch features, and map settings will still apply, allowing restarts with different settings.
zh: 啟用從新遊戲畫面重新載入最後儲存的巫師設定檔功能。將出現一個額外按鈕,可用於以與上次相同的巫師快速開始遊戲。對遊戲選項(難度、對手等)、補丁功能及地圖設定所做的更改仍會套用,允許以不同設定重新開始。

source: Last profile loading now also includes the selected banner, and will immediately create a new game instead of stopping on the banner selection screen. This setting has no effect unless Last Profile Reload is enabled.
zh: 最後設定檔載入現在亦包含已選旗幟,並將直接創建新遊戲,而非停在旗幟選擇畫面。除非「最後設定檔重新載入」已啟用,否則此設定無效。

source: Originally, above Normal difficulty, computer players starting on Arcanus are only allowed to select Halflings, High Elves, High Men, Klackons, or Nomads as their starting race. Enabling this setting removes that restriction.
zh: 原本在普通難度以上,在阿卡那斯位面起始的電腦玩家只能選擇半身人、高等精靈、高等人類、克拉克昆或遊牧民族作為起始種族。啟用此設定可移除該限制。

source: Enable this setting to use the encounter budget and treasure rules of the unofficial v1.51 patch. These yield tougher encounters and more treasure than the defaults, but award less spellbooks and retorts. There is also no reverse treasure adjustment for difficulty, resulting in proportionately less treasure on the lower difficulties. Enabling this option overrides some of the custom map generator settings that now allow increasing lair budgets without changing any of the game mechanics.
zh: 啟用此設定後，遭遇預算與寶藏規則改採非官方 v1.51 修正檔的標準。與預設值相比，遭遇更加艱難、寶藏也更豐富，但獲得的法術書與天賦較少。此外，難度不再反向調整寶藏數量，因此在較低難度下寶藏比例也相對較少。啟用此選項會覆蓋部分自訂地圖生成器設定，這些設定原本允許在不更動任何遊戲機制的前提下提高巢穴預算。

source: Enabling this setting causes magical nodes to yield one extra point of Power per tile covered by their zone of influence. This replaces the Insecticide "x2" and "x2.5" Magic settings without blowing the encounter budgets for nodes out of proportion as a result.
zh: 啟用此設定後，魔法節點在其影響範圍內每格可多產出 1 點魔力。此設定取代了 Insecticide 的「×2」與「×2.5」魔法選項，同時不會使節點的遭遇預算失去平衡。

source: Enable this setting to prevent Towers of Wizardry from connecting to the same set of continents on the planes unless they are at least 10 tiles away from each other. This setting mainly affects smaller maps, as on larger Land Sizes, the towers will be adequately spread out anyway. Note that enabling this setting results in more "one-sided" towers (only one side is connected to land, the other is on an island), and can noticeably increase the time it takes to generate the map.\nThis setting has no effect on the Old Tower Generator.
zh: 啟用此設定後，除非兩座巫師之塔之間相距至少 10 格，否則不允許它們在位面上連接相同的大陸群。此設定主要影響較小的地圖；在較大的地圖上，塔本就會分布得足夠分散。請注意，啟用此設定會產生更多「單面」塔（僅一側連接陸地，另一側位於島嶼上），且可能明顯增加地圖生成所需的時間。\n此設定對舊版塔生成器無效。

source: When creating the worlds, the map generator assigns a default race for each continent. Any neutral city created on that continent has a 75% chance to be of that race. However, High Elves are automatically replaced by High Men here. In addition, even in the remaining 25%, High Elves can only be selected for a city if it is on a forest tile. Enabling this setting removes both of those restrictions, creating forests automatically under elven cities instead. Note that this also reduces the frequency of neutral High Men accordingly.
zh: 生成世界時，地圖生成器會為每塊大陸指定一個預設種族。在該大陸上建立的中立城市有 75% 的機率屬於該種族。然而，高等精靈在此處會自動被高等人類取代；在剩餘的 25% 中，高等精靈也只有在城市位於森林格時才能被選中。啟用此設定後，上述兩項限制均解除，精靈城市下方會自動生成森林。請注意，此舉也會相應降低中立高等人類城市的出現頻率。

source: Originally, the map generator must place neutral cities at least 4 tiles away from any encounter zones. As a result, on maps with smaller Land Sizes, there will be very few neutral cities, if any. Enabling this setting adjusts the encounter distance requirement based on Land Size, allowing the creation of more neutral cities, the amount of which may then be controlled more precisely through the Max Neutral Cities map setting.
zh: 原本地圖生成器必須將中立城市置於距任何遭遇區域至少 4 格之處。因此在陸地面積較小的地圖上，中立城市會非常稀少，甚至完全沒有。啟用此設定後，遭遇距離要求會依陸地面積調整，從而允許生成更多中立城市；其數量則可透過地圖設定中的「最多中立城市數」進行更精細的控制。

source: Enable this setting to restore the original mechanics for placing Towers of Wizardry that do not restrict them to land tiles whenever possible. This results in them having one end on an island most of the time even on larger maps, and often both on small maps. Note that this makes the game easier than intended, as computer players are unable to use one-sided Towers properly, and will typically fail to conquer double-island Towers altogether.
zh: 啟用此設定後，將恢復原始的巫師之塔放置機制，不再盡可能將其限制在陸地格上。結果是即使在較大的地圖上，塔也有一端位於島嶼上，小地圖上則常常兩端皆是。請注意，此設定會讓遊戲比預期更容易，因為電腦玩家無法正確使用單面塔，面對雙島嶼塔通常也無法征服。

source: Enable this setting to restore the original mechanics for placing magical nodes that do not restrict them to existing land whenever possible. This results in many of them being placed on small islands even on larger maps with plenty of space. Note that this makes the game easier than intended, as computer players will often fail to conquer island nodes entirely, especially if the isle remains an unextended single tile.
zh: 啟用此設定後，將恢復原始的魔法節點放置機制，不再盡可能將其限制在現有陸地上。結果是即使在空間充裕的大地圖上，許多節點仍會被置於小島嶼上。請注意，此設定會讓遊戲比預期更容易，因為電腦玩家往往完全無法征服島嶼節點，尤其當該島嶼只是一個未延伸的單格時。

source: Allows both you and the computer opponents to possess Life and Death books simultaneously. Enabling this option overrides the v1.51 Default Relations feature (it's turned on regardless of setting), as the original mechanics impose a huge diplomatic penalty on any wizard with both types of books. Using the last profile loader with a wizard possessing both types of books will automatically turn on this feature.
zh: 允許您與電腦對手同時擁有生命與死亡法術書。啟用此選項會覆蓋 v1.51 的預設關係功能（無論設定為何都會強制開啟），因為原始機制對同時擁有兩種法術書的巫師施加巨大的外交懲罰。使用最後一個設定檔載入器，若其中巫師同時擁有兩種法術書，此功能將自動啟用。

source: The Myrran retort costs 2 picks instead of 3.
zh: 密倫天賦改為消耗 2 個天賦點，而非 3 個。

source: If you don't start with 11 spellbooks in the same realm, neither will the computer opponents.
zh: 若您起始時未在同一系別擁有 11 本法術書，電腦對手也不會擁有。

source: Computer opponents prefer to start with 11 spellbooks in the same realm, as opposed to using combinations of 8-10 books in one realm and the rest in another. This setting has no effect on the lowest difficulty, where deviation from the default profiles is not allowed. It also doesn't override Non-11 Book Matching, and will simply not trigger if the opponents are not allowed an 11-book start to begin with.
zh: 電腦對手傾向於在同一系別起始擁有 11 本法術書，而非混用一個系別 8–10 本、其餘放入另一系別的組合。此設定對最低難度無效（最低難度不允許偏離預設設定檔）。此設定也不會覆蓋「非 11 書匹配」，若對手本就不被允許以 11 本書起始，此設定便不會觸發。

source: Computer opponents observe the spellbook requirements when selecting their retorts. However, so do treasure rewards. Everyone can only acquire what they qualify for.
zh: 電腦對手在選擇天賦時遵守法術書數量要求；寶藏獎勵同樣如此。所有人只能獲得自身符合資格的內容。

source: Crossing tundra tiles costs the same amount of movement points for swimming and water walking units as it does for those with ground movement.
zh: 穿越凍原格對具備游泳或水上行走能力的單位消耗的移動點數與地面移動單位相同。

source: Crossing tundra tiles costs the same amount of movement points regardless of whether they are surrounded completely by other tundra tiles or not. Originally, "deep" snow (all adjacent tiles are tundra) costs 4 movement points to cross for both ground, swimming, and water walking units, whereas other tundra tiles cost 2 for ground units, and 1 for swimming or water walking ones. With this setting enabled, the latter applies to both (or they cost 2 points for swimmers as well if No Snow Swimming is also enabled).
zh: 穿越凍原格消耗的移動點數固定，無論該格是否完全被其他凍原格包圍。原始規則中，「深雪」（所有相鄰格均為凍原）對地面、游泳及水上行走單位均消耗 4 點移動；其他凍原格則對地面單位消耗 2 點，對游泳或水上行走單位消耗 1 點。啟用此設定後，後者規則統一適用於所有情況（若同時啟用「禁止雪中游泳」，游泳者穿越非深雪凍原也消耗 2 點）。

source: Units with Mountaineering do not suffer a movement penalty when moving through grasslands.
zh: 具備登山能力的單位在穿越草地時不受移動懲罰。

source:
The Dwarf, the Beastmaster, the Thief, the Warrior Mage, the Assassin, and the Golden One receive 3 additional random abilities.
The Barbarian, the Sage, the Dervish, the Bard, the Orc Warrior, the Healer, the Druid, the Ranger, the Rogue, and the Knight receive 2 additional random abilities.
The Huntress, the War Monk, the Wind Mage, the Ninja, the Warlock, the Unknown, the Swordsman, and the Priestess receive 1 additional random ability.
The Healer and the Golden One can equip staves and wands.
zh:
矮人、馴獸師、盜賊、戰士法師、刺客與黃金人獲得 3 個額外隨機能力。
野蠻人、賢者、苦行僧、吟遊詩人、獸人戰士、治癒者、德魯伊、遊俠、流氓與騎士獲得 2 個額外隨機能力。
女獵手、戰鬥僧、風之法師、忍者、術士、神秘者、劍士與女祭司獲得 1 個額外隨機能力。
治癒者與黃金人可裝備法杖與魔杖。

source: Default diplomatic relations are calculated using the 1.50/1.51 formula. Possessing Life books does not grant an inherent diplomatic advantage, and playing Death does not automatically incur bad relations. Instead, default relations depend on an alignment difference (Life + Nature opposed to Death + Chaos) versus the amount of books shared. For more details, please see the wiki article on Starting Relation.
zh: 預設外交關係依 1.50/1.51 公式計算。擁有生命法術書不再帶來固有的外交優勢，使用死亡系也不會自動招致不良關係。取而代之的是，預設關係取決於陣營差異（生命＋自然對立死亡＋混沌）與共同法術書數量之間的比較。詳情請參閱維基中關於「起始關係」的文章。

source: Raiders appear roughly twice as often, and in much higher numbers.\n\nWARNING: Using this feature in conjunction with neutral city enhancements can make the early stages of the game considerably more difficult!
zh: 突襲者出現的頻率約為原來的兩倍，數量也大幅增加。\n\n警告：將此功能與中立城市強化選項同時使用，可能使遊戲前期難度大幅提升！

source: Rampaging monster budgets are increased by +150%, and they start spawning on turn 40 instead of turn 50.
zh: 橫行怪物的預算提升 150%，並從第 40 回合開始生成，而非第 50 回合。

source: Originally, players were only meant to find or be gifted magical items that are in theme with their wizard's profile. However, this also meant that they would be able to craft any such items themselves. This was considered to be a bug by the unofficial patch authors, and removed from the game in v1.40. Enabling this feature reintroduces the theming restrictions for all players.
zh: 原始設計中，玩家只應找到或獲贈與其巫師設定相符主題的魔法物品；然而這也意味著他們可以自行製作任何此類物品。非官方修正檔作者視此為漏洞，並在 v1.40 中將其移除。啟用此功能後，主題限制將對所有玩家重新生效。

source: By default, attribute powers cost twice their normal value when imbued onto miscellaneous items. Enabling this feature makes them cost the same instead. Note that this setting does not carry into the default item editor, but will nonetheless apply to default items awarded in the campaign.
zh: 預設情況下，屬性能力附魔到雜項物品時費用為正常值的兩倍。啟用此功能後，費用與正常值相同。請注意，此設定不會套用至預設物品編輯器，但仍會影響戰役中獲得的預設物品。

source: Magical items, whether crafted, random, or default, are allowed a maximum of five powers instead of four. This setting carries into the default item editor, allowing the creation of default items with five powers. These will then also be available in games started without this feature, provided that they are of affordable values.
zh: 魔法物品（無論是製作、隨機或預設）最多可擁有五種能力，而非四種。此設定會套用至預設物品編輯器，允許創建擁有五種能力的預設物品。只要費用合理，這些物品在未啟用此功能的遊戲中也可獲得。

source: Spell Charges may be imbued onto any weapon as opposed to only staves and wands. This setting carries into the default item editor, allowing the creation of non-caster charged weapons. These will then also be available in games started without this feature, provided that they are of affordable values.
zh: 法術充能可附魔至任何武器，而非僅限於法杖與魔杖。此設定會套用至預設物品編輯器，允許創建非施法者充能武器。只要費用合理，這些物品在未啟用此功能的遊戲中也可獲得。

source: If an intended spell, spellbook, retort, or prisoner can't be awarded, some other type of treasure always will be. Spells are replaced with mana crystals, prisoners with gold coins. Failed specials are replaced with magical items and mana of comparable total value to the original treasure budget spent on those picks. However, note that this last effect does not apply if v1.51 treasure is also enabled (which enhances failed specials in its own way).
zh: 若預定的法術、法術書、天賦或囚徒無法作為獎勵發放，必定以其他類型的寶藏代替。法術替換為法力水晶，囚徒替換為金幣。失敗的特殊獎勵則以魔法物品與法力替換，總價值與原本該次抽選所花費的寶藏預算相當。請注意，若同時啟用 v1.51 寶藏規則（其有自己的方式強化失敗特殊獎勵），此最後一項效果不適用。

source: The Alchemy retort costs 2 picks, but also allows the use of mithril and adamantium ores, where available.
zh: 鍊金術天賦消耗 2 個天賦點，但同時允許使用秘銀與精金礦石（在可取得的情況下）。

source: Create a numbered auto-save every turn with the naming convention SAVEnnnn.GAM, where nnnn is the current turn number. Please note that there is only one set of these files at any given time, so starting a new game will overwrite those of older ones. The files also need to be renamed manually to allow loading them: SAVE1.GAM - SAVE8.GAM are the regular save game slots, SAVE9.GAM is the "continue" save slot, and SAVE10.GAM is the quick save slot.
zh: 每回合依命名規則 SAVEnnnn.GAM 建立一個編號自動存檔，其中 nnnn 為當前回合數。請注意，任何時候只存在一套這類檔案，因此開始新遊戲將覆蓋舊遊戲的自動存檔。如需載入這些檔案，須手動重新命名：SAVE1.GAM–SAVE8.GAM 為一般存檔槽，SAVE9.GAM 為「繼續」存檔槽，SAVE10.GAM 為快速存檔槽。

source: If this setting is enabled, the Escape key binding triggers the Wait button on the overland map, and the Done button in combat. By default, it doesn't do anything in either case.
zh: 啟用此設定後，Escape 鍵在戰略地圖上觸發「等待」按鈕，在戰鬥中觸發「完成」按鈕。預設情況下，Escape 鍵在兩種場景中均無作用。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) have the Chaos property, but only half the normal attack strength.
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）具有混沌屬性，但攻擊強度僅為正常值的一半。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) also perform Cause Death.
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）同時施放「致死術」。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) also perform Power Drain.\n\nWARNING: this effect is actually not implemented in the game!
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）同時施放「魔力汲取」。\n\n警告：此效果實際上尚未在遊戲中實作！

source: Click here to view your previous city (in order of founding). Note that outposts are skipped over by this feature, as the city screen is not accessible for them.
zh: 點擊此處查看您的上一座城市（依建立順序）。請注意，此功能會跳過哨站，因為哨站無法進入城市畫面。

source: Click here to view your next city (in order of founding). Note that outposts are skipped over by this feature, as the city screen is not accessible for them.
zh: 點擊此處查看您的下一座城市（依建立順序）。請注意，此功能會跳過哨站，因為哨站無法進入城市畫面。

source: Whenever the game generates a magical item, there is a 50% chance that it will be built from scratch regardless of whether a default item within the intended value range is available or not. While this setting is enabled, random items are much more likely to be accessories, and can possess any eligible power, not just attribute improvements. However, the items will no longer occasionally be of a higher value than their assigned budget.
zh: 每當遊戲生成魔法物品時，無論預設物品範圍內是否有符合價值的選項，均有 50% 機率從頭隨機生成。啟用此設定後，隨機物品更有可能是飾品，並可擁有任何符合資格的能力，而不僅限於屬性提升。然而，物品價值將不再偶爾超過其分配的預算上限。

source: Welcome to the default item editor. Note that any changes you make here will not affect items already awarded in a campaign (as tracked by their index). For best results, it is recommended to edit the items right after starting a new game.\n\nHint: the Five Power Items and Charge Any Weapon patch features carry into the editor. Launching it from a game with these enabled will allow designing the default items accordingly.
zh: 歡迎使用預設物品編輯器。請注意，您在此所做的任何變更不會影響戰役中已發放的物品（依索引追蹤）。為達最佳效果，建議在開始新遊戲後立即編輯物品。\n\n提示：「五種能力物品」與「任意武器充能」兩項修正功能會套用至編輯器。在啟用這些功能的遊戲中開啟編輯器，即可依此設計預設物品。

source: Spell charges allow the wielder of the item to cast the selected spell the indicated number of times in every battle, without having to expend any mana or spell casting skill (unless the spell can be enhanced, in which case any additional power must still be paid for).
zh: 法術充能允許物品持有者在每場戰鬥中施放所選法術指定次數，無需消耗任何法力或施法技能（若該法術可強化，額外消耗的法力仍須自行支付）。

source: Click here to exit the item editor without saving any changes.
zh: 點擊此處離開物品編輯器，不儲存任何變更。

source: Click here to abort the enchantment without spending any mana.
zh: 點擊此處取消附魔，不消耗任何法力。

source: Click here to edit the previous item.
zh: 點擊此處編輯上一件物品。

source: Click here to edit the next item.
zh: 點擊此處編輯下一件物品。

source: Click here to exit the item editor, saving any changes made to the item table.
zh: 點擊此處離開物品編輯器，儲存對物品表所做的所有變更。

source: Applies Bless to the wielder as a persistent effect, and grants Dispel Evil on touch.
zh: 對持有者施加持續性的祝福效果，並賦予接觸時驅除邪惡的能力。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) also perform a Stoning Touch attack with a penalty of -1.
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）同時施放「石化之觸」攻擊，附帶 -1 懲罰。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) have the Illusion property.
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）具有幻象屬性。

source: Applies the Wraith Form enchantment to the wielder as a persistent effect.
zh: 對持有者施加持續性的鬼魂形態結界效果。

source: Increases the wielder's attack strength by the indicated amount. Which attacks this applies to depends on the type of the item: swords and maces increase only melee strength, axes increase melee and thrown strength, bows increase only ranged missile strength, and staves and wands increase only ranged magical strength. Miscellaneous items increase all regular attack strengths (but not those of spells cast by the wielder).
zh: 將持有者的攻擊強度提升指定數值。適用範圍取決於物品類型：劍與錘僅提升近戰強度；斧頭提升近戰與投擲強度；弓僅提升遠程飛彈強度；法杖與魔杖僅提升遠程魔法強度。雜項物品提升所有普通攻擊強度（但不包含持有者施法所造成的傷害）。

source: Increases the wielder's chance to hit (measured in 10%s) by the indicated amount. Which attacks this applies to depends on the type of the item: swords and maces increase only melee hit chance, axes increase melee and thrown hit chance, bows increase only ranged missile hit chance, and staves and wands increase only ranged magical hit chance. Miscellaneous items increase the hit chance of all regular attacks (but not those of spells cast by the wielder).
zh: 將持有者的命中機率（以 10% 為單位）提升指定數值。適用範圍取決於物品類型：劍與錘僅提升近戰命中率；斧頭提升近戰與投擲命中率；弓僅提升遠程飛彈命中率；法杖與魔杖僅提升遠程魔法命中率。雜項物品提升所有普通攻擊的命中率（但不包含持有者施法的命中）。

source: Increases the wielder's Armor/Defense by the indicated amount.
zh: 將持有者的護甲／防禦提升指定數值。

source: Increases the wielder's spell casting skill by the indicated amount. This adds directly to the mana they can use in each battle and, if they are stationed in their controlling wizard's fortress city, increases the amount of mana that this wizard can channel into overland spells between turns.
zh: 將持有者的施法技能提升指定數值。此數值直接增加每場戰鬥可使用的法力，若持有者駐紮在其所屬巫師的要塞城市，也會提升該巫師在回合間可注入戰略法術的法力量。

source: Applies the indicated amount of negative resistance to the target(s) when the wielder casts any of the following spells: Banish, Black Sleep, Confusion, Creature Binding, Disintegrate, Dispel Evil, Petrify, Possession, Shatter, Vertigo, Warp Creature, Weakness, and Word of Death. This is cumulative with any penalty that the spell may already inflict on the target's resistance.
zh: 當持有者施放下列任一法術時，對目標施加指定數值的負面抗性：放逐術、黑暗睡眠、混亂術、生物束縛、瓦解術、驅除邪惡、石化術、佔有術、粉碎術、眩暈術、扭曲生物、虛弱術與死亡之語。此效果與法術本身對目標抗性的懲罰累加計算。

source: Increases the wearer's movement allowance by the indicated amount.
zh: 將穿戴者的移動配額提升指定數值。

source: Increases the wearer's resistance score by the indicated amount.
zh: 將穿戴者的抗性數值提升指定數值。

source: Increases the attack strength bonus of the enchanted weapon by +3 (melee strength for swords and maces, melee and thrown strength for axes, ranged missile strength for bows, or ranged magical strength for staves and wands).
zh: 將結界武器的攻擊強度加成提升 +3（劍與錘為近戰強度；斧頭為近戰與投擲強度；弓為遠程飛彈強度；法杖與魔杖為遠程魔法強度）。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) have the Armor Piercing property.
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）具有穿甲屬性。

source: Attacks made with the enchanted weapon (melee only for swords and maces, melee and thrown for axes, ranged only for bows, staves, and wands) also perform a Life Stealing touch attack (with no resistance penalty).
zh: 以結界武器發動的攻擊（劍與錘僅限近戰；斧頭適用近戰與投擲；弓、法杖與魔杖僅限遠程）同時施放「生命汲取」接觸攻擊（無抗性懲罰）。

source: The sword is a melee weapon. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, and fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. Any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) enchanted onto a sword will only affect or apply to the wielder's melee attacks.
zh: 劍是一種近戰武器，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。附魔於劍上的所有攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）僅影響持有者的近戰攻擊。

source: The mace is a melee weapon. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, and fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. Any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) enchanted onto a mace will only affect or apply to the wielder's melee attacks.
zh: 錘是一種近戰武器，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。附魔於錘上的所有攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）僅影響持有者的近戰攻擊。

source: The axe is both a melee and a thrown weapon. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, and fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. Unlike other melee weapons, an axe will apply any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) it carries to both the wielder's melee and thrown attacks (but not to any other attack types).
zh: 斧頭兼具近戰與投擲武器特性，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。與其他近戰武器不同，斧頭上的攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）同時適用於持有者的近戰與投擲攻擊（但不適用於其他攻擊類型）。

source: The bow is a ranged weapon. It can only be equipped by archer type heroes. Any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) enchanted onto a bow will only affect or apply to the wielder's ranged missile attacks.
zh: 弓是一種遠程武器，只能由弓手類型英雄裝備。附魔於弓上的所有攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）僅影響持有者的遠程飛彈攻擊。

source: The staff is a magical weapon. It can only be equipped by spellcaster heroes (including most fighter/caster types). Any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) enchanted onto a staff will only affect or apply to the wielder's ranged magical attacks.
zh: 法杖是一種魔法武器，只能由施法者類型英雄裝備（包含大多數戰士／施法者類型）。附魔於法杖上的所有攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）僅影響持有者的遠程魔法攻擊。

source: The wand is a magical weapon. It can only be equipped by spellcaster heroes (including most fighter/caster types). Any offensive attributes (attack or to hit bonus, touch effects) enchanted onto a wand will only affect or apply to the wielder's ranged magical attacks.
zh: 魔杖是一種魔法武器，只能由施法者類型英雄裝備（包含大多數戰士／施法者類型）。附魔於魔杖上的所有攻擊屬性（攻擊或命中加成、接觸效果）僅影響持有者的遠程魔法攻擊。

source: A miscellaneous item can be equipped by all heroes. Any offensive powers (attack strength or chance to hit bonus) it carries will apply to all types of attacks made by the wearer, with the exception of attacks made through the casting of spells (e.g. Fireball).
zh: 雜項物品可由所有英雄裝備。其攜帶的所有攻擊能力（攻擊強度或命中機率加成）適用於穿戴者的所有攻擊類型，但透過施放法術（如火球術）造成的攻擊除外。

source: The shield is a piece of protective equipment. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, or fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. A shield grants its bearer the Large Shield ability in addition to any enchantment imbued onto it.
zh: 盾牌是一件防護裝備，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。除附魔效果外，盾牌還賦予持有者「大盾」能力。

source: The chain mail is medium armor. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, or fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. A chain mail grants an inherent +1 Armor in addition to any enchantment imbued onto it.
zh: 鎖甲是中型護甲，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。除附魔效果外，鎖甲本身提供 +1 護甲。

source: The plate mail is heavy armor. It can be equipped by fighter, archer, or fighter/caster type heroes, but not pure spellcasters. A plate mail grants an inherent +2 Armor in addition to any enchantment imbued onto it.
zh: 板甲是重型護甲，可由戰士、弓手及戰士／施法者類型英雄裝備，純施法者無法使用。除附魔效果外，板甲本身提供 +2 護甲。

source: Click here to select the previous icon for this item.
zh: 點擊此處選擇此物品的上一個圖示。

source: Click here to select the next icon for this item.
zh: 點擊此處選擇此物品的下一個圖示。

source: Click here to scroll up through the list of special abilities.
zh: 點擊此處向上捲動特殊能力列表。

source: Click here to scroll down through the list of special abilities.
zh: 點擊此處向下捲動特殊能力列表。

source: Click here to accept the enchantment or, if no powers are selected, abort the crafting.
zh: 點擊此處確認附魔；若未選擇任何能力，則取消製作。

source: Adds a slight delay before scrolling starts after the mouse is moved to the edge of the screen. Note that this setting has no effect on keyboard scrolling, or if Screen Edge Scrolling is not enabled in the first place.
zh: 將滑鼠移至螢幕邊緣後，捲動開始前會有短暫延遲。請注意，此設定對鍵盤捲動無效，若「螢幕邊緣捲動」本身未啟用，此設定也不生效。

source: Controls whether the overland map is scrolled when the mouse is on an edge of the screen.
zh: 控制當滑鼠位於螢幕邊緣時，戰略地圖是否進行捲動。

source: Controls whether the mouse pointer is snapped to the middle of any visible control activated through a hotkey, as well as whether a set of directional keys can be used to move the pointer around between controls. The Next / Prev Control bindings ignore this setting and will work regardless, if assigned. This setting, along with the legacy control movement key bindings, are provided for posterity. Their use is not recommended. A mouse is required to play the game either way, as click grid activation through the keyboard is not implemented in the engine.
zh: 控制透過快速鍵啟動可見控件時，滑鼠指標是否自動移至該控件中央，以及是否可用方向鍵在控件之間移動指標。「下一個／上一個控件」的按鍵綁定忽略此設定，若已指定則始終有效。此設定及舊版控件移動快捷鍵僅為向後相容而保留，不建議使用。無論如何，遊戲均需使用滑鼠，因為引擎尚未實作透過鍵盤點擊格狀控件的功能。

source: If enabled, binding a key that is already in use on the same interface will not automatically remove all conflicting bindings. One key press will still only trigger one action, but since some controls may be optional (e.g. most unit command keys are only checked if there's a selection), conditional behaviour can be possible on some screens this way. The Escape binding ignores this setting, and will always remove concurrent bindings from all groups.
zh: 啟用後，在同一介面中綁定已使用的按鍵不會自動移除所有衝突綁定。一次按鍵仍只觸發一個動作，但由於某些控件為可選性（例如大多數單位指令鍵只在有選取目標時才被檢查），此方式在部分畫面上可實現條件性行為。Escape 鍵的綁定忽略此設定，始終會移除所有群組的並行綁定。

source: Click here to scroll up to the previous page of options (or to the last if this is the first one).
zh: 點擊此處向上捲動至上一頁選項（若已是第一頁則跳至最後一頁）。

source: Click here to scroll down to the next page of options (or back to the first if this is the last one).
zh: 點擊此處向下捲動至下一頁選項（若已是最後一頁則返回第一頁）。

source: Click here to change the key bindings.
zh: 點擊此處更改按鍵綁定。

source: Click here to return to the settings.
zh: 點擊此處返回設定畫面。

source: Click here to return to the Save/Load screen.
zh: 點擊此處返回存檔／讀檔畫面。
